2-4ghz-5dbi-dipole-antenna-with-rpsma-co:
Build a 2.4 GHz "OmniTik". 5dBi. RP-SMA connector. Waterproof design.

ACOMNIRPSMA is the 2.4GHz (5dBi) omnidirectional dipole antenna from Mikrotik, designed with a specific purpose: to be the perfect companion for the BaseBox2. By screwing two of these antennas directly onto the RP-SMA connectors of the BaseBox2, it instantly transforms it into a 2x2 MIMO 2.4 GHz omnidirectional access point (AP). It is the simplest and most cost-effective way to build a "2.4 GHz OmniTik" for outdoor coverage.

Why Choose ACOMNIRPSMA?

The perfect pair for BaseBox2

This antenna was designed to be screwed directly onto the BaseBox2 (or NetBox). Using two of them creates a complete 2x2 MIMO AP, ideal for providing 360-degree Wi-Fi.

Waterproof design

The antenna is fully waterproof. This allows for a cleaner, more minimalist installation: you can remove the top cap (cable cover) of the BaseBox2 and screw the antennas on directly, maintaining a watertight seal (as long as they are tightened properly).

Solid 5dBi gain

The 5dBi gain offers an excellent balance between horizontal coverage (360°) and performance in the 2.4 GHz band, making it a solid upgrade for open areas.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This antenna is the ideal choice for:

Outdoor access points (campsites, parks)

Its primary application. Perfect for campsites, caravan parks, marinas, or any outdoor campus area where you need 360-degree 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi coverage.

Quick access points

For any situation where you need a robust, weatherproof omnidirectional 2.4 GHz AP based on the BaseBox platform.
5ghz-dual-chain-802-11-a-n-ac-omnitiku-5:
5GHz AC AP (360°). Powers 4 devices. The ultimate WISP hub.

The OmniTik 5 PoE ac is the upgrade WISPs have been waiting for. It is not just a high-power Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) 5 GHz access point (AP) (31 dBm); it is an outdoor power hub. With 5x Gigabit ports, ports 2 through 5 deliver 802.3af/at (Standard) PoE output. It is an AP, a switch, and a 4-port PoE injector, all in a rugged (IP54) enclosure with integrated 7.5dBi omnidirectional antennas.

Why Choose OmniTik 5 PoE ac?

The outdoor "Power Hub" (4x PoE-Out af/at)

This is its standout feature. Ethernet ports 2 to 5 can power other PoE devices. Simplify your tower or installation: this AP can power IP cameras, IP phones, or other CPEs (such as SXTs) compatible with 802.3af/at. (Requires 48-57V input power to deliver af/at PoE output).

High-power 5 GHz AC AP (7.5dBi)

As an access point, it shines. The Dual Chain Wi-Fi 5 (867 Mbps) radio has a massive transmit power of up to 31dBm (1.2W). Combined with the two 7.5dBi omnidirectional antennas, it delivers exceptional 360° coverage for CPE clients.

Powerful hardware (720MHz and 5x GbE)

Equipped with a 720MHz CPU, 128MB of RAM, and 5 Gigabit ports, the OmniTik has the processing power to manage multiple Wi-Fi clients, routing (License L4), and traffic from all 4 PoE-Out ports simultaneously.

USB port for expansion

The built-in USB Type-A port allows you to add even more functionality, such as a 3G/4G (LTE) modem for out-of-band management or as a backup link.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

WISP Tower Hub

The #1 application. Use it as a 5GHz Omni AP for nearby clients and use the 4 PoE-Out ports to power 3 sector APs + 1 PtP backhaul (such as an SXT or Cube).

Surveillance and Network Hub (CCTV)

The perfect device for a pole. Connect it to the network (via cable or wireless) and use the 4 PoE-Out ports (802.3af/at) to power 4 standard IP cameras, with no need for additional switches or injectors.

Access points (events, campus)

Provide 360° 5 GHz Wi-Fi coverage for an event venue or campus, and use the extra ports to connect other devices (APs, ticket terminals, etc.).
active-gps-antenna-for-ltap-mini-lte-kit:
Precise location. Active reception. The GPS antenna for the LtAP.

The ACGPSA is the standalone GPS antenna from Mikrotik, designed to add high-precision location capability to your devices, specifically the LtAP series (such as the LtAP and LtAP mini). Being an active antenna, it amplifies the GPS signal (1575.4 MHz spectrum), ensuring fast and stable lock even in areas with weak coverage. Its rugged IP67 housing, long 5-metre cable, and mounting options (magnet + double-sided tape) make it the ideal solution for vehicle tracking.

Connectivity note: The antenna has an SMA (male) connector. To connect to the LtAP mini (which has a u.FL connector), the ACSMAUFL pigtail (sold separately) is required.

Why Choose ACGPSA?

Active antenna (amplified signal)

Its main advantage. Being "active" means the antenna amplifies the GPS signal before sending it through the 5m cable. This is crucial for obtaining a reliable signal in "urban canyons" (tall buildings) or when the router (LtAP) is in a location with difficult reception.

Built for vehicles (IP67 and magnetic)

This antenna was designed for mobility. It is fully waterproof and dustproof (IP67) and includes an internal magnet and double-sided tape. It can be easily attached to the exterior (e.g., on the roof) of a car, bus, or truck, and the 5m cable is long enough to reach the indoor router.

5-metre cable length

Complete installation flexibility. The 5-metre cable (terminated in SMA) allows you to place the LtAP in a secure location (e.g., glove box, technical panel) and extend the antenna to the outside, where you have a clear "view" of the sky.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This antenna is the ideal choice for:

Fleet tracking (vehicles)

The number 1 application. When combined with an LtAP, it enables real-time tracking of buses, trucks, or service fleets.

Time synchronisation (NTP)

Enables your LtAP router to obtain the exact time via GPS, serving as an ultra-precise time server (NTP) for your network.

Installations with poor reception

When your 4G router (LtAP) is in a rack or technical room with no view of the sky, this antenna allows you to place the GPS receiver outdoors.

break-out-cable-100g-qsfp28-4x25g-sfp28-:
Multiply your 100G connectivity.

The XQ+BC0003-XS+ is a high-performance breakout cable from MikroTik, designed to drastically expand the connectivity of your 100 Gigabit equipment. This solution allows you to convert a single QSFP28 port into four independent SFP28 ports, making it simpler and more efficient than ever to connect multiple devices.

Why Choose the MikroTik breakout cable?

High-density connectivity

This cable is the easiest way to connect multiple 25G servers, switches, or storage systems to a single 100G port on an aggregation switch. It is the perfect complement for devices such as the MikroTik CRS504 or CCR2216, maximising the use of every high-speed port.

All-in-one integrated solution

Being a Direct Attach Cable (DAC) with integrated SFP28 modules, it eliminates the need to purchase separate transceivers and fibre optic cables. This simplifies procurement, reduces points of failure, and guarantees immediate compatibility.

Dual functionality (100G and 40G)

The XQ+BC0003-XS+ offers excellent versatility. It can operate in 100G mode, converting a QSFP28 port into four 25G ports, or in 40G mode, converting a QSFP+ port into four 10G ports, making it a flexible investment for different network types.

Ideal length for datacentres

At 3 metres in length, this cable is the perfect size for connecting equipment within the same rack or in adjacent racks, helping to keep your server room organised with clean cable management.

Ideal For whom?

MikroTik 100G switch users

The ideal and recommended solution for those who own a CRS504, CCR2216, or another switch with QSFP28 ports and need to connect multiple devices with SFP28 25G interfaces.

Datacentres and high-performance networks

Perfect for environments that require high-density connections of 25G servers to a "Top-of-Rack" switch, offering a simple and cost-effective solution.

Network administrators

For professionals seeking to maximise the port capacity of their next-generation switches while simplifying cabling infrastructure and reducing the number of components to manage.
caixa-mikrotik-routerboard-ca-150-125x95:
The Classic Enclosure. Robust, in aluminium. For RB450/RB850.

The CA150 from Mikrotik is the classic indoor enclosure in black aluminium, designed specifically for the legendary RB450 router series. It offers a perfect fit for the RB450, RB450G, and the latest RB850Gx2. Its metal construction not only protects the board but also acts as a passive heatsink, and includes the complete installation kit.

Why Choose the CA150?

Perfect fit (RB450/RB850 series)

This enclosure was purpose-built. All cutouts for the 5 Ethernet ports, serial port (DB9), and power input (DC connector) are precisely aligned, giving your RouterBOARD a professional finish.

Robust aluminium construction

The black aluminium construction is not just aesthetic. It protects your board from damage and, more importantly, acts as a passive heatsink, helping to cool the CPU (especially on the RB850Gx2) and ensuring stable operation.

Installation kit included

The enclosure comes with a complete installation set, including screws for securing the RouterBOARD and adhesive rubber feet for the base, enabling immediate assembly.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This enclosure is the ideal choice for:

Router/firewall assembly

The most professional and secure way to install your RB450G or RB850Gx2 as a primary router/firewall on a desk or communications cabinet.

Enclosure replacement

To replace an original plastic enclosure (from some older models) or a damaged metal enclosure, giving your router a new lease of life.
caixa-mikrotik-routerboard-ca-433u-rb433:
The evolution of the classic enclosure. For RB433 and RBM33G. 3x Antenna + 1x USB.

The CA433U is an indoor aluminium (black) enclosure designed for maximum versatility. It is the ideal platform for the classic RB433 series RouterBOARDs and, most importantly, for the powerful new RBM33G. This revision is slightly taller (to accommodate larger miniPCI boards) and comes with the essential cutouts: 3 antenna holes (N-female or swivel) and 1x USB port hole.

Why Choose the CA433U?

Dual compatibility (RB433 and RBM33G)

This enclosure is the official solution that fits perfectly with both the RB433 series RouterBOARDs (with 3 Ethernet ports) and the new RBM33G (with 3 Ethernet ports and expansion slots). The cutouts are aligned for both platforms.

Ready for expansion (3x antenna, 1x USB)

The 3 antenna holes allow you to use the 3 miniPCI slots (on the RB433) or 2x miniPCIe + 1x M.2 (on the RBM33G) with external antennas. The USB hole is essential for using the USB port on the RBM33G (e.g., for a 4G modem).

"Tall" design and custom front panels

This new revision is taller, ensuring space for miniPCI boards with heatsinks. The enclosure also includes multiple "front panel stickers" so you can cover the port cutouts you are not using, giving a professional finish.

Robust aluminium construction

The aluminium construction is not only rugged but also acts as a passive heatsink for the RouterBOARD, aiding in cooling.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This enclosure is the ideal choice for:

Assembling the RBM33G "Gateway"

The number 1 application. The RBM33G is a powerful board (Dual-Core CPU). This enclosure allows you to assemble it professionally and use its full potential (e.g., 1x LTE modem, 1x Wi-Fi).

Custom APs (RB433 series)

For those who still use the reliable RB433 to create multi-radio APs. This enclosure allows the installation of 3 miniPCI radios with their respective antennas.
caixa-mikrotik-routerboard-ca-493-230x11:
The Official Enclosure. For the RB493 series. 3 antenna holes.

The CA493 from Mikrotik is the indoor aluminium (black) enclosure designed specifically for the RouterBOARD RB493 product family. This new revision is slightly taller, allowing it to accommodate a wider range of miniPCI boards. The enclosure comes pre-drilled with 3 antenna holes, ideal for installing pigtail connectors (N-female) or swivel antennas (such as ACSWIM).

Why Choose CA493?

Perfect fit for RB493

This enclosure was purpose-built for the RB493 series (such as the RB493G or RB493AH), ensuring that all cutouts for the Ethernet ports, serial port, and power supply are perfectly aligned.

Ready for 3 external antennas

The three pre-drilled holes save time and effort, allowing you to easily add external antennas to your miniPCI boards, optimising your Wi-Fi coverage.

Tall and robust design

The aluminium construction is not only rugged but also acts as a passive heatsink for the RouterBOARD. The extra height of this revision is crucial to ensure compatibility with miniPCI boards that have larger heatsinks.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This enclosure is the ideal choice for:

Assembling RB493 routers

The most professional and secure way to install your RouterBOARD RB493 on a desk or rack (with shelf).

Custom multi-radio APs

For those using the multiple miniPCI slots of the RB493 to create an access point with multiple radios (e.g., 2.4GHz + 5GHz).
caixa-mikrotik-routerboard-preta-180x110:
Universal Enclosure. Interchangeable front panels. Tall design.

The CA411-711 from Mikrotik is the most versatile indoor aluminium (black) enclosure for your compact RouterBOARDs. Its greatest asset is the interchangeable front panels, which allow you to choose the panel with the correct cutouts for the board you are using (whether an RB912, RBM11G, or other). Furthermore, this enclosure is taller than standard enclosures, allowing the installation of high-power wireless boards with larger heatsinks.

Why Choose CA411-711?

Wide compatibility

Designed to be the ideal enclosure for various RouterBOARDs, it is officially compatible with the RBM11G, RB411, RB911, RB912, and RB922 series.

Interchangeable front panels

No need to worry about buying the wrong enclosure. This kit includes multiple interchangeable front panels so you can adapt the cabinet to exactly match the port layout of your specific board.

Extra space (tall design)

The taller design is crucial for accommodating wireless miniPCIe boards (high power) that use bulky heatsinks, ensuring the assembly fits perfectly without overheating.

Robust construction, ready to mount

Made from aluminium (black), it offers excellent passive heat dissipation. The enclosure includes wall mounting holes on the back for easy and clean installation.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This enclosure is the ideal choice for:

Custom AP assembly

For assembling an RB912 or RB922 with two radio boards (2.4/5GHz), where extra space for heatsinks is essential.

Indoor CPEs

For assembling an RBM11G or RB911 as a robust, discreet wall-mounted client router (CPE).
cloud-router-switch-106-1c-5s-routeros-l:
The compact powerhouse of fibre connectivity.

The MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS106-1C-5S is a desktop "smart" switch, specially designed for fibre optic networks. Equipped with five 1.25 Gbps SFP ports and one Gigabit Ethernet / SFP "combo" port, this compact device offers a market-leading solution for connecting up to six SFP devices at an extremely affordable price. With the power of RouterOS, it is much more than just a switch.

Why Choose CRS106-1C-5S?

High-density SFP ports

This switch is a fibre hub. It offers five dedicated SFP ports and a sixth SFP port through its "combo" interface, making it the ideal and low-cost solution for aggregating multiple fibre optic connections at a single point.

Combo port flexibility

The combo port offers the flexibility to choose between a copper connection (Gigabit Ethernet) or a sixth fibre connection (SFP), perfectly adapting to the needs of your installation without wasting ports.

The power of RouterOS (Level 5)

The CRS106-1C-5S is not just a switch. Equipped with the RouterOS operating system and a Level 5 licence, it can run routing, firewall, VPN, and much more, offering unparalleled control and versatility for a device of this size and price.

Ideal For whom?

Small Internet Service Providers (ISPs)

An ultra-competitive cost solution for aggregating customers in small fibre-to-the-home (FTTH) installations, enabling multiple clients to be connected in a single unit.

"Home labs" and advanced networks

For enthusiasts who want to experiment with and build fibre optic networks at home, offering multiple SFP ports at a very affordable price.

Technical specifications
cloud-router-switch-109-8g-1s-2hnd-in-ro:
The "Swiss Army Knife" for Your office network.

The MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS109-8G-1S-2HnD-IN is an "all-in-one" device that combines the best features of a fully functional router and a Layer 3 switch. Equipped with eight Gigabit ports, one SFP port and an integrated wireless access point, and managed by the well-known RouterOS operating system, it is the perfect solution for small and medium-sized businesses looking for a single device to manage their entire network.

Why Choose the CRS109-8G-1S-2HnD-IN?

Multi-function capability

This switch is designed to be the hub of your network. With its 8 Gigabit Ethernet ports, 1 fiber SFP port and a 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi access point, you can connect your computers, servers and mobile devices, all from a single device.

Layer 2 switching and Layer 3 routing

Take full control over your network. You can configure the ports as a high-speed switch or use the full routing power of RouterOS. All switch configuration options (VLANs, etc.) are available, but if needed, you can remove ports from the switch configuration and use them for routing.

Touchscreen display for management

The color touchscreen on the front of the device offers a convenient way to view status information, port traffic and perform basic configurations without needing to access the web interface.

Ideal For Who?

Small and Medium Offices (SOHO)

As the central network device, acting as router, switch and Wi-Fi access point. Its SFP port allows a high-speed fiber connection to your Internet provider or another building.

Advanced users and "Home Labs"

Those looking for a device with enormous flexibility, allowing them to have a managed switch, a powerful router and an access point, all in a single compact box.

Technical Specifications
cloud-router-switch-112-8g-4s-in-routero:
The perfect combination of Router and Layer 3 switching.

The MikroTik CRS112-8G-4S-IN Cloud Router Switch is a member of the compact, low-cost CRS series. This device combines the best features of a fully functional router and a Layer 3 switch. Equipped with eight Gigabit Ethernet ports and four SFP ports for fiber connectivity, and managed by the familiar RouterOS operating system, it is the ideal solution for small and medium-sized networks that require the flexibility of fiber optics.

Why Choose the CRS112-8G-4S-IN?

Hybrid copper and fiber connectivity

Offers enormous connection versatility. Use the eight Gigabit Ethernet ports to connect your local devices such as computers, printers and access points, and use the four SFP ports for long-distance fiber optic connections or for uplinks to other switches.

Layer 2 switching and Layer 3 routing

This device offers the best of both worlds. All configuration options of a managed switch (such as port-to-port forwarding, MAC filtering, VLANs, etc.) are available. If your needs are more advanced, you can remove ports from the switch configuration and use them for Layer 3 routing purposes, with the full power of RouterOS.

Compact and professional form factor

With a compact desktop form factor, it can be easily integrated into any office environment. If preferred, it can also be rack-mounted in a 19-inch rack with the included rack brackets ("ears").

Ideal For Who?

Small and Medium Businesses (SMBs)

As the central switch for a small office, providing the ability to connect multiple devices and create fiber uplinks to other switches on different floors or to a main router.

Networks with fiber connections

For any scenario that needs to aggregate multiple fiber optic connections, such as small FTTH (Fiber-to-the-Home) installations or as a distribution switch on a campus.

Advanced users and "Home Labs"

Those looking for an affordable switch with advanced Layer 3 features and flexibility to experiment with fiber optic connections in their home network.

Technical Specifications
cloud-router-switch-112-8p-4s-in-routero:
The hybrid solution for your Network.

The CRS112-8P-4S-IN is a Cloud Router Switch, a highly versatile device that combines the functionality of a full router with a managed Layer 3 switch, all powered by the robust RouterOS operating system. Equipped with 8 Gigabit PoE ports and 4 SFP ports for fiber optics, this switch is designed to be the flexible and powerful hub of any professional network.

Why Choose the CRS112-8P-4S-IN?

Extremely versatile PoE output

The 8 Gigabit ports offer flexible power options: 24V passive PoE or standard 802.3af/at (PoE/PoE+). The switch automatically detects the device type and provides the correct power. Use the included 28V power supply for passive PoE or add a 48-57V supply (not included) to the secondary DC input to power 802.3af/at equipment.

Hybrid copper and fiber connectivity

The combination of 8 RJ45 ports with 4 SFP ports offers the best of both worlds. Use the copper ports to connect your end devices such as computers, cameras and access points, while the SFP ports allow high-speed fiber optic uplinks to connect to other switches or to your network core.

The best of both worlds: router and switch

Powered by RouterOS, this device is not just a switch. It offers a dedicated menu with all the VLAN settings of a managed switch, port forwarding, MAC filtering, traffic mirroring, etc., but with the flexibility to remove any port from the switch configuration and use it for routing purposes.

Silent design and redundant power

Its fanless design ensures completely silent operation, making it ideal for installation in office environments. The presence of two DC inputs (one 18-28V and one 48-57V) allows for a secondary power supply configuration, ensuring greater redundancy and availability.

Ideal For who?

Small and medium business networks

Perfect for businesses that need a single device to manage the network, providing routing, switching and power to devices such as IP cameras, VoIP phones and Wi-Fi access points.

Installers and system integrators

A true "Swiss Army knife" for network professionals. Its ability to handle different PoE standards and combine routing with switching makes it a powerful tool for solving complex network challenges.

Advanced users

For technology enthusiasts who want deep control over their network, taking full advantage of the RouterOS Layer 3 feature set on a device with extensive port options.
cloud-router-switch-125-24g-1s-2hnd-in-r:
The perfect "All-in-One" for your office.

The MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS125-24G-1S-2HnD-IN is the ideal "all-in-one" solution for small and medium businesses and offices. This device combines the best features of a fully functional router, a 24-port Layer 3 switch and a high-power wireless access point, all in a single box. With 24 Gigabit ports, one SFP port and integrated Wi-Fi, it is the only device you need to manage your entire network.

Why Choose the CRS125-24G-1S-2HnD-IN?

3-in-1 functionality: Router, Switch and AP

Simplify your network infrastructure. The CRS125 works as a gateway for your Internet connection (Ethernet, Fiber or 4G with optional USB modem), as a 24-port Gigabit switch to connect all your wired devices and as a 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi access point for your wireless devices.

High port density with fiber uplink

With 24 Gigabit Ethernet ports, you have plenty of connectivity for all the computers, printers and servers in your office. The additional SFP port allows you to use a fiber optic module for a high-speed, long-distance uplink connection.

High-power Wi-Fi access point

The integrated 2.4 GHz 802.11n wireless access point, with its 4 dBi antennas, provides excellent Wi-Fi coverage for your office, allowing all your laptops and smartphones to connect to the network quickly and reliably.

The Power of RouterOS (Level 5)

With the RouterOS operating system and a Level 5 license, you can configure advanced routing, firewall, VPN and much more. You can configure the ports as a wire-speed switch or, if needed, use them for routing purposes, with full control over your network.

Ideal For Who?

Small and Medium Businesses (SOHO)

The perfect central solution for an office. Eliminates the need for separate router, switch and access point, simplifying management and reducing costs and space.

Offices with segmentation needs

Thanks to its Layer 3 and VLAN features, it is ideal for offices that need to separate different departments or create a guest network isolated from the company's main network.

Technical Specifications
cloud-router-switch-304-4xg-in-with-rout:
MikroTik CRS304-4XG-IN: Compact 4x10GbE switch, 1xGbE, Multiple power inputs.

The MikroTik CRS304-4XG-IN is a highly capable and surprisingly compact 10 Gigabit Ethernet switch, designed to simplify your high-speed network setups. Unlike many 10 Gigabit products that require additional SFP+ modules, the CRS304 is equipped with four ready-to-use 10 Gigabit RJ45 Ethernet ports that also support 1G/2.5G/5G speeds. It also includes an additional Gigabit Ethernet port, ideal for management purposes. One of its great advantages is the abundance of power input options, offering redundancy and flexibility with two DC jack inputs, a 2-pin terminal and PoE-in (802.3af/at) input. Its innovative design acts as a robust heat sink, enabling completely silent, fanless operation. With a 1200 MHz 64-bit dual-core ARM CPU, 512 MB of RAM and RouterOS v7 with Level 5 license, this switch delivers exceptional performance for its size and is a perfect solution for offices, home labs or even mobile applications requiring 10GbE connectivity.

Why Choose the MikroTik CRS304-4XG-IN?

Four 10 Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 ports

The CRS304-4XG-IN simplifies your entry into the 10GbE world, offering four RJ45 ports that support 10G, 5G, 2.5G, 1G and 100M speeds. This eliminates the need for SFP+ modules for 10G over copper connections, enabling a plug-and-play setup.

Multiple power input options with redundancy

Reliability is paramount. This switch offers four power input options: two DC inputs (12-57 V), one 2-pin terminal input (12-57 V) and PoE input (36-57 V, 802.3af/at) on the management port. The switch automatically selects the source with the highest voltage.

Innovative design with passive silent cooling

The CRS304 enclosure is not only durable and lightweight, but also functions as a large heat sink. This enables efficient cooling without the need for fans, resulting in completely silent operation, ideal for environments where noise is a concern.

RouterOS v7 Level 5 and ARM performance

Equipped with a 1200MHz 64-bit dual-core ARM CPU, 512MB of RAM and the powerful Marvell Prestera switch chip (98DX2528), the CRS304 delivers exceptional performance. With RouterOS v7 and a Level 5 license, you have access to advanced routing, firewall, VLANs, traffic mirroring, bandwidth limiting and even some hardware Layer 3 offloading features.

Versatile mounting and portability

Its compact and lightweight form factor, together with the DIN rail mounting bracket (DIN rail mount included on the side, movable to the rear) and standard mounting points, allow easy integration anywhere, from a desk to a rack or even a backpack for on-the-go networking needs.

Ideal For who?

The MikroTik CRS304-4XG-IN is ideal for:

Small offices and advanced home networks

Users looking for an affordable way to introduce 10 Gigabit Ethernet connectivity into their network, to connect NAS devices, home servers or high-performance workstations.

IT professionals and network enthusiasts

For those who need a compact and portable 10GbE switch with the flexibility of RouterOS for testing, lab work or as an on-the-go network troubleshooting tool.

Noise-Sensitive Environments

Thanks to its fanless design and passive cooling, it is perfect for offices, studios, libraries or anywhere silence is valued.

Installations with flexible power requirements

Scenarios where multiple power input options, including PoE input and redundancy, provide a significant advantage in ensuring service continuity.
cloud-router-switch-305-1g-4s-in-routero:
MikroTik CRS305-1G-4S+IN: Compact 4xSFP+ 10G switch, 1xGbE, Dual Boot.

The MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS305-1G-4S+IN is a compact yet extremely powerful switch that stands out for its four SFP+ ports capable of delivering connectivity of up to 10 Gbit per port. In addition to the fiber ports, it has one copper Gigabit Ethernet port for management access or network connection and two DC jack inputs for power redundancy. Housed in a sleek, compact and fanless metal enclosure, it guarantees completely silent operation. One of its most notable features is the "Dual Boot" capability, which allows the user to choose between two operating systems: RouterOS (with Level 5 license), for full Layer 3 routing and advanced switching features, or SwOS, for a simplified interface focused solely on switching functionality. At a competitive price, the CRS305-1G-4S+IN offers one of the best price-to-performance ratios on the market for those who need multiple 10G SFP+ ports in a compact form factor.

Why Choose the MikroTik CRS305-1G-4S+IN?

High density 10G SFP+ ports in a compact form factor

Offers four SFP+ ports, enabling multiple fiber optic connections at 10 Gbps or the use of 1.25 Gbps SFP modules. Ideal for high-speed aggregation or connecting servers and NAS devices that demand bandwidth, all in a small, robust metal chassis.

Dual boot flexibility: RouterOS or SwOS

The ability to choose between RouterOS (Level 5 License) and SwOS offers unmatched versatility. Use SwOS for straightforward, fast switch configuration via web interface. If you need routing, firewalls, VPNs or other advanced Layer 3 features, you can boot into RouterOS and use Winbox or other MikroTik management tools.

Power redundancy and silent operation

The device features two DC inputs (12-57V) for power redundancy, ensuring greater uptime. Its fanless design guarantees completely silent operation, ideal for offices or home environments.

High switching performance

With non-blocking throughput of 41 Gbps, switching capacity of 82 Gbps and forwarding rate of 61 Mpps, the CRS305-1G-4S+IN is ready to handle heavy traffic on its high-speed ports.

Versatile power supply via PoE-In

In addition to the DC jack inputs, the Gigabit Ethernet port also supports PoE input (passive or 802.3af/at, 12-57V), providing another option for powering the switch and simplifying installation in locations where a power outlet is not conveniently available.

Ideal For who?

The MikroTik CRS305-1G-4S+IN is ideal for:

Small and medium offices or advanced home networks

Users who need a compact switch with multiple 10G SFP+ ports to connect servers, NAS or other high-speed switches, and who appreciate the flexibility of dual boot.

Small-scale Internet Service Providers (ISPs)

For customer aggregation or as a small distribution switch at points of presence (PoPs) where 10G SFP+ port density in a compact, silent form factor is advantageous.

Test labs and network enthusiasts

For those looking for an affordable 10G SFP+ switch with all the features of RouterOS Level 5 for experimentation, learning or for high-performance home networks.

Environments requiring silent operation

Its fanless design makes it perfect for installation in offices, studios or homes where noise from network equipment is undesirable.

Offers 16 Gigabit Ethernet ports, 8 of which with PoE+ output (802.3af/at) with a total budget of 150W. Additionally, it features 2 10G SFP+ ports for high-speed fiber connections, a dedicated management port, and a USB 3.0 port for extra storage.

Integrated dual-band Wi-Fi 6

This all-in-one switch also includes a dual-band Wi-Fi 6 access point with 4x4 MIMO technology, providing fast and reliable wireless connectivity. It is the perfect solution for simplifying server room or office configuration, eliminating the need for a separate access point.

High reliability and security

Designed for continuous operation, the CRS418 features two AC power inputs for redundancy. The RouterOS operating system (Level 5 License) offers full control over your network, with VLANs, ACLs, SNMP, advanced monitoring, and much more.

Ideal For Whom?

Small and medium-sized offices

The perfect "all-in-one" solution for managing an entire office network. It powers access points and CCTV cameras, connects workstations and servers, provides fast Wi-Fi, and manages Internet connection routing.

System administrators and IT professionals

For those looking for a single versatile device to replace multiple units, simplifying cable management and network configuration, with the full flexibility of RouterOS.

Technical Specifications
cloud-router-switch-418-8p-8g-2s-rm-rout:
The option that does more. Router that does it all.

The MikroTik CRS418-8P-8G-2S+RM is a true multitasking champion, designed to replace a jungle of devices with a single intelligent unit. It combines a 16-port Gigabit switch, a powerful router with Layer 3 features, 8 PoE output ports, and 10G fiber uplinks, all in a 1U rack format. It is the ultimate solution for those seeking performance, versatility, and clean cable management, at an unbeatable price.

Why Choose the MikroTik CRS418?

CPU performance for real routing

Equipped with a powerful 2.2 GHz quad-core ARM CPU, the CRS418 has 3x more processing power than previous models such as the CRS328. This means it has sufficient capacity to handle routing tasks, complex firewall rules, and even function as a CAPsMAN controller for your access points.

16 Gigabit Ports with PoE output

Simplify your infrastructure. The CRS418 features 16 Gigabit Ethernet ports. Eight of these ports offer PoE output (802.3af/at and 24V Passive), with a total power budget of 150W. It is perfect for directly powering your access points, IP surveillance cameras, and VoIP phones, eliminating the need for multiple PoE injectors.

10G SFP+ high-speed uplinks

The two 10G SFP+ ports provide a high-speed backbone for your network. Use them to connect to servers, NAS storage systems, a core router, or a fiber connection from your Internet provider, ensuring there are no bottlenecks in your network.

High availability with redundant power supplies

Designed for maximum reliability, the CRS418 comes equipped with two redundant AC power supplies. If one supply fails, the other takes over instantly, ensuring your network remains operational and uninterrupted.

Ideal For Whom?

Small and Medium Offices

The perfect "all-in-one" solution to serve as router, firewall, switch, and central PoE controller for an office, simplifying management and reducing the number of required devices.

Video surveillance and Wi-Fi installations

With 8 PoE output ports and 10G uplinks, it is the ideal access switch for connecting and powering a large number of high-resolution IP security cameras and Wi-Fi access points, ensuring video and data traffic flows without congestion.

Advanced users and "Home Labs"

For enthusiasts looking for a single device that offers the flexibility of a Layer 3 switch, the convenience of PoE output, and the performance of a powerful router, all managed by the versatile RouterOS v7 operating system.

cloud-router-switch-510-8xs-2xq-in-in-de:
The essential upgrade for your 100G network.

The time has come to upgrade your 10 or 25 Gigabit network. The MikroTik CRS510-8XS-2XQ-IN is a versatile 100 Gigabit switch joining the MikroTik high-performance family. Designed to be the centerpiece of virtually any setup, this device combines two 100G QSFP28 ports and eight 25G SFP28 ports, delivering cutting-edge connectivity, value, and energy efficiency in a compact form factor.

Why choose the CRS510?

Versatile and backward-compatible connectivity

The combination of 100G and 25G ports ensures a perfect fit in any server room. Thanks to full backward compatibility, this switch supports 40G, 25G, 10G and even 1G equipment, enabling a smooth transition and protecting your investment. Save time, money, and simplify your infrastructure.

Redundancy and failsafe power

The CRS510 was built to run without interruptions. It comes equipped with two hot-swap power supplies and offers multiple redundant power options: PoE input (802.3bt), a DC Jack input, and a 2-pin terminal. Say goodbye to unnecessary downtime.

Datacenter performance

At the heart of the CRS510 is the powerful Marvell Prestera switch chip, capable of handling the most demanding tasks without overloading power consumption. With support for VLANs, ACLs, MLAG, Jumbo Frames, and even L3 Hardware Offloading, it is ready for the most complex scenarios, consuming a maximum of 27 W (without peripherals).

Ideal for whom?

Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and datacenters

The density of 25G ports for distribution and 100G ports for uplink or aggregation, combined with power redundancy and L3 hardware offload support, make it the ideal choice for mission-critical environments.

Businesses in the upgrade phase

Companies looking to evolve their 10G or 25G infrastructure will find in the CRS510 a logical and cost-effective upgrade path. Backward compatibility ensures that existing equipment continues to operate seamlessly.

Demanding network administrators

For those where reliability is non-negotiable. Hot-swap power supplies and multiple power inputs guarantee service continuity. The inclusion of the classic RJ45 console port provides an essential emergency management tool.

cloud-router-switch-520-4xs-16xq-rm-rout:
The future of enterprise networking, today.

The MikroTik CRS520-4XS-16XQ-RM is an ultra-fast enterprise switch that represents the state of the art in networking technology. This device combines an unprecedented 100 Gigabit port density with the processing power of a CCR-series CPU, offering the best price per 100G port on the market. It is the definitive solution for complex corporate networks, data centers, and multimedia studios that need to replace multiple devices with a single high-capacity solution.

Why choose the MikroTik CRS520?

Extreme port density

This switch is ready for any connectivity challenge. It offers 16 100G QSFP28 ports, 4 25G SFP28 ports, and two 10G Ethernet ports, providing enormous versatility and expansion capacity for your network.

More than a switch, with a CCR CPU

Why does a switch need a powerful quad-core 2 GHz ARM CPU? To be more than just a switch. The CRS520 can run OSPF/BGP, firewalls, VPNs and, most importantly, routing with L3 hardware offloading, combining the speed of a switch with the intelligence of a router.

High availability

Designed for continuous, uninterrupted operation, the CRS520 is equipped with two power supplies and four hot-swap fans. This means you can replace a faulty component without having to shut down the switch — an essential feature for mission-critical environments.

Energy and environmental efficiency

Despite its enormous power, the CRS520 is surprisingly efficient, with a maximum power consumption without accessories of just 123W. Good for your wallet and for the planet.

Ideal for whom?

Data centers and large-scale enterprise networks

As a core or aggregation switch, its density of 100G and 25G ports makes it perfect for being the hub of a high-speed network infrastructure, connecting multiple racks and access switches.

Multimedia and video production studios

Where 8K video file transfers and other high-bandwidth workloads demand ultra-low-latency, high-capacity networks between workstations and central storage.

Any network requiring maximum performance

For any organisation building a future-ready network that demands maximum switching capacity and advanced routing features, without subscription or licensing costs.

Technical Specifications
cloud-router-switch-crs310-1g-5s-4s-out-:
Your fiber network, without distance limits.

The MikroTik netFiber 9 is a powerful outdoor switch, designed to create fiber optic networks that can even perform routing tasks. As the spiritual successor to the popular FiberBox, this switch comes in a rugged enclosure and is equipped with a wide range of SFP and SFP+ ports, making it the ideal tool for those working with fiber connections exceeding 100 metres.

Why choose the MikroTik netFiber 9?

High-density fiber ports

netFiber 9 is ready for your fiber connections. It offers five 1G SFP ports and four 10G SFP+ ports for your high-speed connections. Fiber optics is the perfect alternative to copper when distances are long or when immunity to electromagnetic interference and tampering is desired.

Robust performance

Equipped with a powerful ARM v7 CPU and an advanced Marvell switch chip, the netFiber 9 can handle the heaviest traffic loads. The Gigabit Ethernet port has a direct connection to the switch chip, allowing you to take full advantage of maximum speed, whether for management or as an additional data port.

Rugged construction for outdoor environments

Its sturdy enclosure provides excellent protection in environments with dust and occasional water splashes, making it perfect for outdoor installations with some coverage, such as under a roof or inside a simple cabinet. The large heat sink on the rear ensures exceptional cooling.

Multiple power options

For maximum flexibility in hard-to-reach installations, the netFiber 9 can be powered via the traditional DC connector or directly through its Gigabit Ethernet port, with PoE input (802.3af/at).

Ideal for whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

As a fiber aggregation switch on a communications tower, connecting multiple radios or sectors and creating a 10G uplink to the rest of the network.

Campus networks and inter-building connections

Creating a fiber optic distribution network, connecting multiple buildings over long distances with the speed and reliability of fiber and the routing capabilities of RouterOS.

Technical Specifications
cloud-router-switch-crs318-16p-2s-out-ne:
Power all your access points, anywhere.

Powering multiple access points or IP cameras on a tower has never been easier. The MikroTik netPower 16P is an 18-port outdoor switch that offers 16 Gigabit Ethernet ports with PoE output and two SFP+ ports for 10G fiber uplinks. Its rugged and compact enclosure allows it to be mounted in all types of environments, from attics and elevator shafts to towers and poles.

Why choose the netPower 16P?

16 ports with PoE output

The netPower 16P is a powerhouse. Its 16 Gigabit Ethernet ports support PoE output (passive auto-detection and 802.3af/at), allowing you to power a large number of access points, IP cameras or other devices directly from the switch, drastically simplifying cabling on your tower or installation.

10G SFP+ fiber uplinks

In addition to its power capacity, this switch is ready for high speed. The two SFP+ ports offer 10G fiber optic uplinks, ensuring a fast, bottleneck-free backhaul connection to the rest of your network, even with 16 devices connected.

Intelligent dual power input

The netPower 16P has two DC jack inputs. You can use low-voltage (18-30 V) and high-voltage (48-57 V) power supplies simultaneously. The switch will automatically detect what type of device is connected to each port and provide the correct PoE voltage (passive low-voltage or 802.3af/at).

Non-blocking performance

With a non-blocking throughput of 36 Gbps and a switching capacity of 72 Gbps, the netPower 16P ensures all traffic flows at maximum speed, without congestion, even with all ports in use.

Ideal for whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

The perfect solution for installation atop a tower. Allows connecting and powering multiple sectors or point-to-point radios and aggregating all traffic into a 10G fiber uplink.

Large-scale video surveillance installations

For connecting and powering a large number of IP security cameras spread across a perimeter or car park, centralising all connections into a single rugged outdoor switch.

Technical Specifications
cloud-router-switch-crs318-1fi-15fr-2s-o:
Cut costs, not speed. Choose GPEN over GPON.

With MikroTik's netPower 15FR switch, you can forget about expensive GPON base stations and optical splitters. This switch is part of our GPEN (Gigabit Passive Ethernet Network) concept, designed to bring the speed and versatility of fiber networking while leveraging the advantages of Ethernet. It is an easy-to-deploy, low-cost way for any ISP to provide Internet to individual apartments, powering the switch at the customer's own premises.

Why choose the netPower 15FR?

15 ports with reverse PoE

Do not worry about power options in the attic or utility room. The netPower 15FR has 15 reverse PoE input ports. Depending on your configuration, the netPower can obtain the required power from a single customer! Port 15 Ethernet can also power other PoE-compatible devices with the same voltage applied to the unit.

Fiber connectivity with dual SFP ports

There are two SFP ports for fiber connectivity. The outdoor enclosure allows you to install this switch in all types of environments — from damp attics to elevator shafts and poles with cable ties.

Dual boot: RouterOS or SwOS

Get the best of both worlds. For quick, switching-focused configuration, use SwOS. If you need Layer 3 routing features such as firewalls, NAT or VPNs, you can boot the device with the powerful RouterOS operating system (License Level 5).

Ideal for whom?

Internet Service Providers (ISPs)

The primary application. The most cost-effective and efficient way to bring Internet to apartment buildings, eliminating the complexity and cost of a GPON infrastructure.

Condominium networks

Creating a centralised distribution network, where each apartment or house contributes to powering the central switch through PoE injectors.

Technical Specifications
cloud-smart-switch-24g-and-2-sfp-1u-rack:
The perfect combination of price and performance.

The MikroTik Cloud Smart Switch CSS326-24G-2S+RM is a 24-port Gigabit Ethernet switch with two SFP+ ports for 10G uplinks, offering wire-speed connectivity with a set of new switching features. Managed by the SwOS operating system, specifically designed for MikroTik switches, this equipment offers the best price-to-performance ratio on the market for enterprise and lab networks.

Why choose the CSS326-24G-2S+RM?

Wire-speed performance with 10G uplinks

Connect your devices with 24 Gigabit Ethernet ports and use the two SFP+ ports for 10 Gigabit uplinks to your server or core network. This switch offers non-blocking switching capacity, ensuring maximum performance on all ports simultaneously.

Simplified management with SwOS

SwOS is configurable from your browser and offers access to all basic features of a managed switch and more. It allows you to manage port-to-port forwarding, apply MAC filters, configure VLANs, mirror traffic, limit bandwidth, and even adjust some fields in MAC and IP headers.

Enterprise-level features

This switch is equipped with a complete set of Layer 2 features, including support for up to 250 VLANs, port isolation, broadcast storm control, link aggregation (LACP), Rapid Spanning Tree protocol and much more, providing robust control over your network.

Ideal for whom?

Small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs)

As a core or access switch for an office, offering high Gigabit port density for workstations and 10G uplinks for connecting to servers or other switches, at an unbeatable price.

Home labs and power users

For technology enthusiasts looking for a switch with 10G SFP+ ports to connect their NAS or server and with SwOS management features to professionally segment their home network.

cloud-smart-switch-610-8p-2s-in-with-swi:
CSS610-8P-2S+IN: MikroTik SwOS Switch with 8x PoE+ GbE, 2x 10G SFP+ (140W).

The MikroTik CSS610-8P-2S+IN is a highly versatile and affordable cloud smart switch, ideal for a wide variety of network scenarios, from home networks and small offices to hotels and call centers. This switch combines eight Gigabit Ethernet ports with PoE output capability (802.3af/at compliant) and a generous total PoE power budget of 140 W, along with two 10 Gigabit SFP+ ports for high-speed fiber optic uplinks. Managed by the lightweight and easy-to-use SwOS operating system, the CSS610-8P-2S+IN can be configured directly through a web browser. It is a powerful and cost-effective switching solution that delivers essential Layer 2 management features and excellent PoE power capacity for multiple devices. The switch includes an internal AC power supply and rack-mounting ears.

Why Choose the MikroTik CSS610-8P-2S+IN?

PoE+ Gigabit Connectivity and 10G SFP+ Uplinks

Its eight Gigabit Ethernet ports can deliver PoE/PoE+ power (802.3af/at standard) to compatible devices such as access points, IP cameras, or VoIP phones. The two 10 Gbps SFP+ ports ensure fast uplinks to servers or to the network core.

High-Budget 140 W PoE

With a total PoE budget of 140 W distributed across 8 ports, this switch is capable of powering multiple PoE/PoE+ devices simultaneously. This makes it suitable for scenarios with a considerable concentration of equipment that requires power over Ethernet.

Simplified Management with Web-Based SwOS

SwOS is MikroTik's lightweight operating system for switches, offering all the essential functionality of a managed switch through a simple and intuitive web interface. It allows you to manage per-port routing, broadcast storm control, apply MAC filters, configure VLANs, mirror traffic, apply bandwidth limits, and even adjust some fields in MAC and IP headers.

Versatile Design with Built-in AC Power

Its compact form factor and the inclusion of rack ears make it versatile for various installation types. The built-in universal AC power supply (100-240V) simplifies the connection and deployment of the switch.

Ideal for Multiple Scenarios

This switch is an excellent choice for advanced home networks, small offices, and also for more demanding applications such as hotels, conference centers, or call centers. It is perfect for powering a cluster of network cameras or managing a cluster of wireless access points.

Ideal For Whom?

The MikroTik CSS610-8P-2S+IN is ideal for:

Small and Medium Businesses (SMBs)

Businesses that need a reliable switch with multiple PoE+ ports to power their access points, phones, and cameras, and that benefit from 10G uplinks for connecting to servers or core switches.

Hotels, Offices, and Call Centers

Environments that require powering a considerable number of PoE devices, such as IP phones at every workstation or access points to ensure full Wi-Fi coverage, and that value simplified network management.

IP Surveillance Deployments

For powering and aggregating traffic from a set of IP network cameras, using the 10G SFP+ ports for high-speed connection to the recording system (NVR) or to the cloud.

Networks with Multiple Wireless Access Points

Ideal for concentrating and powering multiple wireless access points while simultaneously providing a robust, high-speed connection to the company's or institution's main network.

Users Looking for an Affordable PoE Solution with 10G

For those who need the combination of a solid PoE power budget and 10G SFP+ uplinks, without the complexity or cost of Layer 3 switches or full RouterOS systems, opting for the simplicity of SwOS.
din-rail-mounting-bracket-for-ltap-mini-:
The professional mounting solution for your LtAP.

The MikroTik DINrail PRO (DRP-LTM) is a mounting adapter designed specifically to allow a clean, secure, and professional installation of the MikroTik LtAP device on any standard DIN rail. This robust accessory is the perfect solution for integrating your LtAP into network cabinets, industrial control panels, or equipment racks, ensuring superior organization and reliability.

Why choose the DRP-LTM bracket?

Clean and Standardized Installation

Elevate your installation to a new level of professionalism. DIN rail mounting lets you organize your LtAP neatly alongside other modules, such as power supplies, circuit breakers, or other automation equipment, resulting in a clean, easy-to-maintain control panel.

Perfect and Secure Fit

As an official MikroTik accessory, the DRP-LTM was meticulously designed for the LtAP, ensuring a perfect fit and completely secure fastening. Avoid improvised solutions and ensure that your equipment stays firmly in place, protected against vibrations and accidental displacement.

Panel Space Optimization

DIN rail mounting is an industry standard precisely because of its space management efficiency. The DRP-LTM allows you to mount the LtAP compactly, optimizing the arrangement of components inside your electrical and communications cabinet or panel.

Robust Construction

Made with high-quality materials, this bracket was built to be durable and reliable. Its robust construction ensures it can safely support the LtAP device throughout its entire service life, even in the most demanding environments.

Ideal For Whom?

The MikroTik DRP-LTM bracket is the ideal choice for:

System Integrators and Electricians

Professionals who install equipment in industrial control panels, automation systems, or electrical panels, where DIN rail mounting is the standard fastening method.

Network Administrators

For mounting an LtAP device in a server rack or communications cabinet equipped with DIN rails.

Any LtAP User

Any individual or company that uses the MikroTik LtAP and needs a more permanent, secure, and professional mounting solution than simply placing the equipment on a shelf.

Technical Specifications
dual-band-2-4-5ghz-omni-antenna-with-rp-:
Dual-band. High gain. The perfect combination for NetMetal ac². Outdoor design.

The HGO-antenna-OUT is Mikrotik's screw-on "dipole" (omnidirectional) antenna, designed for dual-band (2.4/5GHz) performance in outdoor environments. With a male RP-SMA connector, it is the plug-and-play solution for building powerful outdoor APs. Its design offers a solid gain of 3.3 dBi at 2.4 GHz and an excellent gain of 5.5 to 7.1 dBi at 5 GHz.

Why Choose the HGO-antenna-OUT?

Optimized for Dual-Band (High 5 GHz Gain)

This antenna is not a compromise. While it offers good performance at 2.4 GHz (3.3 dBi), it shines at 5 GHz, where the gain reaches 7.1 dBi. This maximizes the range and performance of the Wi-Fi 5 (AC) band.

The Perfect Pair for NetMetal ac²

This antenna was designed for a specific application: simply screw two HGO-antenna-OUT antennas onto your NetMetal ac² (RBD23UGS-5HPacD2HPnD) to instantly transform it into a robust, high-performance outdoor 2x2 MIMO dual-band access point (AP).

Robust Screw-On Design (RP-SMA)

Built for outdoor environments, this antenna is weatherproof. Its male RP-SMA connector (the standard for most "connectorized" APs) allows for a direct and secure installation with no pigtails.

Ideal For Which Scenarios?

This antenna is the ideal choice for:

Outdoor APs (Hotspots) with NetMetal ac²

The #1 application. Create powerful dual-band Wi-Fi access points at campsites, marinas, parks, or anywhere on campus.

Upgrading "Connectorized" APs

Replace the stock antennas on any outdoor access point (such as a BaseBox 2/5) that has female RP-SMA connectors, to add dual-band capability (if the radio supports it) or to improve gain.
fiber-to-copper-converter-ftc-rbftc11:
The reliable bridge between fiber and copper.

The MikroTik RBFTC11, also known as FTC, is a highly robust media converter (Fiber to Copper) designed to convert a fiber optic signal into a copper Ethernet connection (RJ45). Its waterproof enclosure and secure mounting system make it the ideal solution for bringing fiber connectivity to any point, even in outdoor and exposed locations.

Why choose the RBFTC11?

Simple Gigabit Conversion

This converter performs an essential task flawlessly: it receives a fiber connection through its 1.25G SFP port and delivers a standard copper connection through the 10/100/1000 Ethernet port. It is the ideal plug-and-play solution for integrating Ethernet devices into a fiber optic network.

Flexible Power via PoE

Forget about needing a power outlet near the converter. The RBFTC11 supports Power over Ethernet (802.3af/at) with a wide voltage range (12-57V). This feature drastically simplifies installation, allowing the converter to be powered through a PoE switch or injector located meters away.

Robust Outdoor Construction

The RBFTC11 was built to last in any environment. Its enclosure is fully waterproof and designed to operate reliably in extreme temperatures, from -40°C to +70°C. The mounting system is secure, with an internal screw that makes unauthorized access difficult.

Low Power Consumption

With a maximum power consumption of just 3 watts, this converter is extremely efficient, minimizing its impact on your power infrastructure and contributing to more economical and eco-friendly operation.

Ideal For Whom?

Internet Service Providers (ISPs)

Perfect for FTTH (Fiber to the Home) installations, where it is necessary to convert the fiber optic signal to a copper Ethernet connection at the customer's home or office, at a point external to the building.

IP Video Surveillance Installations

For connecting IP cameras to a fiber network. It allows you to leverage the long distances of fiber and convert the signal close to the camera, in an outdoor location, simplifying cabling and power supply.

Corporate and University Networks

Technical Specifications
fiberbox-plus-with-routeros-l5-license-c:
The best choice for outdoor fiber networks.

The FiberBox Plus is a major upgrade to MikroTik's popular FiberBox line. This version comes equipped with a modern ARM CPU, more RAM, and most importantly, four 10 Gigabit SFP+ ports. It is the ideal low-cost, high-reliability solution for connecting your mast-mounted devices, such as access points or CPEs. With a robust IP66 enclosure, multiple power options, and the flexibility of dual-boot, your connection will always be secure.

Why choose the FiberBox Plus?

Four 10G SFP+ Ports

This rugged outdoor switch is perfect for connecting your mast-mounted devices. With four 10G ports, you can connect, for example, a mANTBox base station, use two ports to connect customer CPEs, and still have one port free for future expansion. The 10G connectivity ensures there will be no bottlenecks in your network.

Robust Outdoor Construction (IP66)

No need to worry about extra junction boxes. The FiberBox Plus has a solid IP66 water resistance rating. This means it is protected against powerful jets of water from any direction, making it weatherproof and perfect for locations such as wet basements, elevator shafts, or port infrastructure.

Dual Boot: RouterOS or SwOS

Get the best of both worlds. For quick, switching-focused configuration, use SwOS. If you need Layer 3 routing features, such as firewalls, NAT, or VPNs, you can boot the device with the powerful RouterOS operating system (Level 5 license).

Multiple Power Options

For maximum flexibility in hard-to-reach installations, the FiberBox Plus offers 3 power options: through the traditional DC connector, a 2-pin terminal, or via Power over Ethernet (PoE-in 802.3af/at) on its Gigabit Ethernet port.

Ideal For Whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

The best solution for use as an aggregation switch on towers and poles, enabling the connection of multiple radios and sectors, plus the ability to create 10G uplinks to the rest of the network.

Campus Networks and Building Interconnections

Create an outdoor fiber optic distribution network, connecting multiple buildings over long distances with the speed and reliability of fiber.

Technical Specifications
gigabit-passive-ethernet-repeater-gper:
Break the 100-meter barrier Network and PoE.

The MikroTik GPeR (Gigabit Passive Ethernet Repeater) is a network extender designed to solve one of the biggest problems with Ethernet: the 100-meter limit. This compact and robust unit is powered by PoE (PoE input) and acts as a repeater, regenerating the Gigabit signal and retransmitting PoE power (PoE output) to the next device, allowing you to daisy-chain up to 1,500 meters.

Why choose the MikroTik GPeR?

Ethernet and PoE Extender (up to 1,500 m)

The GPeR allows you to extend an Ethernet cable in additional hops. It can add 100-150 m to a normal network device or up to 210 m when connected to another GPeR. By daisy-chaining multiple GPeR units, you can reach a total distance of up to 1,500 meters.

PoE Passthrough (802.3af/at)

No local power supply needed. The GPeR is powered by PoE input (802.3af/at, 24-57V) and passes PoE through the output to the next device (camera, AP, or another GPeR). If the end device is not PoE, the passthrough can be disabled by removing the internal jumpers.

Robust Design (Industrial)

The GPeR is not a simple plastic repeater. It is built for harsh environments, with a tested operating temperature range of -40°C to 70°C, ideal for installation in outdoor enclosures or non-climate-controlled cabinets.

Gigabit Performance

Despite extending the distance, the GPeR maintains full 10/100/1000 Mbps (Gigabit) performance, ensuring that your remote devices (such as 4K cameras or Wi-Fi 6 access points) receive the bandwidth they need.

Ideal For Whom?

High-Rise and Multi-Unit Buildings

As suggested by MikroTik, it is perfect for tall multi-story buildings where the distance from the PoE switch in the central rack (IDF) to the AP in the rooftop corridor exceeds 100m.

CCTV Installations and WISPs

Essential for surveillance camera installers (CCTV) or for WISPs (Internet Service Providers). It allows you to bring a PoE connection to a camera or radio on a distant pole, warehouse, or gate, without the need for local power.

Technical Specifications

The MikroTik GESP+POE-IN is a 2-in-1 device that combines a passive PoE injector with a high-efficiency surge protector. Designed to be the secure connection bridge between your indoor switches and your outdoor antennas, this device not only powers your equipment via PoE, but also protects your network from damage caused by lightning and current spikes. With its new IP67 weatherproof enclosure, it is a piece of security and peace of mind for your infrastructure.

Why choose the GESP+POE-IN?

2-in-1 Functionality: PoE Injector + Protection

Simplify your installation. The GESP+POE-IN performs two critical functions: it injects passive PoE power into your network cable to power your outdoor radio or camera, and at the same time, protects the switch port from electrical surges that may come from the cable.

Robust Surge Protection

This small device can make all the difference during a storm or when static electricity builds up. It is designed to absorb multiple strikes and protect your network from costly damage, withstanding discharges of up to 3kA.

Weatherproof Enclosure (IP67)

The new revision of this device comes sealed in an IP67-rated enclosure. This means it is fully dust-proof and can be submerged in water, ensuring maximum durability and reliability even in the most adverse outdoor environments.

Ideal For Whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

A low-cost addition to every installation that increases network reliability, protects switches at the point of presence (PoP), and ensures correct power delivery to customer CPEs.

lhg-5-outdoor-light-device-27dbi-l3-rblh:

The LHG XL HP5 (RBLHG-5HPnD-XL) is the "heavy-duty" version of the LHG series for 5 GHz (802.11a/n) connections. It combines the larger grid antenna (XL - 550mm) with a High Power radio. Wind Stability (Grid)

The 550 mm grid design allows wind to pass through the antenna, drastically reducing the load on the tower and preventing misalignment, which is critical when operating such narrow signal beams over long distances.

Integrated Design (Zero Loss)

mikrotik-57v-0-8a-45-6w-power-supply-gpe:
57V Power. Maximum Distance. The Foundation of the GPEN Concept.

The MT48-570080-11DG is Mikrotik's high-voltage power supply, delivering 57V / 0.8A (45.6W). This power supply is the centrepiece of the GPEN (Gigabit Passive Ethernet Network) concept. Its 57V voltage (the maximum limit for passive PoE) is specifically designed to maximize distance over very long network cables, counteracting voltage loss ("voltage drop") and enabling the powering of multiple GPER repeaters along the way.


Why choose this power supply?

Optimized for the GPEN concept

This power supply is the recommended solution for powering your GPEN units (such as netPower) and ensuring that the entire chain of GPER extenders and client units (GPER) receives the necessary power.

Maximum voltage (57V) for maximum distance

By sending 57V through the cable (instead of 24V or 48V), this power supply ensures that even after hundreds of metres (with GPERs along the way), the voltage reaching the final equipment is sufficient to power it. It is the solution for carrying Ethernet and power far beyond the usual 100m.

High power (45.6W)

With 0.8A of current, this power supply has enough capacity to power not only the final device, but also the various repeaters/extenders (GPER) you may have along the way, as described in the GPEN topology.


Ideal For which scenarios?

This power supply is the ideal choice for:

GPEN Deployments

The recommended power supply for connecting to central units (such as netPower) to distribute power across your GPEN network.

802.3at (PoE+) Power

The 57V voltage falls within the 802.3at (PoE+) specification, making it also an excellent option for powering PoE+ switches or APs that are at the cable distance limit.

Get reliable, long-range 360° coverage for your LoRaWAN gateways (MikroTik or others) with this practical and robust kit.

360° omnidirectional coverage at 868 MHz

Complete installation kit

Maritime and Coastal Projects

The essential bridge to your external antenna.

The MikroTik ACSMAUFL pigtail is a high-quality adapter cable designed to be the connection bridge between your internal radio modules and your external antennas. This cable converts the small U.FL connector, common in modems (LTE, LoRa) and radio boards, into a robust SMA female connector, allowing you to dramatically improve the performance of your system by using a high-gain external antenna.

Add an external antenna

Industry-standard connectors

Gigabit speeds with LTE Category 18

Router and network card in one

25 Gigabit connectivity

mikrotik-cloud-core-router-ccr2116-12g-4:

The MikroTik CCR2116-12G-4S+ represents a new level of performance in the Cloud Core Router family, combining the reliability of 10G networking with the power of a modern 16-core ARM CPU. mikrotik-routerboard-5-gigabit-switch-sf:
MikroTik RB260GSP (CSS106-1G-4P-1S): SOHO Switch 5xGbE (4x PoE out) and SFP.

The MikroTik RB260GSP (also known by product code CSS106-1G-4P-1S) is a compact and efficient switch, ideal for SOHO (Small Office/Home Office) environments that require Gigabit connectivity and Power over Ethernet (PoE) capability. This device features five Gigabit Ethernet ports and one SFP cage for fiber optic connections. Four of its Ethernet ports (Ether2 to Ether5) provide passive PoE output, capable of powering other compatible devices at the same voltage applied to the unit (up to 1A per port, 2A total). The RB260GSP runs the SwOS operating system, designed specifically for MikroTik switch products, which is configurable through a simple web browser. SwOS offers all the basic functionality of a managed switch, including port-to-port forwarding management, MAC filter enforcement, VLAN configuration, traffic mirroring, bandwidth limiting, and even adjustment of some fields in MAC and IP headers. With flexible power input via DC jack or passive PoE input on Ether1, the RB260GSP is a practical and cost-effective solution for small networks.

Why Choose the MikroTik RB260GSP?

Gigabit connectivity with passive PoE output

Features five Gigabit Ethernet ports. Ports Ether2 to Ether5 can supply passive PoE power to other devices, such as access points, IP cameras, or other compatible equipment, at a maximum of 1A per port and 2A total, using the same input voltage as the switch (11-30V).

SFP port for fiber connection

The dedicated SFP cage allows Gigabit fiber optic connections, ideal for long-distance uplinks or for interconnecting with other switches/network segments that use fiber, with support for DDMI (Digital Diagnostics Monitoring Interface) with compatible SFP modules.

Simplified management with SwOS

The SwOS operating system is configurable through any web browser and offers an essential set of manageable switch functionalities. It allows managing port-to-port routing, applying MAC filters, configuring VLANs, mirroring traffic, applying bandwidth limiting, among others.

Flexible power input (DC jack or PoE input)

The RB260GSP can be powered through a standard DC connector (11-30V) or via passive PoE on the Ether1 port (11-30V), offering installation flexibility, especially in locations where power outlets are scarce.

Compact and efficient design

With its small dimensions and passive cooling, this switch is ideal for office or home environments where space and silence matter. Its maximum power consumption (with PoE outputs) is 53W.

Ideal for whom?

The MikroTik RB260GSP is ideal for:

Home and small office (SOHO) networks

Users who need a compact and economical switch with a few PoE ports to power access points, IP phones, or small cameras, and who benefit from an SFP port for uplink.

Small-scale WISP installations

To provide passive PoE connectivity and power to CPEs or small radios at customer premises or small repeater points.

Network expansion with PoE power

To add Gigabit ports and passive PoE capability to an existing network, especially in locations where a larger switch is not practical or necessary.

Budget-optimized deployments

A manageable switching solution with PoE output and SFP port that is very competitive in terms of price, ideal for deployments that require essential functionality without a large investment.

mikrotik-css610-1gi-7r-2s-out-netpower-l:
The revolution in Internet distribution.

The MikroTik netPower Lite 7R is an outdoor switch that is a game-changer for Internet Service Providers (ISPs). This equipment is part of MikroTik's innovative GPEN (Gigabit Passive Ethernet Network) concept, designed to offer the speed and versatility of fiber but with the simplicity and low cost of Ethernet. With 7 Gigabit Reverse PoE ports and 2 x 10G SFP+ uplinks, it is the definitive solution for delivering high-speed internet to apartments and buildings efficiently.

Why choose the netPower Lite 7R?

Innovative power with Reverse PoE

The great advantage of this switch is its power supply. The 7 input ports use Reverse PoE, meaning the switch is powered by PoE injectors located at each customer's premises. You can draw the necessary power from a single customer, eliminating the need for complex electrical installations outside the building. For added flexibility, it also features a DC jack input and a 2-pin terminal.

10 Gbps uplinks for maximum performance

The netPower Lite 7R is no ordinary switch. It is equipped with two SFP+ ports that support 10 Gbps fiber connections. This allows you to create an ultra-high-speed backhaul for your network, ensuring there is more than enough bandwidth to serve all connected customers without bottlenecks.

Low-cost alternative to GPON

Say goodbye to costly GPON base stations and optical splitters. The GPEN concept allows the use of Ethernet-based infrastructure, which is easier to install and manage, offering a highly efficient solution for delivering internet to apartments at a much lower cost.

Robust outdoor enclosure (IP54)

Its rugged, weatherproof enclosure (IP54) allows installation in a wide variety of environments. It can be mounted on poles, walls, elevator shafts, or damp attics, operating reliably at temperatures from -40°C to +70°C.

Ideal for whom?

Internet Service Providers (ISPs)

It is the preferred product for ISPs looking for a cost-effective and scalable way to deliver fiber/Ethernet services to customers in multi-dwelling units (MDUs).

Network Installers in Residential Buildings

Perfect for creating a centralized distribution network outside a residential building, where each home or apartment feeds the central unit.

mikrotik-css610-8p-2s-out-netpower-lite-:

mikrotik-cube-60pro-ac-cubeg-5ac60ay:
Fiber speed, without cable hassles.

Gone are the days of depending on cables for speed and stability. The MikroTik Cube 60Pro ac is a next-generation 60 GHz CPE designed to take the benefits of 60 GHz technology to a new level with the 802.11ay standard. Why choose the Cube 60Pro ac?

Ultra-high-speed point-to-point connections

The 60 GHz frequency, combined with the 802.11ay standard, delivers a connection with the speed and stability of optical fiber. It is the ideal solution for creating a "bridge" between two locations, capable of maintaining a reliable link over 2.4 kilometers.

Automatic 5 GHz failover for maximum reliability

Don't worry about bad weather. The 60 GHz radio can be affected by heavy rain, but the Cube 60Pro ac includes a 5 GHz backup radio with a powerful directional antenna that automatically takes over. This ensures your mission-critical link never goes down.

Interference-free 60 GHz spectrum

Forget the congested Wi-Fi spectrum. The 60 GHz frequency is unaffected by interference from 2.4 and 5 GHz networks, offering an extremely clean and stable high-capacity connection.

Robust and discreet design

mikrotik-cubeg-5ac60ad-cube-60g-ac-route:

This device operates primarily in the 60 GHz band, offering fiber-optic speeds, but includes an automatic 5 GHz (802.11ac) backup antenna. If the 60 GHz signal is affected by heavy rain, the Cube instantly switches to 5 GHz, ensuring the connection never drops.

Why Choose the Cube 60G ac?

Failsafe connectivity

The 60 GHz frequency is immune to the congested 5 GHz/2.4 GHz spectrum, but can suffer attenuation during heavy rain. The Cube 60G ac solves this by combining the best of both worlds: pure speed on normal days and solid redundancy on stormy days.

Powerful performance

Equipped with a quad-core Qualcomm IPQ-4019 processor (716 MHz) and 256 MB of RAM, this small cube handles heavy traffic with ease. The Gigabit Ethernet port ensures that wireless throughput is not limited by the wired interface.

Compact and discreet design

Forget bulky parabolic antennas. The cubic shape is aesthetically pleasing, unobtrusive on building facades, and offers a solid, durable mount with IP54 weatherproofing.

Ideal for which scenarios?

This equipment is the ideal choice for:

WISP clients (Point-to-Multipoint)

Connect clients to a 60 GHz AP (such as the wAP 60G AP) at distances of up to 800 meters.

Point-to-point links (PtP)

Create a fast network bridge between two nearby buildings (e.g., office and warehouse) without running cables.
mikrotik-cubeg-5ac60aypair-wireless-wire:
Fiber speed, with the reliability of automatic backup.

With the revolutionary 802.11ay technology in the 60 GHz band and an automatic 5 GHz backup link, your connection never fails.

Why choose the Wireless Wire Cube Pro?

Immediate plug-and-play installation

Simplicity is its greatest strength. The two units come factory-paired with an encrypted connection. Installation simply involves mounting the equipment, pointing the units at each other, and connecting them. No configuration is required, allowing you to create a network bridge in minutes.

Extreme speed with 60 GHz (802.11ay)

The 60 GHz band delivers fiber-optic-like speeds, with ultra-low latency and free from interference from traditional Wi-Fi networks. The 802.11ay standard enables even greater distances, with stable connections exceeding 1 km, and potentially surpassing 2 km under ideal conditions.

Maximum reliability with automatic 5 GHz backup

Never worry about link failures again. The Cube 60Pro ac is equipped with a 5 GHz backup radio. Robust and discreet design

The cube form factor is practical, durable, and compact. The new metal base improves cooling and overall robustness. The enclosure design was conceived to prevent the build-up of snow and water, making it perfect for the harshest climates.

Essential business links

The ideal solution for interconnecting two buildings in a company or campus, where speed matters but link reliability is absolutely non-negotiable, thanks to automatic failover to 5 GHz.

mikrotik-cubesa-60pro-ac-routeros-l4-cub:
60 GHz point-to-multipoint. 802.11ay standard. Automatic 5 GHz failover.

The CubeSA 60Pro ac (CubeG-5ac60ay-SA) is Mikrotik's new-generation 60 GHz access point (AP). Using the new 802.11ay standard, this "SA" (Sector Antenna) version was designed for point-to-multipoint (PtMP), connecting multiple clients (such as nRAY or Cube 60G) at distances of up to 600–800 meters. For full reliability, it includes an automatic failover 5GHz backup radio with a high-gain directional antenna (11.5dBi).

Why Choose the CubeSA 60Pro?

PtMP 802.11ay (600m+)

The 802.11ay standard takes 60GHz to another level. This Sector AP (SA) allows you to build a Point-to-Multipoint (PtMP) network with fiber-like speed, without cables. It is the ideal portable solution for events, festivals, construction sites, or any WISP looking to deliver the "last mile" over the clean 60 GHz spectrum.

Automatic 5GHz failover (11.5dBi)

60 GHz is ultra-fast, but can suffer in bad weather. The CubeSA 60Pro addresses this with a 5 GHz backup radio. Pro design (IP66 and metal base)

Powerful hardware (quad-core CPU and GPS)

Ideal for which scenarios?

WISP ("Last Mile" Sector AP)

The number one application. Install on a tower to distribute fiber-speed Internet to multiple 60 GHz clients (such as nRAY or Cube 60G) in a neighborhood.

Events and Temporary Installations

Perfect for festivals, concerts, trade shows, or pop-ups. Bring high-speed Internet to multiple locations without using a single cable.

Full Connectivity (LTE + BLE + GNSS)

The MikroTik SXTsq Embedded LTE4 (EC25-EU) is a highly cost-effective and reliable outdoor LTE device designed to bring Internet access to locations where traditional broadband cannot reach[cite: 75, 91, 92]. eSIM Revolution and Nano SIM Slot
