mikrotik-fiber-to-copper-converter-2-x-1:
More than a converter. It's manageable (SwOS Lite). SFP 2.5G. IP55.

The Mikrotik FTC21 elevates the concept of a "media converter". It is not just a passive fiber-to-copper converter; it is a robust (IP55) and intelligent device that runs a full version of SwOS Lite. This provides advanced management features such as VLANs, ACL filters, and traffic shaping directly at the fiber termination point. With 1x SFP (supporting 2.5G) and 2x Gigabit Ethernet ports, it is the definitive solution for outdoor or industrial installations.

Why Choose FTC21?

Advanced Management (SwOS Lite)

This is its greatest differentiator. As a manageable device, it can:

  • Isolate traffic: full VLAN support (port-based, tag-based).
  • Enhance security: filter packets with access control lists (ACLs) based on L2, L3, and L4.
  • Control the network: monitor interfaces (SNMP) and apply basic traffic shaping rules.

Future-Ready (SFP 2.5G)

While most converters are limited to 1G, the FTC21's SFP port supports 2.5G modules. This makes it ideal for high-speed fiber connections, ensuring your converter is never the network "bottleneck".

Outdoor Robustness (IP55)

The weatherproof enclosure (IP55) and operating temperature (-40°C to 70°C) allow the FTC21 to be installed outdoors on poles, walls, or in harsh industrial environments.

Standard Power (802.3af/at)

The FTC21 is easy to power. It supports PoE-in 802.3af/at (over a wide range of 24-57 V) or a standard DC connector. With a maximum consumption of 4W, it is incredibly efficient. The kit includes a PoE injector and a 48V power adapter.

Ideal For Which Scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

"Smart" Termination (WISP/ISP)

To replace the "dumb" converter at the customer's premises with a device that allows you to manage traffic, apply VLANs, and limit speeds.

Outdoor Network Extension

Bring a fiber connection (1G or 2.5G) to a remote outdoor location and convert it into 2 Ethernet ports to power IP cameras or APs.

Perimeter Security

Use ACL filtering to block unwanted traffic directly at the fiber entry point, before it reaches the main router.

Fiber-to-Copper Conversion. Integrated UPS battery. IP67 protection.

The MikroTik FTC21-ups solves one of the biggest problems at the network edge: power instability. Combining intelligent fiber-to-copper conversion with power resilience, this weatherproof device was designed to prevent headaches and unnecessary support tickets caused by power outages.

Why Choose FTC21-ups?

Integrated batteries against power failures

What sets the FTC21-ups apart is its response to instability. Inside, it houses a pair of Li-Ion NCA 18650 batteries. They are designed to keep your connection active during power outages and brief power cuts, preventing unwanted reboots and slow renegotiations of connected devices.

Flexible Power and PoE Output

With two PoE-in (802.3af/at) DC inputs and a standard DC connector you have maximum installation flexibility. In addition, Ethernet port 2 provides passive PoE output (24 V or 48 V voltage selectable via hardware switch), making it the perfect solution for directly powering CCTV cameras or network antennas.

Advanced Switching with SwOS Lite

This gives you advanced features such as interface monitoring, VLAN support, SNMP reporting, basic traffic shaping, and advanced packet filtering via ACLs.
mikrotik-flex-guide-rpsma-to-rpsma-cable:

Ultra-low signal loss (<0.65dB)

Its main advantage is superior performance. With signal loss below 0.65dB, this cable ensures the maximum power from your radio reaches the antenna, and that the received signal arrives at the radio with the greatest possible strength. The result is longer, faster, and far more stable wireless connections.

Premium Quality Construction

Every detail was designed for performance. The inner conductor is silver-plated copper, a material with superior conductivity. More importantly, both RP-SMA connectors are soldered rather than crimped, creating an electronically superior and mechanically far more robust connection.

Rugged for any environment

Demanding Professionals and WISPs

For installers looking to optimize every decibel (dB) of signal to build point-to-point and point-to-multipoint links with the best possible performance and reliability for their clients.

Any high-performance RP-SMA link

For any radio frequency (RF) application up to 6 GHz that uses RP-SMA connectors and where the quality and reliability of the connection is the highest priority.

mikrotik-gigabit-ethernet-surge-protecto:
Don't risk your equipment. IP67 Gigabit Protection. Against lightning and surges.

The MikroTik GESP is the essential "insurance policy" for your outdoor installations. This Gigabit (10/100/1000) surge protector is designed to sit between your network cable and your equipment (antenna or switch), protecting them from electrical discharges (lightning) or voltage spikes. Its new IP67 waterproof enclosure and PoE support make it the ideal choice for any mast installation.

Why Choose GESP?

Gigabit Protection with PoE Support

Don't sacrifice performance. GESP protects Gigabit Ethernet (1000 Mbps) connections and allows PoE power pass-through ("PoE support: Yes"). You can mount a Gigabit antenna at the top of a mast without losing speed or power.

IP67 Waterproof Enclosure

The new sealed enclosure (IP67) is fully dustproof and waterproof. This allows the GESP to be installed outdoors, directly on the mast or wall, exposed to the elements, providing protection where it is most needed.

Real Protection (Grounding is Essential)

The GESP works by diverting electrical discharges to ground. It is essential to connect the ground wire to a properly earthed structure (mast, rack, grounding bar) for the protection to work effectively.

Recommended Practice: Use on Both Ends

For maximum protection on long cables (such as from the mast to the grounding switch), MikroTik recommends using a GESP at each end of the cable. This protects both the equipment at the top (antenna) and the equipment at the bottom (switch).

Ideal For which scenarios?

This surge protector is the ideal choice for:

WISP Installations (Masts)

The primary application. Install a GESP near the antenna at the top of the mast and another at the base, before connecting to the switch, to protect the entire connection.

External Cables Between Buildings

If you have a network cable connecting two buildings, it will be highly susceptible to voltage spikes. A GESP at each end is essential.

Video Surveillance Systems (CCTV)

To protect outdoor PoE IP cameras, preventing lightning from damaging the camera and the switch/NVR.
mikrotik-gperx4-with-swos-and-outdoor-en:

Simplified Power and Expansion

Get the most out of your high-power PoE ports. The GPeR14i lets you transform a single 90W PoE++ port into three standard 30W PoE+ outputs. It is the ideal way to add more devices to your network, such as multiple security cameras, without the need to run additional cables or purchase a new switch.

Built for the Toughest Conditions (IP68)

Its rugged enclosure provides IP68-level protection, meaning it is fully waterproof against the ingress of dust, dirt and sand, and can withstand submersion in water. It is the perfect choice for any outdoor installation, regardless of adverse conditions.

Advanced Management with SwOS Lite

Flexible Power Options

In addition to PoE-in power, the GPeR14i includes a 2-pin terminal as an alternative power option, providing greater versatility for different power sources you may have at the installation site.

Outdoor Video Surveillance Installations

Access Point Network Expansion

For locations where you need to install multiple Wi-Fi access points but only have one network cable available. The GPeR14i allows you to split the connection to power multiple APs from a single point.

Any Demanding Outdoor Scenario

Its robustness and IP68 protection make it the ideal choice for industrial, agricultural, maritime or any other outdoor installation requiring maximum reliability.

mikrotik-gperx6-with-swos-outdoor-enclos:
Reduce cable clutter in your outdoor installations.

The outdoors can be brutal: scorching heat, freezing cold, wind and rain. The MikroTik GPERx6 solves two problems at once: it is a rugged, outdoor-ready switch (IP66) that reduces cable clutter and keeps your deployments simple. Receive power and fibre over a single hybrid cable and, at the other end, the GPERx6 splits everything neatly: SFP+ for long-distance uplinks, PoE output to power other devices and DC outputs for IoT equipment.

Why choose the MikroTik GPERx6?

Simplified Power and Data Distribution

Receive power and fibre over a single hybrid cable and distribute them in an organised manner at the top of a tower or on a pole. The GPERx6 splits the signal into multiple outputs, eliminating the need for multiple power supplies and cables running over long distances, which simplifies installation and reduces points of failure.

Multiple Power Outputs (PoE and DC)

This translates into superior performance even in environments with interference and faster, more stable connections over greater distances.

The LtAP LTE6 kit is the most advanced and robust 4G access point (AP) from Mikrotik, designed for vehicles and off-grid installations. Maximum Redundancy (3 SIM slots)

Its standout feature. The 3 Mini SIM slots allow you to use cards from 3 different carriers. You can configure RouterOS (Level 4) to perform automatic failover, ensuring your vehicle (bus, truck) never loses connectivity, even when crossing shadow areas or borders.

mikrotik-ltap-2hnd-fg621-ea-ltap-lte6-ki:
Complete connectivity, even on the most challenging terrain.

In a world where connectivity knows no boundaries, the MikroTik LtAP LTE6 kit stands out. It is a compact wireless access point with integrated GPS housed in our most durable weatherproof enclosure ever. Combining high-speed 4G LTE, GPS, Wi-Fi and enormous expansion flexibility, it is the perfect all-in-one device for logistics, fleet tracking and any application requiring reliable connectivity on the move.

Why choose the LtAP LTE6 kit?

The freedom of high-speed LTE

The LTE Category 6 modem supports "carrier aggregation", using multiple bands simultaneously to achieve consistent speeds of up to 300 Mbps. This ensures better responsiveness in congested environments and greater efficiency in weak signal situations in the field, doubling speed in rural areas.

Perfect for Logistics and Tracking

The LtAP features 3 MiniSIM slots, allowing you to configure automatic roaming between mobile carriers when crossing borders. The integrated GPS module (requires external antenna) allows you to track your vehicle's location in real time. It is the complete solution for managing your fleet.

Customise and Expand

The kit comes with two miniPCIe slots. One is occupied by the LTE modem, but the other is free for expansion. Add a 5 GHz interface or even a second LTE modem for redundancy. Adapt the LtAP to your needs!

Multiple Power Options

Power supply flexibility is total. You can power the LtAP via the classic DC connector, via passive PoE input or with an automotive connector, making it perfect for any type of vehicle or remote installation.

Ideal For whom?

Fleet Management and Logistics

The perfect application. Install the gateway in a vehicle to track its location via GPS in real time, while simultaneously providing Internet connectivity to occupants or telemetry systems, with automatic roaming between carriers.

Industrial and Remote Applications

For connecting equipment in remote or industrial locations, where enclosure robustness and flexibility in power and connectivity (LTE, Wi-Fi, Ethernet) are essential.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-mant-lte-5o-omnidirectional-5db:
4G/LTE Signal in 360°. 5dBi Gain. The Omni MIMO Solution.

mANT LTE (MTAO-LTE-5D-SQ) is the Mikrotik omnidirectional antenna designed specifically to solve 4G/LTE coverage issues. It is the ideal companion for your devices such as the wAP LTE or LtAP series. With 5 dBi gain and 2x2 MIMO design, this antenna captures signals from all directions (360°) to stabilise and increase your Internet connection speed.

Why Choose mANT LTE?

5dBi Gain (omnidirectional)

You don't need to know where the carrier tower is. Being omnidirectional (360°), it captures the best available signal around you. The 5dBi gain is a significant upgrade compared to internal antennas, especially for uplink (data upload), which is crucial in areas with poor coverage.

Real 2x2 MIMO Performance

Inside the enclosure (IP54) there are two "cross-polarised" antennas. Therefore, the antenna has 2 female SMA connectors, which connect seamlessly to the two connectors on your modem (LtAP, wAP R, etc.). This is essential for 4G/LTE to reach its maximum speeds (MIMO).

Universal Frequency Coverage

The antenna operates across the wide range of 699 to 2690 MHz. This covers virtually all 3G and 4G/LTE bands used globally, ensuring compatibility with any carrier.

Robust Design (IP54)

The compact enclosure (129x129mm) is weatherproof (IP54) and tested from -40°C to +70°C, allowing installation outside a building, on a pole or on a vehicle.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This antenna is the ideal choice for:

Vehicles (buses, caravans, boats)

Its #1 application. When combined with an LtAP, its omnidirectional design ensures the vehicle maintains the best possible 4G connection, even while moving and changing direction.

Weak Coverage Areas

For homes or offices where the 4G/LTE signal is weak indoors. Mounting this antenna externally (wall, pole) makes a dramatic difference in Internet stability and speed.
antena-dish-30-dbi-with-precision-aligmn:
The professional choice for long-range links.

The mANT30 (MTAD-5G-30D3-PA) is a professional-grade parabolic antenna with 30dBi gain in the 5 GHz band, built to the highest industry standards. This version includes a precision alignment mount, making it the definitive solution for creating long-distance point-to-point (PtP) links with maximum performance and stability. It was designed to seamlessly integrate MikroTik's BaseBox series radios, but can be used with any external pole-mounted radio.

Why choose mANT30 PA?

High 30 dBi Gain for Long Distances

The high 30 dBi gain and ultra-narrow signal beam of +/- 2.5 degrees enable the creation of extremely long and stable point-to-point links, focusing radio energy efficiently and ensuring the best possible signal quality.

Precision Alignment Mount Included

Given the highly directional nature of this antenna, precise alignment is crucial. This "PA" version comes equipped with a precision alignment mount, which allows fine elevation adjustments (+/- 15 degrees), an essential step for achieving maximum performance and higher data throughput from your link.

Superior RF Performance

With an excellent front-to-back ratio (>30 dB) and cross-polarisation and port-to-port isolation superior to 40 dB, this antenna offers exceptional noise immunity. The result is a cleaner connection, free from interference and with greater data transmission capacity.

Robust Construction for Outdoor Environments

Built with an aluminium reflector and designed to withstand winds of up to 201 km/h, the mANT30 is ready for the most demanding tower and pole installations, operating reliably across a wide temperature range (-50°C to 80°C).

Ideal For whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

The ideal antenna for creating high-capacity backhaul links between your communication towers or for connecting remote points of presence (PoPs) to your main network.

Mission-Critical Point-to-Point Links

For interconnecting two business buildings, a university campus or any pair of locations where link reliability, speed and stability are absolutely fundamental.

Video Surveillance System Backhaul

Creating a high-bandwidth wireless "bridge" to carry video traffic from multiple remote security cameras back to a central monitoring station.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-mantbox-ax-15s-l22ugs-5haxd2hax:
The multifunctional base station with the power of Wi-Fi 6.

Managing an outdoor wireless network has never been easier: the MikroTik mANTBox ax 15s delivers unmatched point-to-multipoint connectivity for a wide range of devices, at distances of up to 20 kilometres. This multifunctional base station combines a cutting-edge dual-core ARM CPU, the latest dual-band Wi-Fi 6 radio and a powerful integrated sectoral antenna, taking signal stability, speed and responsiveness to a new level.

Why choose the mANTBox ax 15s?

The Performance and Efficiency of Wi-Fi 6

This upgrade to Wi-Fi 6 delivers several benefits: speeds up to 40% higher in the 5 GHz band and up to 90% higher in the 2.4 GHz band, enhanced security with WPA3 encryption and fair traffic distribution for a large number of users. Your network will be faster, more secure and more reliable.

High-Gain Integrated Sectoral Antenna

At its core is a powerful dual-polarisation sectoral antenna, with 15 dBi gain in the 5 GHz band and 12 dBi at 2.4 GHz. This "all-in-one" design eliminates cable losses and delivers a strong, focused signal over a wide coverage area, ideal for connecting multiple clients.

Multi-Gigabit Connectivity

To ensure your wired connection is not a bottleneck, the mANTBox ax 15s is equipped with a Gigabit Ethernet port with PoE-in and an SFP port with 2.5 Gigabit support, ideal for high-speed fibre optic uplinks.

Complete Kit with Precision Mounting

The package includes everything you need for installation: a Gigabit PoE injector, a power supply and the advanced quickMOUNT pro mounting bracket. This bracket allows precise antenna adjustment across 140°, both horizontally and vertically.

Ideal For whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

The perfect base station (access point) for serving multiple clients (CPEs) in a given area. The combination of Wi-Fi 6 and high-gain sectoral antenna ensures a high-quality, fast and stable service.

Outdoor Coverage in Large Areas

Ideal for providing Wi-Fi coverage at campsites, stadiums, parks or any other large outdoor space where a strong, directed signal is needed for a broad audience.

mikrotik-mta-radome-kit-para-mant30-4-ki:
Essential protection for your long-range antennas.

The MTRADC4 is a kit with four radome protective covers, custom-designed for MikroTik 30dBi mANT parabolic antennas. This kit is an essential accessory to protect your investment, reduce wind load, and significantly extend the lifespan and reliability of your antennas in any environment, especially the harshest ones.

Why choose the MTRADC4 Radome kit?

Protection against the elements

The radome cover protects the reflector surface and sensitive antenna feed from ice and snow buildup, rain, debris, and bird droppings. This ensures your antenna performance remains at its peak, regardless of weather conditions.

Significant wind load reduction

Its aerodynamic design drastically reduces the force wind exerts on the antenna. This feature is critical for tower and pole installations, as it increases connection stability, reduces vibration, and lowers mechanical stress on the mounting structure.

RF-transparent material

Made from a special material with a low dielectric constant, the radome is "transparent" to the radio signal. It causes no signal loss or degradation of your wireless connection, ensuring maximum antenna performance.

Extends antenna lifespan

By protecting the antenna from UV rays, moisture, and other corrosive elements, the radome cover contributes positively to its sustainability and operational life, safeguarding your long-term investment.

Ideal for whom?

Any mANT 30dBi antenna user

The indispensable accessory for anyone installing one or more mANT 30dBi parabolic antennas who wants to ensure maximum protection and optimization.

Installations in Harsh Climate Locations

Essential for installations in areas with strong winds, snow, or ice, such as mountains or coastal areas, where protection and wind load reduction are absolutely critical.

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

To increase the reliability and longevity of your long-distance point-to-point connections, reducing maintenance needs and ensuring service stability for your customers.

Extra power for your outdoor switches.

Robust outdoor construction (IP67)

Its rugged enclosure with IP67 protection rating provides superior defense against the elements. It is fully dustproof and can withstand temporary water immersion, ensuring maximum protection and a long service life for your power supply.

High power output of 250W at 53V

This power supply delivers 250W of output power at 53V, ideal for powering switches such as the netPower 16P and all PoE devices connected to it. It is the perfect solution for setups requiring higher voltage, such as networks with PTZ security cameras or other high-consumption equipment.

It was specifically designed to be the perfect complement to MikroTik outdoor switches. It provides the "extra power" needed to ensure your netPower switches can power a large number of access points or IP cameras without power interruptions.

mikrotik-netbox-5-ax-l11ug-5haxd-nb:
The versatility of Wi-Fi 6 outdoors.

The MikroTik NetBox 5 ax is a powerful dual-chain outdoor device that can serve multiple roles in your network: access point (AP), CPE, or radio for a point-to-point connection. As an evolution of the popular NetBox 5, this version brings the performance and efficiency of Wi-Fi 6, a modern ARM CPU, and most importantly, RP-SMA connectors, offering unprecedented flexibility in choosing the ideal antenna for your deployment.

Why choose the NetBox 5 ax?

The power of Wi-Fi 6 outdoors

Take full advantage of the Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) standard for your outdoor connections. Enjoy faster speeds, greater efficiency in multi-device environments, and enhanced security, ideal for any modern wireless networking scenario.

Maximum versatility with RP-SMA connectors

The 5 GHz radio is equipped with RP-SMA female connectors. This gives you complete freedom to choose the antenna that best suits your needs. Add an omnidirectional antenna to create an excellent 360° access point, or pair it with a high-gain parabolic antenna to build a powerful long-distance point-to-point link of up to 30 kilometers.

Modern and efficient hardware

With a modern ARM-based Qualcomm Maple dual-core CPU, 256 MB of RAM, and a Gigabit Ethernet port with PoE input, this weatherproof board has the processing power needed to handle heavy traffic. The USB port offers additional flexibility for extra storage or other needs.

Robust and Functional Design

The NetBox 5 ax enclosure was designed to make the installer's job easier. The cover opens easily with just one hand and cable outlets are protected at the bottom. It comes equipped with a pole mounting clamp for easy installation and also offers a separate DIN rail mount.

Ideal for whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

An extremely versatile solution that can be used as a high-performance CPE for customers, or as a sectoral or omnidirectional Access Point, simply by choosing the right antenna.

Long-distance point-to-point connections

When paired with a high-gain parabolic antenna (such as the mANT30 PA), the NetBox 5 ax becomes an exceptional radio for building long-distance links, with all the performance and efficiency of Wi-Fi 6.

Custom outdoor network deployments

For any scenario requiring a customized, high-performance outdoor networking solution, where flexibility in antenna choice is a key factor for success.

mikrotik-nrayg-60adpair-wireless-wire-nr:
60 GHz Link Compact and durable.

The MikroTik Wireless Wire nRAY is the latest evolution in plug-and-play 60 GHz point-to-point (PtP) connection solutions. This kit, consisting of two pre-paired devices, creates a secure, AES-encrypted wireless connection that delivers the speed and stability of fiber optic, but without cables. With an innovative, more compact and resilient design, it is the easiest way to bridge distances of 1500 meters or more with an aggregate throughput of 2 Gb/s.

Why choose the Wireless Wire nRAY?

Immediate Plug-and-Play installation

Simplicity is its greatest strength. Both devices are factory pre-configured for automatic pairing. Installation simply involves mounting the units, pointing them at each other, and powering them on. No software configuration is required.

2 Gbps aggregate throughput

Enjoy impressive network performance. The Point-to-Point connection achieves an aggregate throughput of 2 Gb/s, ideal for the most demanding applications, such as heavy file transfers, backups, or as a high-capacity backbone for your network.

Secure, interference-free connection

By operating in the 60 GHz band, your connection avoids the traditional congestion of the wireless spectrum, resulting in a clean and stable connection even in busy urban environments. AES encryption ensures your data is always secure.

Compact, snow-resistant design

The new nRAY form factor is more compact than its predecessor, yet maintains the same antenna gain. Its design was specifically conceived for snowy environments, preventing ice buildup that could interfere with the signal.

Complete Kit with Precision Mounting

The box includes everything you need for your installation: the two nRAY units, power supplies, PoE injectors, and the practical nRAY solidMOUNT precision mounting bracket. This metal bracket allows fine adjustment both vertically and horizontally for perfect alignment.

Ideal for whom?

Interconnecting buildings on a campus or enterprise

The fastest and most cost-effective way to create a high-speed backbone between two buildings, avoiding the costs, construction work, and red tape associated with running a fiber optic cable.

Temporary events and construction sites

Perfect for quickly establishing a high-speed network connection between two points in a temporary installation, such as a festival, trade show, or construction site.

Anyone who needs "virtual fiber"

The ideal solution to connect a main house to a guest house, a garden office, or a remote workshop on the same property, ensuring maximum network performance without running cables.

mikrotik-power-adapter-48v-2a-96w-power-:

96W high power output

Guaranteed compatibility and safety

Robust and practical design

mikrotik-power-adapter-48v-2a-for-router:
48V power supply. For long distances. The Foundation of the GPEN Concept.

The MT48-480095-11DG is the 48V / 0.95A (45.6W) power supply that serves as the cornerstone of Mikrotik's innovative GPEN (Gigabit Passive Ethernet Network) concept. Its purpose is to provide high voltage (48V) that allows power to be carried over very long network cables, powering multiple GPER repeaters along the way without suffering voltage loss ("voltage drop").

Why choose this power supply?

Designed for the GPEN concept

This power supply is the central piece for powering your GPEN system (which mimics GPON topology using Ethernet). The high voltage of 48V is essential for the system to function, enabling it to power extenders (GPER) and client units.

Combats voltage drop

By sending 48V (instead of the usual 24V) through the cable, this power supply ensures that even after hundreds of meters (with GPERs along the way), the voltage reaching the final equipment is still sufficient to power it. It is the solution for delivering Ethernet and power far beyond the usual 100m limit.

High power output (45.6W)

With 0.95A of current, this power supply has enough capacity to power not only the final device, but also the various repeaters/extenders (GPER) you may have along the way, as described in the GPEN topology.

Ideal for which scenarios?

This power supply is the ideal choice for:

GPEN deployments

The recommended power supply for connection to central units (such as netPower) to distribute power across your GPEN network.

Long-distance equipment power supply

Any scenario where you need to send passive 48V PoE over a very long cable to equipment that accepts 48V (or uses a PoE converter at the other end).
mikrotik-pw48v-12v85w-power-source-for-c:
Telecom-grade power. Extreme reliability. ±48V power supply for CCR.

The MikroTik PW48V-12V85W is a carrier-grade open-frame power supply, specifically designed for data center environments and telecommunications towers that use DC (Direct Current) infrastructure. With a robust ±48V input, it delivers a stable 12V at 7A (85W) output, ensuring uninterrupted operation of your network. It is the perfect replacement or upgrade part for your powerful Cloud Core Routers (CCR, from revision r2 onwards), combining a design optimized for thermal dissipation with legendary durability.style="font-size: 23pt; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; color: #000000;">Choose the MikroTik PW48V-12V85W power supply?

Telecom standard (±48VDC input)

In ISP (Internet Service Provider) environments and large-scale telecommunications infrastructures, primary power is frequently supplied at ±48V DC (Direct Current) backed by heavy battery banks. This power supply allows you to integrate your MikroTik router directly into this resilient infrastructure, eliminating the need for external converters or inverters susceptible to failure.

Exclusive compatibility with CCR series

Purpose-built. The PW48V-12V85W has the exact output voltage (12V), generous amperage (7A), and specific connectors to fit perfectly into the renowned MikroTik Cloud Core Routers (CCR), ensuring full compatibility for equipment from revision r2 onwards.

100,000-hour MTBF (Durability)

The heart of your network cannot stop. Built with the highest-quality industrial components, this power supply has an MTBF (Mean Time Between Failures) of approximately 100,000 hours operating at 25°C. This translates to over a decade of expected continuous operation, minimizing on-site maintenance interventions.

Open-frame design (IP00)

The absence of an enclosure is intentional: thermal efficiency. As an internal replacement part (Open Frame / IP00), it is intended to be installed inside the CCR router's own metal chassis. This design allows the internal airflow generated by the router's fans to directly cool the power supply components, drastically extending its service life.
mikrotik-q-bc0003-s-qsfp-40g-break-out-c:
40G to 4x 10G. Breakout link. Simple expansion.

The Mikrotik Q+BC0003-S+ cable is the key to maximizing the potential of your 40 Gbps switches (such as the CRS326-24S+2Q+RM). This is a 3-meter DAC (Direct Attach Cable) Breakout cable that allows you to connect one QSFP+ port (40G) and split it into four SFP+ ports (10G). It is the most efficient and cost-effective way to connect a core switch to four other 10G devices without having to upgrade your entire infrastructure.

Why choose the Q+BC0003-S+?

Integrated modules (cost-effective solution)

This cable already includes the modules (1x QSFP+ on one end and 4x SFP+ on the other) integrated into the cable itself. This eliminates the need to purchase 5 separate optical transceivers and fiber cables, drastically reducing the cost and complexity of the installation.

Port expansion (Fan-Out)

Allows you to turn a single 40 Gbps port into four independent 10 Gbps connections. Ideal for connecting your "Core" switch to four distribution switches or four different servers, using only one port on the main switch.

3-meter length

At 3 meters long, it offers sufficient reach to connect equipment within the same rack or in adjacent racks, enabling flexible cable management.

Ideal for which scenarios?

This cable is the ideal choice for:

Switches with QSFP+ ports (e.g. CRS326)

For those with a Mikrotik switch featuring 40G (QSFP+) ports who want to use it to connect multiple 10G SFP+ devices.

Data centers and server rooms

For high-density aggregation, connecting high-performance servers to the main switch without spending a fortune on optics.
mikrotik-qsfp28-direct-attach-cable-100g:
>Reach 100 Gigabits.

The MikroTik XQ+DA0001 is a high-performance Direct Attach Cable (DAC), designed to create 40 and 100 Gbps connections between two network devices. With its QSFP28 transceivers already integrated, it is an "all-in-one" solution that delivers extreme speed, ultra-low latency, and superior reliability, making it the easiest and most cost-effective way to interconnect your next-generation equipment.

Why choose the XQ+DA0001 DAC cable?

Extreme 40/100 Gbps speed

This cable was built for maximum performance and is ideal for creating network backbones, interconnecting high-capacity switches, or connecting servers and storage systems to an aggregation switch. It supports the 40G and 100G standards.

Plug and Play simplicity

This is the great advantage of a DAC cable. Unlike a fiber optic solution, there is no need to purchase separate transceivers and patch cables. The XQ+DA0001 is a single piece. Simply connect both QSFP28 ends to your devices and the high-speed connection will be immediately operational.

Low latency and power consumption

Being a passive copper cable, connection latency is ultra-low, which is a critical factor for high-performance applications such as high-performance computing (HPC) and data center environments. In addition, its power consumption is virtually zero, unlike optical transceivers.

Ideal for MikroTik equipment

It is the perfect way to connect two of MikroTik's most powerful 100 Gigabit devices, such as the CCR2216 router and the CRS504 switch, without complications and with guaranteed optimized performance between them.

Ideal For whom?

Data centers and business environments

The primary application. Perfect for connecting Top-of-Rack switches to core switches or for connecting high-speed servers and storage systems that require a 100 Gbps connection.

Short-distance connections within the same rack

Its 1-meter length is ideal for connecting equipment located in the same rack or in adjacent racks, ensuring a clean installation with minimal cable excess and excellent airflow.

High-performance applications (HPC)

For high-performance computing environments or clusters, where ultra-low latency and massive bandwidth between nodes are fundamental requirements for overall system performance.
