Using single-mode fiber, this module is capable of establishing a 100G connection over distances of up to 10 kilometers, perfect for interconnecting buildings on a campus, different points of presence (PoPs) of an ISP, or for any scenario requiring a high-speed connection over a considerable distance.

Integrated Digital Monitoring

The module includes built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDM/DOM), such as optical power monitoring, voltage, temperature, and other important parameters. This allows network administrators to monitor link health and performance in real time, facilitating proactive maintenance and troubleshooting.

Ideal For whom?

Data centers and enterprise networks

The primary application. Perfect for high-speed connections between core, aggregation, and Top-of-Rack switches, where bandwidth and low latency are essential.

Users of MikroTik 100G equipment

The ideal complement to MikroTik's 100 Gigabit equipment, such as the CCR2216 routers and the CRS504 or CRS518 switches, to ensure a connection with maximum performance and reliability.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-qsfp56-200g-to-4-50g-direct-att:
Breakout 200G. Split 4x 50G. Length 3 meters.

The MikroTik DQ+BC0003-DS+ is a breakout cable designed to unlock the full flexibility and potential of the latest 200G and 400G platforms. This cable allows you to split a single 200 Gigabit QSFP56 port into four independent 50 Gigabit connections, making it the perfect solution to maximize port density and connect multiple high-speed devices without investing in extra hardware.

Why Choose DQ+BC0003-DS+?

200G to 4x 50G flexibility

Meet growing bandwidth demands. The ability to split 200G into 4x 50G makes this cable the ideal companion for next-generation deployments with high-capacity switches, such as MikroTik CRS812 DDQ and CRS804 DDQ models. Expand your network intelligently and without complexity.

Smart backward compatibility

Protect your investment. Like its predecessor (XQ+BC0003-XS+), this new cable maintains excellent backward compatibility with previous equipment. In addition to the new 50G standard, it supports splitting 100G into 4x 25G and also 40G into 4x 10G, ensuring full flexibility for different scenarios and existing infrastructures.

Perfect 3-meter length

Keep your rack organized. With an exact length of 3 meters, the cable offers the ideal reach to connect all necessary interconnection points within the same rack or between adjacent racks, keeping the server room clean and tidy, without excess cables hanging around.
mikrotik-quickmount-extra-wall-mount-ada:
The sturdy and adjustable mount for your largest antennas.

The quickMOUNT extra (QME) is an advanced wall mount designed for large MikroTik point-to-point and sector antennas. This robust accessory not only allows secure wall mounting, but also offers a wide adjustment angle, ensuring precise and reliable alignment for your long-distance connections.

Why choose the quickMOUNT extra?

Wide 190° adjustment

Its main advantage is enormous alignment flexibility. The quickMOUNT extra allows you to rotate your antenna through an arc of 190 degrees. This wide adjustment angle is essential for precisely pointing your long-range antennas, ensuring the best signal strength and maximum performance from your link.

Robust mount for heavy antennas

This mount was designed specifically to be compatible with MikroTik's heavy long-range antennas, such as the mANT 30 parabolic antenna or the mANT 19s sector antenna. Its durable construction ensures a safe and stable installation.

Versatile mounting

In addition to wall mounting, the QME can also be used as an adapter, allowing you to attach an antenna with a small mast bracket to a large-diameter mast, ensuring reliable fastening.

Ideal For whom?

Point-to-point and sector link installers

The primary audience. It is an essential accessory for any professional who needs to mount large antennas on walls and ensure precise, stable alignment for their clients.

Any installation requiring a wide adjustment angle

For deployments in challenging locations, where the antenna needs to be pointed at a steep angle relative to the mounting wall, the 190° range is a decisive advantage.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-quickmount-pro-lhg-wall-mount-a:
Precision alignment. 140° adjustment. Professional LHG mount.

The QMP-LHG (quickMOUNT pro LHG) is Mikrotik's advanced mounting bracket for the LHG series. If you need perfect point-to-point (PtP) alignment, this is the essential upgrade. It allows the antenna to be rotated on a 140° axis (horizontally and vertically) and features an integrated graduated scale (protractor) for fine and precise adjustment. It is the missing tool to guarantee maximum signal on your link.

Compatibility note: This mount (QMP-LHG) is compatible with all LHG series products, EXCEPT the LHG XL models.

Why Choose quickMOUNT pro?

Precision alignment (140° + graduated scale)

Its main advantage. On point-to-point links, 1 degree of misalignment can mean a huge signal loss. This mount allows you to adjust the LHG 140° on both axes (horizontal and vertical). The integrated graduated scale lets you lock in the exact angle for maximum performance.

Versatile mounting (mast or wall)

The QMP-LHG design allows you to connect your LHG antenna to a mast (vertical or horizontal) or directly to a wall, providing full installation flexibility.

Robust construction

Made from durable composite materials and metal, the quickMOUNT pro is designed to hold the LHG antenna securely, withstanding wind and maintaining the precise alignment you have set.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This mount is the ideal choice for:

Point-to-point links (PtP)

The #1 application. Essential for any PtP installation using LHG antennas, where fine alignment is mandatory for maximum speed.

CPE installations at difficult angles

Perfect for customer installations (CPE) where the antenna must be mounted on a wall or mast at an awkward angle, allowing it to compensate and point correctly at the tower.
mikrotik-quickmount-pro-wall-mount-adapt:
Precise alignment at any angle.

The quickMOUNT pro (QMP) is an advanced wall mount designed for small point-to-point and sector antennas. Made from a special, durable composite material, this mount offers unprecedented alignment flexibility, allowing fine adjustments in the horizontal and vertical planes to ensure the best performance of your wireless connection.

Why choose the quickMOUNT pro?

140° adjustment on two axes (H/V)

Achieve perfect alignment in any situation. quickMOUNT pro allows you to rotate your antenna up to 140 degrees in the horizontal (azimuth) and vertical (elevation) planes. This allows you to reach your target with maximum precision, even in the most difficult installation sites, such as angled walls.

Graduated scale for precise alignment

To simplify the process, the mount includes a graduated scale. This feature allows fine and repeatable adjustments, ensuring the best signal strength and, consequently, the highest speed and stability of your link.

Durable "anvilNITE" construction

The adapter is manufactured from a special plastic composite material, anvilNITE, which gives it enormous durability and resistance, ideal for withstanding outdoor installation conditions.

Ideal For whom?

Point-to-point and sector link installers

The primary audience. It is an essential accessory for any professional who needs to mount smaller antennas on walls and ensure precise, stable alignment, especially in non-standard installations.

Any installation requiring a wide adjustment angle

For deployments in challenging locations, where the antenna needs to be pointed at a steep angle relative to the mounting wall or where the target is at a significantly different elevation.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-quickmount-wall-mount-adapter-q:
A simple and versatile mount for your antennas.

The MikroTik quickMOUNT (QM) is a basic yet extremely versatile wall mount adapter designed for small MikroTik point-to-point and sector antennas, such as those from the popular SXT series. Its simple and effective design allows for quick and reliable installation, with great pointing flexibility, whether on a wall or on a pole.

Why choose the quickMOUNT?

Flexible wall or pole mounting

This mount offers dual functionality. You can mount it directly on a wall for solid fastening, or use it as an adapter that allows you to attach your small antenna to a large-diameter pole where the original clamp would not fit.

Wide 190° adjustment

quickMOUNT allows you to rotate the antenna through a 190° arc. This large adjustment capability gives the installer enormous flexibility to point the antenna precisely in the required direction, optimizing signal strength and the quality of your wireless connection.

Dual mounting capability

A unique feature of this mount is the ability to attach two SXT units simultaneously, back to back. This configuration is ideal for easily creating a signal repeater point or for covering a large sector area.

Ideal For whom?

CPE installation at customer premises

The perfect, low-cost mount for installing an SXT series or similar CPE on a customer's house wall, allowing easy and quick pointing towards the internet provider's tower (WISP).

Creating wireless repeaters

For users who need to extend the range of a point-to-point connection, easily mount two SXT devices back to back to relay the signal.

Mounting on large-diameter poles

The ideal solution when the standard clamp of a small antenna is not large enough for the installation pole. quickMOUNT works as the perfect adapter to ensure secure fastening.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-quickmount-x-additional-axis-fo:
The perfect adjustment for your equipment.

The quickMOUNT-X (QM-X) is a mounting adapter specially designed to add an extra adjustment axis to MikroTik's popular SXTsq devices. This simple yet ingenious piece allows fine adjustments both vertically and horizontally, ensuring perfect alignment for your wireless connections with ease and unprecedented precision.

Why choose the QM-X?

Vertical and horizontal adjustment

The main advantage of the QM-X is the ability to allow adjustment on two axes. This is crucial in point-to-point (PtP) or point-to-multipoint (PtMP) connections, where exact alignment is essential to achieve maximum signal strength and connection performance.

Lightweight and durable construction

Made from fiberglass-reinforced nylon, the QM-X is extremely durable yet very lightweight at the same time. It was designed to have no small parts that could break or get lost, making it a robust and reliable solution for outdoor installations.

Simple and quick installation

The intelligent design of the quickMOUNT-X allows for easy and intuitive use. It perfectly adapts to compatible equipment and pole mounts, simplifying the installation and adjustment process in the field.

Ideal For whom?

SXTsq series users

It is the indispensable accessory for anyone using a MikroTik SXTsq line device who needs more precise control over their antenna alignment.

Wireless network installers (WISPs)

For professionals who mount dozens of CPEs and need a fast, reliable, and precise way to align customer equipment with the transmission tower, ensuring the best quality of service.

Point-to-point links (PtP)

In any wireless bridge scenario, where millimeter-precise alignment can make the difference between an unstable connection and a high-performance one.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-r11e-2hpnd-minipci-routerboard-:
Extreme power (1W). Extended frequency. The WISP upgrade.

The R11e-2HPnD is the MikroTik high-power miniPCI-e card for the 2.4 GHz band. Designed for pure performance, this Wi-Fi 4 (802.11n) Dual Chain (2x2 MIMO) card delivers enormous transmit power of up to 30dBm (1000mW). Its main advantage for WISPs is the ability to operate across a wide frequency range (2312-2732 MHz), allowing it to escape standard channel interference.

Why Choose the R11e-2HPnD?

1W of power (30dBm)

This is one of the most powerful 2.4 GHz cards on the market. The 30dBm (1W) output power is ideal for creating Access Points (AP) with long coverage or for stable Point-to-Point (PtP) connections over long distances, "cutting through" ambient noise.

Extended Frequency (Ideal for WISP)

The ability to operate from 2,312 to 2,732 MHz (depending on country regulations) is critical. It allows operators (WISPs) to find "free channels" outside the congested 2.4 GHz band (channels 1 to 11), resulting in much more stable and faster connections.

miniPCI-e dual chain format

With its miniPCI-e form factor and two MMCX connectors, this 2x2 MIMO (Dual Chain) card is the perfect upgrade for RouterBOARDs such as the RB912 series (BaseBox 2), RB800, or adapters like the RB14e, enabling speeds of up to 300 Mbit/s.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This radio card is the ideal choice for:

Upgrading a BaseBox 2

To replace the radio card in a BaseBox 2 (RB912) with this higher-power model or one with extended frequency capability.

Long-range WISP APs

To build a 2.4 GHz sectoral or omnidirectional access point on a tower, using high power to cover a wide area.

Point-to-Point (PtP) links at 2.4 GHz

When line of sight is not perfect (NLOS) or the distance is large, the combination of high power (1W) and 2.4 GHz frequency is the most robust.
mikrotik-r11e-5hacd-minipci-routerboard-:
5GHz 802.11ac. miniPCI-e format. Dual Chain.

The MikroTik R11e-5HacD is a wireless network card in miniPCI-express format, designed to add high-performance 5 GHz connectivity to any RouterBOARD or device with a compatible expansion slot. Based on the 802.11ac (Wi-Fi 5) standard, this module supports data rates of up to 867 Mbps, taking advantage of 80 MHz channel bandwidth.

Why Choose the R11e-5HacD?

802.11ac (Wi-Fi 5) Performance

Equipped with the QCA9882 chipset, the R11e-5HacD operates at 5GHz, which is less congested than 2.4GHz. It offers Dual Chain (2x2 MIMO) operation, enabling robust and fast connections, ideal for backhauls or high-capacity access points.

Connectivity and form factor

Its standard miniPCI-express form factor makes it compatible with a wide range of equipment (such as the RB912, RB922, RB800 series or x86 adapters). It features two MMCX connectors for external antenna connection, offering flexibility in antenna gain and type selection.

Industrial Durability

Built for demanding environments. The card has been tested to operate at ambient temperatures from -40°C to 70°C, ensuring reliability even inside outdoor enclosures exposed to extreme weather conditions.
mikrotik-r11e-5hnd-minipci-routerboard-r:
High-power 5 GHz. Signal LEDs. miniPCI-e format.

The R11e-5HnD is the MikroTik high-power 5 GHz wireless card in the modern miniPCI-e form factor. Operating at 4920-5920MHz, this Dual Chain (Wi-Fi 4) card reaches up to 27dBm (500mW) of output power. It is the perfect match for RouterBOARDs from the RB912, RB800, or RB14e series. A unique feature of this card is its integrated LEDs, which indicate connection status and signal strength, making physical alignment easier without needing to access the software.

Why Choose the R11e-5HnD?

High-power 5GHz (27dBm)

Designed to reach greater distances. With output power of up to 500mW (27dBm), this card ensures a strong and stable signal for point-to-point links or sectoral APs, outperforming standard low-power cards.

Integrated LED indicators

This rare feature saves installers valuable time. The card has LEDs that show the wireless mode, connection status (connected/searching), TX/RX activity and, most importantly, wireless signal strength. This helps with antenna alignment simply by "looking at the card".

MiniPCI-e Compatibility

The miniPCI-e form factor is the modern standard for expansion. This card fits perfectly in devices such as BaseBox 5, NetMetal or any PC/Router with a compatible miniPCI-e slot, providing 2x2 MIMO connectivity via MMCX connectors.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This card is the ideal choice for:

RouterBOARD upgrades (e.g. RB912)

To add a second 5GHz interface to a BaseBox or NetMetal (that has an extra slot), creating a repeater or a dual-sector AP.

Custom AP builds

Combine an RBM11G or RBM33G to create a custom high-power 5 GHz radio.
mikrotik-r11e-lora8-lora-minipci-e-card-:
Add LoRaWAN (868MHz). High Rx Sensitivity. Integrated GPS.

The R11e-LR8G is the simplest and most cost-effective way to add LoRaWAN (868MHz) connectivity to any MikroTik device with a miniPCIe slot. This card (used in the popular wAP LR8G kit) was designed for IoT projects of any scale. It stands out for its best-in-class reception sensitivity (Rx), ensuring reliable long-range communication even in challenging conditions. It also includes an integrated GPS chip (uUFL connector) and is ready to work with The Things Network (TTN).

Why Choose the R11e-LR8G?

High Rx sensitivity (long range)

What sets this card apart. The enhanced sensitivity allows your gateway to pick up weaker or more distant LoRa sensor signals, dramatically increasing the effective range and reliability of your IoT network (868 MHz).

Integrated GPS (uUFL connector)

The card includes a GPS chip (uUFL connector). This is essential for mobile gateways (e.g. in vehicles) or for precise location mapping in fixed gateway deployments.

Ready for "The Things Network" (TTN)

This card is ready to work with The Things Network infrastructure. It is the plug-and-play solution to build your own IoT gateway and start collecting data in minutes.

Low power consumption (1.3W)

With a maximum consumption of only 1.3 W, it is incredibly efficient, ideal for battery-powered or solar-powered installations, or for mobile gateways.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This modem card is the ideal choice for:

Build custom LoRa gateways

The #1 application. Combine this card with a RouterBOARD (e.g. RBM33G, RB912) and a weatherproof enclosure to create a powerful custom 868 MHz LoRaWAN gateway.

Device upgrade (e.g. LtAP)

Add LoRaWAN functionality to an existing MikroTik device with a free miniPCIe slot, such as an LtAP, creating a mobile gateway with 4G + LoRa + GPS.

Replacement (wAP LR8G kit)

It is the official replacement card for the MikroTik wAP gateway LR8G kit (RBwAPR-2nD&R11e-LR8G).
mikrotik-r11e-lr9g-lr9g-minipci-e-card-f:
The simplest way to build your LoRaWAN gateway.

The R11e-LR9G is a next-generation LoRaWAN® hub card from MikroTik, in miniPCIe format. Compatible with any MikroTik device that has a miniPCIe slot with USB lines, this card is the simplest and most cost-effective way to add LoRa® gateway functionality to your network. With an integrated GPS receiver and enhanced reception sensitivity, it is the perfect choice for IoT projects of any scale.

Why choose the R11e-LR9G card?

Next-generation LoRaWAN gateway

Turn your RouterBOARD into a powerful LoRaWAN gateway. This hub card allows you to receive data from hundreds of IoT sensors and devices on the 915 MHz frequency band (AU915928, US902928, AS923, KR920923), ideal for the Americas, Australia, and parts of Asia.

Integrated GPS for synchronization and location

The integrated GPS receiver (requires external antenna) is a premium feature, ideal for mobile LoRaWAN® base stations, vehicle tracking solutions, or any scenario that benefits from precise time synchronization or geolocation.

Enhanced reception sensitivity

With an enhanced reception sensitivity of -141 dBm, this gateway can "hear" weaker signals from more distant sensors. This translates to greater range and higher reliability for your LoRaWAN network.

miniPCIe format for easy integration

Its standard miniPCIe form factor enables plug-and-play installation in a wide variety of RouterBOARDs and other compatible devices, allowing you to build a custom, compact, low-power IoT solution (max 1.3 W).

Ideal For whom?

IoT solution developers

The primary audience. Perfect for building custom gateways for smart agriculture, smart cities, industrial monitoring, or any other IoT application using LoRaWAN technology.

RouterBOARD users with a miniPCIe slot

Anyone who wants to add a LoRaWAN gateway to their existing MikroTik router, in a simple and cost-effective way.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-r11e-lte7-lte-cat7-minipcie-300:
LTE Category 7. miniPCIe format. Upgrade to 300 Mbps.

The MikroTik R11e-LTE7 is a next-generation LTE modem card in the standard miniPCIe form factor. Designed as a drop-in upgrade for RouterBOARD systems, this module elevates your connectivity to Category 7, offering download speeds of up to 300 Mbps and upload speeds of up to 100 Mbps. It is the perfect solution for integrators looking to modernize devices such as the LtAP or RBM33G without replacing the main hardware.

Why Choose the R11e-LTE7?

Superior speed and efficiency

Compared to older Cat4 or Cat6 modems, the R11e-LTE7 doubles upload speed to 100 Mbps and uses Carrier Aggregation (2xCA) to combine multiple bands, ensuring better performance in congested areas and greater range in rural areas.

New Supported Bands (B28 + B32)

This model expands frequency compatibility, now including Band 28 (700 MHz), essential for long-range coverage, and Band 32 (1500 MHz), crucial for extra-speed downloads on many European networks.

Compact and universal form factor

With a more compact miniPCIe form factor than its predecessor (FG621), it fits easily in any RouterBOARD or device with a miniPCIe slot and USB support, making installation fast and straightforward.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This module is the ideal choice for:

Upgrading existing hardware

Revive older MikroTik routers (such as the wAP LTE kit or LtAP mini) with modern 4G speeds.

IoT and vehicle systems

For applications that require fast uploads (e.g. real-time video or telemetry transmission) over the mobile network.
mikrotik-r11el-ec200a-eu-minipci-e-r11el:
Add 4G/LTE connectivity to your custom solution.

The R11eL-EC200A-EU is a Category 4 LTE modem in standard miniPCIe format. This card is designed to be integrated into any MikroTik RouterBOARD (or other compatible device) that has a miniPCIe slot and a SIM card slot. It is the simplest and most cost-effective way to add a reliable mobile internet connection to your routers, whether as a primary connection, backup (failover), or other custom applications.

Why choose the R11eL-EC200A-EU modem?

LTE Category 4 Connectivity

This modem delivers reliable download speeds of up to 150 Mbps and upload speeds of up to 50 Mbps. This performance is ideal for most networking applications, including web browsing, video streaming, remote working, and as a robust failover connection.

Broad band support

With wide support for LTE FDD and TDD bands, including the popular 700 MHz Band 28 for better coverage in rural areas, this modem ensures broad compatibility with mobile network operators across Europe. It also falls back to 3G and 2G networks for continuous connectivity.

Universal miniPCIe format

Its standard miniPCIe form factor enables easy and fast installation in a wide variety of RouterBOARDs and other third-party devices that feature this expansion slot, offering great integration flexibility.

External antenna connectors

The card is equipped with two female U.FL connectors, which allow external LTE antennas to be connected (via pigtails). This step is crucial for maximizing signal strength and quality, especially in locations with poor mobile network coverage.

Ideal For whom?

System integrators and DIY builders

The primary audience. Essential for those building their own 4G/LTE-capable routers using RouterBOARDs that have miniPCIe expansion slots.

Building failover gateways

For building robust routing solutions where a 4G/LTE connection automatically takes over internet connectivity in the event of a primary wired or fiber connection failure, ensuring service continuity.

IoT and M2M applications

For connecting remote devices and sensors to the internet over the cellular network, in Internet of Things or Machine-to-Machine communication projects.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-r11el-fg621-ea-minipci-e-r11el-:
A cost-effective 4G upgrade. LTE Cat 6 (300Mbps). Band 28 support.

The R11eL-FG621-EA is MikroTik's new miniPCI-e modem card, designed to be the most cost-effective upgrade to LTE Cat 6 (300 Mbps). It delivers the same speeds and features (such as Carrier Aggregation) as its predecessor (R11e-LTE6), but at an even more competitive price. It is the ideal choice for EMEA/APAC/Australia regions, thanks to its support for the crucial Band 28 (700 MHz).

Why Choose the R11eL-FG621-EA?

Carrier Aggregation (LTE Cat 6)

Cat 6 performance is achieved through "Carrier Aggregation", which allows the modem to use multiple 4G bands simultaneously. This results in a faster and more stable connection, especially in congested urban areas (many users) or rural areas (weak signal).

Band 28 support (700MHz)

Support for Band 28 (700 MHz) is essential for EMEA (Europe), APAC (Asia-Pacific), and Australia. This is the "long-range" band that offers the best signal penetration and coverage in rural or low-coverage areas.

The #1 value-for-money upgrade

This modem delivers Cat 6 (300 Mbps) performance at an unbeatable price, making it the ideal "value-for-money" choice for adding or upgrading 4G/LTE to your RouterBOARD.

Universal miniPCI-e format

It is compatible with any RouterBOARD with a miniPCI-e slot and SIM slot (such as RBM33G, RBM11G, RB912). Its "full-size" form factor was specifically designed for the LtAP ("full-size" version).

Ideal For which scenarios?

This modem card is the ideal choice for:

4G/LTE gateways (RBM33G/RBM11G)

Combine this card with an RBM33G (for Dual-SIM) or RBM11G to create a high-performance custom 4G gateway, especially for rural areas (Band 28).

Upgrading an LtAP (full-size)

Replace your old LtAP modem (large version) with this Cat 6 model to get much higher speeds and Carrier Aggregation support.
mikrotik-r52-minipci-routerboard-r52:
Your wireless card for everything.

The MikroTik R52 is a dual-band 802.11a/b/g wireless radio card in miniPCI format. Using the reliable Atheros AR5414 chipset, it is the logical choice for use with RouterOS and RouterBOARDs due to its high compatibility and reliability. It is the simplest and most versatile way to add or expand the wireless capabilities of your custom network solution.

Why Choose the R52 card?

Dual-band functionality

The R52 operates on the 2.4 GHz band (802.11b/g standards) and the 5 GHz band (802.11a standard). This flexibility allows you to create an Access Point that serves different types of devices, or to build a Point-to-Point link on the less congested 5 GHz band.

High compatibility and reliability

Built with the Atheros AR5414 chipset, this card is known for its excellent compatibility and stability with the RouterOS operating system. It is the safe choice to ensure trouble-free operation of your RouterBOARD.

External antenna connectors

The card is equipped with two female U.FL connectors, allowing (via pigtails) connection to external antennas that best suit your deployment, whether omnidirectional, sectoral, or parabolic.

Ideal For whom?

System integrators and DIY builders

Perfect for those building their own Access Points or CPEs using RouterBOARDs with miniPCI slots, who need a reliable and versatile radio card.

Equipment repair or upgrade

To replace a damaged radio card or add a second frequency band to a RouterBOARD that only has one radio, expanding its capabilities.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-rack-holder-sr-10u-19-10u-deskt:
Professional organisation for your desk.

The MikroTik SR-10U rack holder is a 10U, 19-inch desktop rack designed to make life easier for system administrators, engineers, and network enthusiasts. Made from robust and lightweight aluminium, this rack offers an adjustable angle for ergonomic equipment access and additional space for cable management. It is the perfect solution for test labs or for organising your network equipment under or on top of a desk.

Why choose the SR-10U Rack?

Versatile and ergonomic design

You can mount it under a desk to save space or place it directly on a workbench. Its design allows you to adjust the angle of the equipment, making it easier to view and access ports and controls, which is ideal for test environments where connections are changed frequently.

Robust and lightweight construction

Made from aluminium, the SR-10U is robust enough to support your equipment and light enough to be easily transported. Its rear was designed with additional space for cable management or even to connect a multi-socket extension lead.

Universal 19" compatibility

The SR-10U is compatible with all MikroTik equipment and equipment from other manufacturers that follow the 19-inch rack mounting standard. The kit includes the necessary screws and cage nuts for mounting 10 units of equipment.

Optimised for high density

Take your organisation to the next level. With the K-79 accessory (sold separately), you can install up to four compact RB5009 routers in a single 1U space, allowing up to 40 routers to be mounted in this 10U rack.

Ideal For whom?

System administrators and network engineers

The perfect working environment for testing configurations, preparing equipment before customer installation, or troubleshooting hardware.

Home labs and technology enthusiasts

For those who have multiple network devices at home and are looking for a professional and organised way to store them, without the need for a large closed rack.

Small offices or point-of-sale locations

When a wall cabinet is not an option, this desktop rack allows you to consolidate your switch, router, and other network equipment in a single, organised, and easily accessible location.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-rb924i-2nd-bt5-bg77-knot-iot-ga:
Universal IoT Gateway. NB-IoT eCAT-M. Bluetooth 5.2 and Modbus.

The KNOT (RB924i-2nD-BT5&BG77) is the most versatile device in Mikrotik's IoT family. It is an IoT Gateway designed to connect sensors and actuators to the network using low-cost, low-power cellular technology: Narrow Band (NB-IoT) and CAT-M. The KNOT acts as a universal bridge: it can read data from wired sensors (Modbus), wireless sensors (Bluetooth) or Ethernet devices and send everything to the cloud via MQTT or HTTPS.

Why Choose KNOT?

Efficient cellular connectivity (NB-IoT / CAT-M)

Forget expensive LTE data plans. KNOT uses mobile networks optimized for machines. These networks offer excellent coverage (even in basements) and low monthly costs, perfect for telemetry, vending machines or remote monitoring that consumes a few megabytes per day.

Bluetooth Gateway 5.2 (asset tracking)

The KNOT can track assets (Asset Tracking) and read telemetry. It supports any BLE (Bluetooth Low Energy) tag that sends advertising data (iBeacon, Eddystone or Mikrotik format). It collects data from nearby tags and sends it to your server via MQTT/HTTPS.

Modbus to TCP Bridge

Bring your legacy sensors into the 21st century. The KNOT has an RS485 interface and can convert the industrial Modbus protocol to TCP. This allows you to monitor electricity meters, relays and wired sensors wirelessly.

Hardware versatility (PoE output and DIN)

Comes with mounting for a DIN rail, ideal for electrical panels. It has 2 Ethernet ports (10/100), where the second port offers PoE-Out to power another device. Also includes 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi, GPS and multiple power options (PoE, DC, MicroUSB).

Ideal For which scenarios?

This gateway is the ideal choice for:

Cold Chain Monitoring

Use the KNOT to read Bluetooth temperature sensors inside a truck or warehouse and send the data via NB-IoT.

Industrial Automation and Agriculture

Collect data from PLCs or agricultural sensors via Modbus/RS485 and send it to the cloud. Use GPIO to control relays remotely.

Asset Tracking (construction/hospitals)

Locate tools or expensive medical equipment using Bluetooth tags and a network of KNOTs.
mikrotik-rb924ir-2nd-bt5-bg770a-r11e-lr9:
Industrial IoT Gateway. LoRa 915 MHz + LTE-M. Bluetooth 5.2.

The MikroTik KNOT (RB924iR-2nD-BT5&BG770A&R11e-LR9G) is the ultimate connectivity tool for the Internet of Things. This universal gateway can interconnect wired sensors (Modbus/RS485), wireless devices (Bluetooth, Wi-Fi) and long-range networks (LoRa, LTE CAT-M), converting all protocols to TCP/IP. It is the "Swiss Army Knife" solution for industrial automation, asset tracking and remote monitoring.

Why Choose the KNOT LR9G Kit?

Massive connectivity: LoRa and LTE Cat-M

This version is equipped with the R11e-LR9G card for 915 MHz LoRa networks and the BG770A modem for efficient mobile connectivity (LTE CAT-M and NB-IoT) with simultaneous GPS. This allows you to monitor assets in remote areas where Wi-Fi does not reach, at a very low data cost.

Protocol Bridge

KNOT excels at conversion. It can read data from Modbus meters via RS485 and send it via MQTT. It can read Bluetooth temperature tags and send them via HTTPS. It "ties together" all the loose ends of your industrial infrastructure into a single manageable network.

Hardware versatility

In addition to the IoT radios, it has 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi, two Ethernet ports (with PoE input and PoE output), high-precision Bluetooth 5.2 for indoor asset tracking and DIN rail support. It is robust, supporting temperatures from -40°C to +70°C.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This equipment is the ideal choice for:

Asset Tracking

Use Bluetooth to detect tags in warehouses and LTE Cat-M to send location and inventory data to the cloud.

Smart Meter Reading

Convert electricity or water meter readings (Modbus RS485) to Ethernet or Wi-Fi without replacing legacy equipment.
mikrotik-rblhg5kit-lhg-5-tripack-rblhg5k:
NOTE: This product is sold in packs of 3 units (3 antennas in a single box - RBLHG5kit).

Grid design. 24.5 dBi gain. Loss-free cable.

The LHG 5 (RBLHG-5nD) is a compact and lightweight 5 GHz (802.11a/n) wireless device that revolutionized the WISP market in its price-to-performance ratio. It integrates a dual-polarization grid antenna of 24.5 dBi directly into the radio, eliminating the need for cables and ensuring zero signal loss. It is the perfect and cost-effective solution for point-to-point links or for use as a CPE over longer distances.

Why Choose LHG 5?

Integrated Design (Zero Loss)

The fact that the antenna element is built into the wireless unit means there are no pigtail cables connecting the radio to the antenna. This completely eliminates signal losses in cables, ensuring that all power is transmitted into the air.

Wind protection (wind load)

The grid design allows wind to pass through the antenna, drastically reducing wind load compared to solid parabolic antennas. This makes the LHG 5 ideal for installation on high towers or windy areas, with a lower risk of misalignment.

High gain (24.5 dBi) at low cost

Offers an impressive gain of 24.5 dBi, allowing significant distances to be reached with a reduced investment. Supports Nv2 TDMA protocol to improve data transmission efficiency.

Easy to assemble and align

The unit is supplied unassembled for compact transport, but assembly is quick and simple. Includes mounting kit for mast and PoE injector, making installation straightforward.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

WISP CPE (Client)

Its main application. Perfect for connecting residential clients to a WISP tower at medium/long distances.

Cost-effective point-to-point (PtP) links

Excellent for creating dedicated connections between two buildings at low cost and high reliability.
mikrotik-rblhgg-60ad-wireless-wire-dish-:
MikroTik LHG 60G (RBLHGG-60ad): 60 GHz CPE for Ultra-fast links.

The MikroTik LHG 60G (product code RBLHGG-60ad) is a high-speed CPE (Customer Premises Equipment) unit designed to operate in the 60 GHz band, offering a cost-effective alternative for point-to-multipoint (PtMP) connections in clean spectrum. This equipment is ideal for connecting to a 60 GHz Access Point (such as MikroTik's wAP60G AP or wAP 60Gx3 AP models) at greater distances, being the best option for wireless connections up to 800 meters where the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands are congested and unreliable. The LHG 60G is equipped with a Gigabit Ethernet port for high-speed connections and comes with the LHGmount precision bracket and an alignment tool (Aim tool) to optimize the connection. With an ARM Quad-core CPU, the LHG 60G is a robust and efficient solution for those seeking performance in the 60 GHz range.

Why Choose the MikroTik LHG 60G?

High-speed connectivity at 60 GHz

Uses the 60 GHz band (802.11ad standard) which offers a less congested spectrum and enables very high data transfer rates, ideal for short and medium-range wireless connections (up to 800 meters).

CPE solution for point-to-multipoint networks

Designed to function as a client unit (CPE), allowing up to eight of these units to connect to a single compatible 60 GHz access point, such as MikroTik's wAP60G AP or wAP 60Gx3 AP.

Integrated and efficient antenna design

The LHG (Light Head Grid) design integrates the antenna directly into the radio, minimizing signal losses and optimizing performance. Its grid form factor offers good wind resistance.

Precise alignment made easy

The LHG 60G is supplied with the LHGmount precision mounting bracket and an Aim tool, essential for correct alignment and maximum performance on directional 60 GHz links.

PoE power and Gigabit Ethernet port

It is powered via Power over Ethernet (supports 802.3af/at and passive PoE 12-57V) through its Gigabit Ethernet port, simplifying installation with a single cable for data and power.

Ideal For whom?

The MikroTik LHG 60G is the ideal choice for:

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

Delivering high-speed Internet access to customers in Point-to-MultiPoint scenarios in the 60 GHz band, especially in dense urban areas where the 2.4/5 GHz bands are saturated.

Short/medium-distance business links

Interconnecting buildings within a corporate campus, industrial parks or for any application requiring a high-capacity wireless bridge up to 800 meters.

Fiber alternative in congested areas

When running fiber optic is expensive or impractical, and lower frequency bands (2.4/5 GHz) suffer from too much interference, the LHG 60G offers a reliable solution.

Users looking for a clean 60 GHz spectrum

For those who want to take advantage of the 60 GHz band's benefits, such as greater available bandwidth and lower susceptibility to interference common on other frequencies.
mikrotik-rbwapg-5hacd2hnd-wap-ac-black-e:
Powerful and discreet Wi-Fi, for indoors and outdoors.

The MikroTik wAP ac is a small, elegant and weatherproof wireless access point, perfect for installations outside your home, in the garden, on the balcony or anywhere that requires a robust Wi-Fi connection. This new revision comes equipped with a powerful quad-core processor, more RAM and two Gigabit Ethernet ports, offering better performance and versatility for modern networks.

Why choose wAP ac?

Competitive dual-band Wi-Fi

Offers strong simultaneous coverage on both the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands, solving most interference problems in congested environments. You can use the 2.4 GHz band for older devices while the less congested 5 GHz 802.11ac band handles streaming, gaming and other high-speed tasks.

Discreet and vandal-resistant design

Its design is elegant and built with security in mind. The wAP ac is mounted on any exterior wall from inside the enclosure, which conceals the mounting screws. The bottom can be additionally secured with a special anti-vandalism screw, which only the owner can open, ensuring a safe and discreet installation.

Dual Gigabit Ethernet ports

The inclusion of two Gigabit Ethernet ports offers greater flexibility. Use one port to receive PoE power and data connection, and use the second port to connect another wired device, such as an IP camera, without the need for an additional cable.

The power of RouterOS

Equipped with the RouterOS operating system and Level 4 license, the wAP ac is incredibly versatile. It can function as a simple access point managed by CAPsMAN, a standalone AP, a full router with firewall or even a captive portal for a public hotspot.

Ideal For whom?

Wi-Fi coverage in gardens and balconies

The perfect solution for extending your home Wi-Fi network to outdoor spaces, allowing you to enjoy a stable connection in your garden, patio or balcony.

Café and restaurant terraces

For providing high-quality Wi-Fi access to customers in the outdoor areas of your establishment, with robust, discreet equipment and hotspot features.

Surveillance and connectivity

Ideal for installation near an outdoor IP security camera, providing not only a Wi-Fi access point but also a network port for the camera itself.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-rbwapgr-5hacd2hnd-r11e-lte6-wap:
4G Cat 6 (300Mbps). Wi-Fi 5 (AC) dual band. 2 Gigabit ports.

The wAP ac LTE6 kit (RBwAPGR-LTE6-KIT) is Mikrotik's high-performance "all-in-one" solution. This weatherproof (IP54) access point (AP) combines powerful dual-band Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) (2.4/5 GHz) with a 4G LTE Category 6 modem and two Gigabit Ethernet ports. It is the ideal router for those who need fast and reliable 4G internet, both at home and abroad.

Why Choose wAP ac LTE6?

LTE Cat 6 with carrier aggregation

The Cat 6 modem is the star of the show. It allows downloads of up to 300 Mbps and, most importantly, supports Carrier Aggregation. This allows the device to use multiple LTE bands simultaneously, ensuring a faster and more stable connection, even in rural (weak signal) or urban (many users) areas.

Simultaneous dual-band Wi-Fi 5 (AC)

The device transmits on 2.4 GHz (Wi-Fi 4) and 5 GHz (Wi-Fi 5) at the same time. This allows older devices to connect while simultaneously offering high speed (up to 867 Mbps) and less interference for smartphones, smart TVs and modern computers.

Dual Gigabit ports and PoE standard (802.3af/at)

Equipped with two 10/100/1000 Ethernet ports, you can use it as the main router (with 4G backup) or connect a second device (such as an IP camera). The power supply is flexible: you can use the DC Jack (10-57V) or, even better, power it using the PoE 802.3af/at standard (18-57V) from a PoE switch.

Powerful hardware (quad-core CPU)

Equipped with a Quad-Core CPU (IPQ-4018) and 128 MB of RAM, it has the processing power needed to manage 4G, dual-band Wi-Fi and complex firewall rules in RouterOS (Level 4) with hardware IPsec acceleration.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Fixed Internet (FWA) / Backup

The perfect solution for locations without fiber optic, using 4G Cat 6 as the primary connection. Or you can use it as a failover: if your cable internet fails, 4G will automatically take over.

Access point in vehicles or boats

Thanks to its DC power supply (10-57V) and robust enclosure, it is perfect for providing high-speed dual-band Wi-Fi on buses, caravans or boats.

Outdoor access point

For providing Wi-Fi coverage (2.4 and 5GHz) in a garden, terrace or patio, using 4G as the Internet source.
mikrotik-rmk-2-10-1u-dual-or-10-rackmoun:
Organization and versatility for your server racks.

The MikroTik RMK-2/10 rack mounting kit is the smart and versatile solution for installing your compact (200 mm) routers and switches in 10 or 19-inch racks. This accessory was designed to maximize space efficiency and give a professional, organized finish to your network infrastructure, allowing multiple mounting configurations.

Why choose the RMK-2/10?

Dual 19" rack mounting

The main advantage of this kit is the ability to mount two 200 mm MikroTik devices, side by side, in a single 1U height space in a standard 19-inch rack. It is the ideal way to save space and consolidate your devices, such as CRS1xx/CRS3xx series switches, in a clean and organized manner.

Single device mounting on 10" rack

The RMK-2/10 design is modular. You can permanently remove one part of the bracket to adapt it to mount a single 200 mm device in a smaller 10-inch rack, which is common in home or small office installations.

Wide compatibility

This kit is designed to be compatible with a wide range of 200 mm wide MikroTik equipment. Popular supported models include, but are not limited to:

  • CSS610-8G-2S+IN
  • CRS109-8G-1S-2HnD-IN
  • CRS112-8G-4S-IN
  • CRS112-8P-4S-IN
  • CRS310-1G-5S-4S+IN

Ideal For whom?

MikroTik equipment users

Anyone who owns one or more compact MikroTik routers or switches (200 mm) and wants to integrate them professionally into a rack.

IT installers and professionals

Those looking for a standard solution to mount their clients' equipment, ensuring a clean, secure installation that optimizes space in the network cabinet.

Home Lab enthusiasts

Perfect for those who have a small 10" rack or want to mount multiple MikroTik devices in a compact and organized way in their 19" home lab.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-rmk-2x10-19-10-dual-rack-mount-:
RMK-2x10/19: MikroTik rack mounting kit for 2x CSS318 1U.

The MikroTik RMK-2x10/19 accessory is the smart solution for maximizing space efficiency in standard 19-inch racks. This mounting kit allows you to install two MikroTik Cloud Smart Switch CSS318-16G-2S+IN units side by side, occupying only a single height unit (1U) in your rack. Double your port capacity or processing power in the same space! With the RMK-2x10/19, your network setup becomes cleaner, more compact and better organized, avoiding the waste of valuable rack space. MikroTik highlights the simplicity of installation, saying it takes "just one click!" to snap the equipment into place. It is the ideal way to keep your installation organized without sacrificing density and capacity.
mikrotik-rose-data-server-rds-rds2216-2x:
MikroTik RDS2216: Enterprise Data Server with RouterOS, NVMe storage and 100G networking.

The MikroTik RouterOS Data Server (RDS2216-2XG-4S+4XS-2XQ) is a complete high-performance platform designed to revolutionize enterprise environments, integrating ultra-fast storage, cutting-edge network connectivity and container computing power into a single solution. Equipped with a powerful 16-core 2 GHz ARM CPU, 32 GB DDR4 ECC RAM and a special edition of RouterOS v7 optimized for storage and computing (ROSE), the RDS2216 was built to handle the most demanding workloads. It offers impressive storage capacity with 20 U.2 NVMe bays (PCIe Gen3) and 2 M.2 SATA slots, complemented by a wide range of high-speed network interfaces: 2x 100G QSFP28 ports, 4x 25G SFP28 ports, 4x 10G SFP+ ports, 2x Multi-Gigabit Ethernet ports (1G/2.5G/5G/10G) and a dedicated Gigabit Ethernet management interface. With dual redundant hot-swap power supplies and an energy-efficient design, the RDS2216 is the ideal solution for enterprises looking to consolidate their infrastructure, reduce costs, increase performance and maintain full control over their data and services, from self-hosted private cloud to database clusters and container infrastructure.

Why Choose the MikroTik RDS2216?

Unified high-performance platform

Consolidate your networking, storage and computing needs into a single device. The powerful 16-core ARM CPU, 32 GB ECC RAM and RouterOS (ROSE) optimizations ensure performance for routing, NVMe-TCP storage, virtualization and containers.

Ultra-fast and scalable NVMe storage

With 20 U.2 NVMe PCIe Gen3 bays (supporting up to 16 Gbps per drive, with a total bus of 128 Gbps to the CPU) and 2 M.2 SATA slots, it offers massive, low-latency storage capacity, ideal for databases, high-speed backups or S3-compatible cloud storage (e.g., MinIO). Supports RAID and block device export via NVMe-TCP.

Next-generation network connectivity (100G/25G/10G)

Built for the fastest networks, it features 2x 100G QSFP28 ports, 4x 25G SFP28 ports, 4x 10G SFP+ ports, 2x Multi-Gigabit Ethernet ports (up to 10G) and an additional SFF-8644 interface. The 98DX4310 switch chip offers L3 hardware offloading capabilities.

RouterOS with Enterprise Capabilities (Level 6 License)

The special ROSE edition of RouterOS v7 (Level 6 License) offers all the advanced networking features (BGP, OSPF, MPLS, VPNs, firewall, QoS) and adds optimized storage features, including encryption layers and modular configurations for scalable infrastructures. Supports TCG-Opal for self-encrypting drives.

Container and virtualization ready

Ideal for running OCI-compatible containerized applications such as MinIO, Nextcloud, Shinobi, Frigate or even VMs. Built-in swap support and two USB 3.0/2.0 ports provide additional flexibility for memory-intensive applications or peripheral devices.

Reliability and energy efficiency

Two hot-swap redundant power supplies ensure continuous operation. Despite its enormous capacity, the RDS2216 was designed to be energy-efficient, with optimized typical power consumption reflected in its eco-friendly design.

Ideal For whom?

The MikroTik RouterOS Data Server (RDS2216) is ideal for:

Enterprises seeking data sovereignty

Organizations that want to host their own cloud services (S3 storage with MinIO, collaboration with Nextcloud), databases (PostgreSQL, MariaDB), or even private social networks (Pixelfed, Matrix), maintaining full control over their data and infrastructure.

IT and private cloud service providers

For building scalable, high-performance computing and storage platforms for clients, with the flexibility and control of RouterOS and without subscription costs or pay-per-access fees.

Environments with high storage and network demands

Data centers, multimedia production studios, research institutions or any scenario requiring ultra-fast NVMe storage and 25G/100G network connectivity.

Scalable container infrastructure deployment

For running and managing containerized workloads, automating processes and building distributed systems, leveraging OCI container support and RouterOS networking capabilities.

Storage expansion for branch offices

Allows routers in branch offices (such as the hAP ax²) to mount storage via NFS, SMB or NVMe-TCP, centralizing data and backups without the need for extensive local storage at each router.
mikrotik-routerboard-1100ahx4-level-6-ra:
Quad-Core performance, Total reliability.

The MikroTik RB1100AHx4 is a 1U rack-mount router featuring a powerful 1.4 GHz Cortex A15 quad-core processor, capable of reaching a maximum throughput of up to 7.5 Gbps. Designed for enterprise and Internet Service Provider (ISP) networks, this device offers exceptional performance, hardware acceleration for IPsec and multiple redundant power options, ensuring continuous high-speed operation.

Why choose the RB1100AHx4?

High-performance Quad-Core processor

Its 1.4 GHz quad-core Annapurna Labs CPU was designed for maximum performance. With the ability to process up to 7.5 Gigabits of traffic per second, it is the ideal choice for networks with high data volumes and complex routing rules.

Hardware acceleration for IPsec

Security does not have to slow your network down. The RB1100AHx4 supports hardware IPsec encryption acceleration, allowing you to create secure, high-speed VPN tunnels that outperform any previous RouterBOARD.

Full redundant power feed

Designed for mission-critical reliability, this router is equipped with two redundant IEC power supplies. It also supports powering via PoE 802.3at and through a telecommunications DC connector (-48V), offering multiple layers of redundancy to ensure you are never offline.

Gigabit ports and Ethernet Bypass

With 13 individual Gigabit Ethernet ports, you have ample connectivity for your network. Ports 11 and 12 feature hardware bypass functionality, which in the event of a power failure creates a direct connection between them, maintaining main link connectivity.

Ideal For whom?

Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and enterprise networks

As a core or aggregation router, capable of handling high volumes of customer traffic, BGP, OSPF and high-speed VPN tunnels, with the reliability of dual power supplies.

Companies that need fast VPNs

Hardware acceleration for IPsec makes it the perfect solution for connecting offices (site-to-site VPN) or for providing secure remote access to a large number of employees.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-routerboard-260gs-5-port-gigabi:
The intelligence of a managed switch, with the simplicity you're looking for.

The MikroTik CSS106-5G-1S is a compact "smart switch", ideal for small home or office networks (SOHO). This device combines five Gigabit Ethernet ports and one SFP port for fiber optic connectivity, all managed by SwOS, an operating system designed specifically for MikroTik switches. It offers the essential features of a managed switch, with simple and intuitive configuration through your web browser.

Why choose the MikroTik CSS106-5G-1S?

Simplified Management with SwOS

SwOS was designed to be easy to use. Access all features through a simple web interface in your browser. You don't need to be a networking expert to configure the most important features of a managed switch.

Fiber connectivity with SFP port

A professional-grade feature in a SOHO switch. The SFP port allows you to use fiber optic modules (sold separately) to create a long-distance uplink to another switch or router, ideal for interconnecting buildings or for environments with significant electrical interference.

Essential layer 2 features

Take full control of your network. With SwOS, you can manage port-to-port routing, apply MAC address filters to increase security, configure VLANs to segment your network, mirror traffic for analysis, limit bandwidth per port, and much more.

Compact design and flexible power

Its compact desktop form factor and passive cooling make it completely silent and ideal for any office or home environment. For greater installation flexibility, it can be powered through the traditional DC connector or via passive PoE on the first port.

Ideal For whom?

Small offices (SOHO)

The perfect choice for those who need features such as VLANs to separate the guest network from the internal network, or apply QoS to prioritize voice traffic (VoIP), all in a simple and cost-effective way.

Advanced home users

For those who want greater control over their home network, with the ability to segment devices, limit bandwidth, and the advantage of being able to experience a fiber optic connection.

Installations requiring a fiber uplink

An extremely cost-effective solution for connecting a small group of devices via copper cable and connecting to the rest of the network via fiber over long distances, avoiding signal degradation issues.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-routerboard-411u-level-4-rb411u:
The ultra-versatile platform for your products.

The RouterBOARD RB411U is a versatile and very compact router board, designed to be the heart of custom network solutions. Equipped with a miniPCI slot, a miniPCIe slot with SIM card support, and a USB port, this board offers exceptional expansion flexibility. With the full power of the RouterOS operating system, it can be a router, a firewall, a bandwidth manager, or a 3G mobile router — all at the same time.

Why choose the RouterBOARD RB411U?

Dual expansion with miniPCI and miniPCIe

Its main advantage is enormous expansion flexibility. Use the miniPCI slot to add a Wi-Fi radio card of your choice and the miniPCIe slot to add a 3G modem, creating a multi-technology wireless router with failover support.

Built-in 3G modem support

The board includes a SIM card slot integrated directly onboard, which works in conjunction with the miniPCIe slot. This makes creating a compact mobile 3G gateway extremely simple, ideal for mobility applications or for Internet backup connections.

The Power of RouterOS (Level 4)

With a RouterOS Level 4 license, the configuration possibilities are immense. You can set it up as an access point (AP) with a miniPCI card, a top-of-the-line router, a firewall, a bandwidth manager (QoS), a VPN server, and much more, managing all interfaces professionally.

Ideal For whom?

System integrators and "do-it-yourself" builders

The primary audience. Indispensable for those who build their own custom routers or access points and need the flexibility to choose their own radio cards and modems.

Building 3G mobile gateways

Perfect for creating connectivity solutions for vehicles, kiosks, or remote locations that depend on Internet connectivity through the 3G mobile network.

IoT and M2M products

As the brain of a gateway for the Internet of Things, using the various expansion slots for different communication technologies (e.g., Wi-Fi for the local network, 3G for cloud connectivity).

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-routerboard-433ah-level-5-rb433:
The classic WISP platform. 3 miniPCI slots. Level 5 license.

The RB433AH is one of Mikrotik's most popular and reliable RouterBOARDs, designed to be the "centerpiece" of serious networks. With 3x miniPCI slots and 3x 10/100 Ethernet ports, it offers enormous flexibility for building custom devices. This "AH" (Advanced High-speed) version is a direct upgrade of the RB433, coming with more RAM (**128 MB**) and a much faster Atheros CPU (**680MHz**), making it the perfect choice for networks that need to manage multiple radios and complex rules.

Why Choose the RB433AH?

Massive expansion (3x miniPCI)

Its main asset. The 3 miniPCI slots allow you to create a "made-to-measure" device. You can install 3 radios (e.g., 3x 2.4 GHz for sectoral APs) or any combination of wireless cards (Wi-Fi, 3G/LTE) that your product requires.

RouterOS Level 5 License

The Level 5 (L5) license unlocks the true potential for WISPs. It allows a greater number of VPN tunnels (EoIP, PPPoE, etc.) and hotspot users, and is essential for using the board as a sectoral Access Point (AP).

"AH" upgrade (680MHz CPU and 128MB RAM)

The "AH" version has double the RAM (128 MB vs 64 MB) and a faster CPU (680 MHz vs 300 MHz) compared to the original RB433. This is crucial for managing traffic from 3 radios simultaneously and running scripts or Metarouter.

microSD slot (extra storage)

The microSD slot makes it easy to add storage for Webproxy cache, logs, The Dude, or even Metarouter (virtual machines), increasing the board's versatility.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This RouterBOARD is the ideal choice for:

WISP Access Point (AP)

Its #1 application. Combine it with 3 R52n (miniPCI) cards and 3 sectoral antennas to create a robust 3-sector tower AP (2.4 GHz or 5 GHz).

Multi-WAN Router/Firewall

Use the 3 miniPCI slots for 3 3G/4G modems, creating a router with failover or aggregation of 3 mobile WAN connections, plus the 3 Ethernet ports.

Custom network products

For any scenario that requires a specific combination of radios and ports that does not exist in a "closed" product.
mikrotik-routerboard-433uahl-level-5-rb4:
The modular platform. 3x miniPCI + 1x USB. "AH" power.

The RB433UAHL is the "Swiss Army knife" of modular RouterBOARDs. It combines the power of the "AH" processor (Atheros 680MHz and 128MB RAM) with the flexibility of 3x miniPCI slots and a USB port. It is the perfect platform for building custom network solutions, such as sectoral APs, firewalls, or multi-WAN routers (with 3G/LTE via USB).

Why Choose the RB433UAHL?

Maximum expansion (3x miniPCI)

Its main advantage. The 3 miniPCI slots offer complete freedom. You can create a tower Access Point (AP) with 3-sector radios, or a dual-band AP (2.4/5GHz) and still have a free slot for a 3G/LTE modem (though USB is more common for this).

"AH" performance (680MHz/128MB RAM)

The "AH" (Advanced High-speed) version comes equipped with a powerful 680MHz CPU and 128MB of RAM. This "horsepower" is essential for managing traffic from 3 radios simultaneously, along with firewall rules, queues, and VPN tunnels.

USB flexibility (the "U")

The USB 2.0 port (Type A) allows you to connect a 3G/LTE modem, turning the board into a Multi-WAN router with failover, or connect a USB drive/stick for log storage, cache, or The Dude.

RouterOS Level 4

With a Level 4 license, this board is ready to be used as a WISP access point (AP), CPE, or router/firewall for a small business. (Supports AP mode, PPPoE, PPTP, L2TP, etc.).

Ideal For which scenarios?

This RouterBOARD is the ideal choice for:

Sectoral WISP APs

The classic application. Combine this board with 3 miniPCI radios (e.g., R52n) and 3 sectoral antennas in an outdoor enclosure (such as the CA433U) to create a tower AP.

Multi-WAN Router (Failover)

Use a 10/100 port for the primary WAN and the USB port with a 4G/LTE modem for a backup connection. Use the miniPCI slots to create your dual-band Wi-Fi access point.

Backhauls and Repeaters

Use one radio for a PtP link (backhaul) and the other two for local APs.
mikrotik-routerboard-44ge-pci-ex-4-port-:
4 Gigabit Ports. 1 PCIe 4X slot. Maximum Expansion.

The RB44Ge is Mikrotik's Gigabit expansion card designed for maximum port density. This card (PCIe 4X form factor) adds 4 Gigabit Ethernet ports (10/100/1000T) to your router or server, using only one PCIe slot. It is the perfect solution for those who need more ports without sacrificing valuable slots, ensuring that the PCIe bus speed is not a bottleneck.

Why Choose the RB44Ge?

Maximum port density (4 in 1)

Adds 4 Gigabit Ethernet 10/100/1000T ports using a single PCIe 4X slot. Ideal for building powerful routers (such as the RB800) or servers that require multiple network interfaces.

PCIe 4X performance

By using the PCIe bus, the RB44Ge ensures that all 4 ports have maximum available throughput, without the limitations of older buses, maximizing your network performance.

Universal compatibility (RouterOS, Windows, Linux)

This card is not only for RouterOS. It is fully compatible with Windows and Linux (based on the Atheros AR8131/M chipset), making it an excellent option for servers (firewall, virtualization) based on these operating systems.

Ready to install (4U bracket included)

The card already includes a long 4U bracket, ready to be installed in standard servers.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This network card is the ideal choice for:

Router builders (RouterOS)

Perfect for expanding a RouterBOARD (such as the RB800) or a PC Router (x86) to maximum Gigabit ports, ideal for WISPs and corporate networks.

Servers and Firewalls (Linux/Windows)

Ideal for Windows or Linux servers acting as firewalls (pfSense, OPNsense), gateways, or virtualization hosts (Proxmox, ESXi), where port density is crucial.
mikrotik-routerboard-502-daughterboard-f:
Pure Expansion. +2 miniPCI slots. Exclusive to the RB800.

The Mikrotik RB502 is a daughterboard (expansion card) with a single purpose: to maximize the potential of your RB800 platform. This board adds two miniPCI slots to your RouterBOARD, allowing expansion from 4 to a total of six miniPCI slots. It is the ideal solution for creating high-density multi-radio access points (APs).

Why Choose the RB502?

Push the RB800 to its limit (6 slots)

The RB800 is a powerful platform with 4 slots. The RB502 lets you harness the full potential of the RB800 CPU by adding two more radios. This allows you to create a tower AP with multiple sectors and backhauls, all managed by a single board.

Perfect Integration

As an official daughterboard, the RB502 was designed to connect seamlessly to the RB800's expansion connectors, ensuring reliable and straightforward hardware integration.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This daughterboard is the ideal choice for:

WISPs (Wireless Internet Service Providers)

For building custom tower APs that require more than four radios (e.g., 4x 5 GHz sectors + 2x 2.4 GHz OMNI).

Radio aggregators

For special products that need to add the maximum number of wireless connections to a single RouterBOARD.

Content creators or professionals who need to wirelessly transfer large multimedia files to a NAS or server, benefiting from the high speeds of Wi-Fi 6 and the 2.5G Ethernet port.
mikrotik-routerboard-hap-l4-rb951ui-2nd:
The perfect solution for your home network.

The MikroTik hAP (RB951Ui-2nD) is the ideal access point for your home or small office. Based on the popular RB951-2n, the new hAP is an improvement in several areas, offering a faster processor and more RAM. It is an "all-in-one" device that combines the features of a router, a 5-port switch and a wireless access point, all in a small and discreet form factor.

Why choose the MikroTik hAP?

Multi-function functionality

hAP is the complete solution for your home network. It works as a router for your Internet connection, as a switch for connecting your wired devices and as an access point for your wireless network. Everything you need in a compact box.

PoE output on port 5

One of its most convenient features is the Power over Ethernet (PoE) output capability on the fifth port. This allows you to power another network device, such as a second access point or IP camera, directly from the router, without the need for an additional power adapter for that device.

Wi-Fi and wired connectivity

The integrated 2.4 GHz dual-chain wireless access point provides reliable coverage for your mobile devices. The 5 10/100 Ethernet ports allow you to connect wired equipment, such as computers, gaming consoles or Smart TVs.

USB port for expansion

The full-size USB port increases the versatility of the hAP. You can use it to connect a 3G/4G modem for a backup (failover) Internet connection or to connect an external storage drive for file sharing on your network.

Ideal For whom?

Home users

The perfect choice for networking a house or apartment. It comes pre-configured from the factory — just connect the internet cable and power supply to start using it. Its small and discreet design looks great in any environment.

Small offices (SOHO)

A complete and low-cost solution for a small office, capable of managing Internet connection, wired network and wireless network, with the flexibility of the RouterOS operating system.

Tech enthusiasts

For those who like to have more advanced control over their network. With RouterOS, you can configure firewalls, QoS, VPNs and much more, exploring professional-level features.

mikrotik-routerboard-hap-lite-l4-rb941-2:

The MikroTik hAP lite is the ideal device for your apartment, home or small office. This small and discreet router is equipped with a powerful 650 MHz CPU, 32 MB of RAM, a 2.4 GHz dual-chain wireless radio and four Fast Ethernet ports. And, of course, it runs the powerful RouterOS operating system with all its features: bandwidth shaping, firewall, user access control and much more.

Why choose the MikroTik hAP lite?

Multi-function functionality

hAP lite is the complete solution for your home network. It works as a router for your Internet connection, as a switch for connecting your wired devices and as an access point for your wireless network. Everything you need in a compact box.

Simple Wi-Fi connectivity with WPS

Supports button-activated WPS for the convenience of not having to type a complicated password every time someone wants to access the Internet wirelessly. It can also be configured to switch to cAP mode and join a centrally managed CAPsMAN network with the press of a button.

RouterOS power and flexibility

Don't be fooled by the size and price. The hAP lite runs the RouterOS operating system with a Level 4 license, giving access to professional-level features. Configure firewalls, QoS to prioritize traffic, parental controls, VPNs and much more.

Home users

The perfect choice for networking a house or apartment. It comes pre-configured from the factory — just connect the internet cable and power supply to start using it. Its small and discreet design looks great in any environment.

The ideal access point for your home or office.

The hAP lite TC (RB941-2nD-TC) is a small and versatile router from MikroTik, perfect for your apartment, home or office. Combining efficient hardware with the unlimited flexibility of the RouterOS operating system, this device offers a robust and affordable home network solution.

Why choose the hAP lite TC?

Simplicity with the WPS button

For your convenience, the hAP lite supports button-activated WPS. This allows your guests to access your Wi-Fi network without needing to enter complicated passwords, making the process quick and simple for everyone.

Power and Control with RouterOS

Don't be fooled by the size. This device runs the RouterOS operating system with all its professional features, including bandwidth shaping, firewall, user access control and much more. All this with a Level 4 license.

Efficient hardware for everyday life

The hAP lite is equipped with a powerful 650 MHz CPU and 32 MB of RAM, ensuring smooth performance for daily tasks. It includes integrated 2.4 GHz dual-chain Wi-Fi and four Fast Ethernet ports for your wired devices.

Centralized management made easy

For larger networks, the hAP lite can be configured to "cAP" mode with a simple button press. This allows the device to join a network centrally managed by a CAPsMAN (Controlled Access Point System Manager), simplifying the management of multiple access points.

Home users

mikrotik-routerboard-hex-2024-e50ug-e50u:
Small in size, Giant in performance.

The MikroTik hEX (E50UG) is a compact but extremely powerful router designed for advanced home networks and small offices (SOHO) that demand more than a conventional router. Equipped with a powerful dual-core ARM processor, 512 MB of RAM and 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports, this device delivers robust performance. Its great advantage lies in the unlimited flexibility of the RouterOS v7 operating system, which transforms it into a true professional network management tool.

Why choose the MikroTik hEX?

Top-level performance

The heart of the new hEX is its 950 MHz dual-core ARM processor and 512 MB of RAM, which give it the capacity to handle demanding tasks. Hardware acceleration for IPsec encryption ensures that your VPN connections are not only secure, but also extremely fast, without overloading the main CPU.

The infinite power of RouterOS v7

With the RouterOS Level 4 license, the possibilities are almost unlimited. Configure advanced firewall rules, create VLANs to segment your network, establish multiple VPN tunnels (WireGuard, OpenVPN, IPsec) for remote access, set up a Hotspot or use QoS to prioritize traffic for video calls or gaming. It's total control of your network.

Versatile connectivity

The 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports allow you to connect all your devices via cable at maximum speed. The Type A USB port adds even more flexibility, allowing you to connect a 4G/LTE modem for a backup (failover) Internet connection or an external storage drive for file sharing over the network.

Compact and silent design

The hEX maintains its iconic compact desktop form factor. Its passive cooling system ensures completely silent operation, making it perfect for any home or office environment without causing distractions.

Ideal For whom?

Advanced home networks (power users)

For the technology enthusiast who wants absolute control over their home network, with the ability to create VLANs, detailed firewall rules and configure VPNs to securely access their network from anywhere in the world.

Small offices (SOHO)

Works as an extremely robust and secure internet gateway and firewall for a small business, capable of reliably managing the network with features that are normally only found in much more expensive equipment.

Student Networks and Labs

An affordable and incredibly powerful platform for learning, testing and experimenting with advanced RouterOS networking concepts used in corporate and ISP environments.
