mikrotik-routerboard-hex-poe-rb960pgs:
The Compact Router with Integrated Power.

The MikroTik hEX PoE is a five-port Gigabit Ethernet router designed for locations where wireless connectivity is not needed, but power and flexibility are essential. This compact and affordable device comes equipped with a powerful CPU, an SFP port for fiber connections and, most importantly, the ability to power other PoE devices. It is the perfect solution to simplify your installations, reducing the number of cables and power adapters.

Why choose the MikroTik hEX PoE?

Four ports with PoE output

Simplify your wiring. Ports 2 to 5 offer passive PoE output, allowing you to power other compatible devices, such as access points, IP cameras or other routers, directly from the hEX PoE. Fewer power adapters and fewer cables mean a cleaner and more organised installation.

Gigabit and Fiber Connectivity (SFP)

In addition to the five Gigabit Ethernet ports, the hEX PoE includes an SFP port for fiber optic connections. Use it for a high-speed uplink to your main switch or for a long-distance connection, adding a professional-level connectivity tier to this compact router.

Robust Performance with RouterOS

Despite its small size, the hEX PoE comes with a powerful 800 MHz CPU, capable of running all the advanced configurations that RouterOS supports. With the Level 4 license, you can configure complex firewalls, QoS, VPNs and much more, providing full control over your network.

USB port for expansion

The full-size USB 2.0 port further increases the device's versatility. It can be used to connect a 3G/4G modem for a backup Internet connection or to add an external storage drive to your network.

Ideal For whom?

Small offices (SOHO)

A complete solution perfect for a small office. Works as the main router and can directly power up to four access points or IP phones, simplifying network infrastructure.

IP video surveillance installers

For small CCTV installations, the hEX PoE can serve as the router and power source for up to four IP cameras, reducing the cost and complexity of the system.

Power users and Home Labs

For those looking for a powerful desktop router with the ability to power other network devices, such as a ceiling-mount access point or a Raspberry Pi with a PoE adapter, all managed by the flexibility of RouterOS.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-routerboard-iamp1e-minipci-expr:
Reuse old cards. miniPCI-e to PC. Simple Adapter.

The Mikrotik IAMP1E is a simple adapter to solve a specific problem: allowing the use of miniPCI-e wireless cards in standard PCI-e slots in a desktop PC. It is the ideal solution for reusing wireless cards (such as the R52n or others from laptops) in a regular computer, for example, to build a PC-Router running RouterOS.

Critical compatibility notes:
1. Wireless only: This adapter is for Wi-Fi cards only. Does not support 3G/LTE modems (no SIM slot).
2. NO new cards: This adapter is NOT compatible with the new R11e series cards.

Why Choose the IAMP1E?

Hardware reuse

Give new life to miniPCIe wireless cards from old RouterBOARDs or broken laptops, converting them to the desktop PCI-e form factor.

Plug and Play Installation

The IAMP1E is a passive adapter. It requires absolutely no drivers to work. Your PC will detect the miniPCIe wireless card as if it were native.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This adapter is the ideal choice for:

PCs with RouterOS (x86)

For building a PC as a Mikrotik x86 router and adding Wi-Fi capability using old miniPCIe cards.

Testing and lab work

For technicians who need to quickly test miniPCIe wireless cards in a desktop PC.
mikrotik-routerboard-l41g-2axd-hap-ax-li:
Wi-Fi 6. Gigabit Ports. Unbeatable price.

The hAP ax lite (L41G-2axD) is Mikrotik's "tiny" solution that redefines value. It's the answer for those who need to cut costs without sacrificing performance. Equipped with the Gen6 AX (Wi-Fi 6) wireless chip and 4 Gigabit Ethernet ports, this router squeezes the 2.4 GHz spectrum "like a lemon", offering speed increases of up to 90% compared to Wi-Fi 5.

Why Choose the hAP ax lite?

The leap to Wi-Fi 6 (AX)

The Gen6 AX chip enables the use of the 802.11ax standard at 2.4 GHz. This means greater efficiency, better management of multiple devices (OFDMA) and a speed increase that can reach 90% in congested environments.

Finally, Gigabit Ports in the Lite Series!

The "bottleneck" of previous hAP lite models has been resolved. The L41G-2axD comes equipped with 4 Gigabit Ethernet ports, allowing you to take full advantage of your fibre optic speeds and the new AX Wi-Fi, without limitations.

Modern and efficient hardware

With 256 MB of RAM, a Dual-Core ARM CPU (IPQ-5010) at 800 MHz and a dual-chain antenna with higher gain (up to 4.3 dBi), this router has the processing power needed for RouterOS v7 and to manage networks stably.

Mikrotik reliability

Despite the price, it is not a typical home router. It has been tested to operate at ambient temperatures from -40°C to 70°C, ensuring the reliability Mikrotik is known for.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This router is the ideal choice for:

Hotels and offices (scalability)

Its unbeatable price, compact size and centralized management (CAPsMAN) make it perfect for scalable installations with dozens of units.

Travel router

It's tiny, takes up no space in your bag and allows you to create your own secure Wi-Fi network in a hotel room, bypassing restrictive guest networks.

RouterOS entry point

The cheapest way to have a Mikrotik router with modern hardware (AX and Gigabit) to learn and manage your home or small office network with RouterOS v7 (Level 4).
mikrotik-routerboard-l41g-2axd-fg621-ea-:
MikroTik hAP ax lite LTE6: Wi-Fi 6 Router with LTE Cat6 and 4xGbE.

The MikroTik hAP ax lite LTE6 (model L41G-2axD&FG621-EA) is MikroTik's latest home access point, combining the efficiency of Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) in the 2.4 GHz band with the reliable connectivity of an integrated Category 6 LTE modem. This compact and affordable router is designed to offer a robust network solution for homes and small offices (SOHO), especially in locations where wired Internet may not be the best option or where a backup mobile connection is desired. Equipped with a dual-core ARM CPU, 256 MB of RAM and four Gigabit Ethernet ports, the hAP ax lite LTE6 can handle the demands of a modern network. The LTE Cat6 modem supports carrier aggregation, enabling download speeds of up to 300 Mbps and upload speeds of 50 Mbps, and delivers better performance in congested or weak-signal environments. With the powerful RouterOS v7 and a Level 4 license, this device offers advanced network control and customisation, including secure VPNs, bandwidth shaping and firewall. It is a great-value solution for those seeking the freedom of LTE connectivity combined with the benefits of Wi-Fi 6.

Why Choose the MikroTik hAP ax lite LTE6?

Freedom with LTE Cat6 connectivity

With an integrated Category 6 LTE modem, the hAP ax lite LTE6 allows you to achieve consistent speeds of up to 300 Mbps download and 50 Mbps upload. It supports carrier aggregation, meaning you can use multiple LTE bands simultaneously for a faster and more reliable connection, especially advantageous in areas with many LTE users or weaker signal.

Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) in the 2.4 GHz band

The addition of Wi-Fi 6 to the traditional 2.4 GHz band significantly improves speed and efficiency. With a 4.3 dBi dual-chain antenna, you can expect a speed increase of up to 90% compared to previous Wi-Fi standards at this frequency, providing a better experience for your wireless devices.

Capable hardware for SOHO networks

Equipped with a dual-core ARM CPU and 256 MB of RAM, this router can solidly manage the needs of a home or small office network. Four Gigabit Ethernet ports provide fast wired connectivity for PCs, gaming consoles, NAS or other devices.

RouterOS v7 Level 4 - Full control

The hAP ax lite LTE6 runs the latest RouterOS v7 with a Level 4 license, providing access to a wide range of network features. Configure secure VPN tunnels for remote work, define detailed firewall rules, adjust bandwidth to prioritize traffic, control user access and much more, all with no additional subscription costs.

Compact design and convenient power

With a compact and discreet design, it fits easily into any home or office environment. Power is supplied via a USB Type C port (5V, power adapter included), simplifying installation.

Ideal For whom?

The MikroTik hAP ax lite LTE6 is ideal for:

Homes and Offices with Limited Fixed Internet Access

An excellent solution for locations where cable internet is slow, unstable or unavailable, but where there is good LTE mobile network coverage. It can serve as the primary Internet connection.

Internet backup (failover) solutions

To ensure continuous connectivity, the hAP ax lite LTE6 can be configured as a backup connection that is automatically activated if the primary Internet connection fails.

Users requiring mobility or temporary installations

Perfect for holiday homes, temporary events or any situation requiring a quickly deployable and easily transported internet solution.

Small businesses and mobile point-of-sale

To provide reliable connectivity to small businesses, kiosks or mobile point-of-sale terminals that depend on an Internet connection for their operations.

MikroTik and RouterOS enthusiasts

For those looking for an affordable router with an integrated LTE modem and all the advanced features and flexibility of RouterOS v7.
mikrotik-routerboard-lhg-lte18-kit-lhggm:
Great distances, Even greater speed.

The MikroTik LHG LTE18 kit is the "last mile" internet solution for the most remote areas, designed to work in situations where even your mobile phone may not have signal. This device combines a high-gain grid antenna with a cutting-edge Category 18 LTE modem, allowing you to connect to cell towers in extreme rural locations and achieve speeds of up to 1 Gbps.

Why choose the LHG LTE18 kit?

Gigabit speeds with LTE Category 18

The LTE Category 18 modem (up to 1.2 Gbps) enables "carrier aggregation", meaning the simultaneous use of multiple frequency bands. This is a huge advantage in areas with many LTE users, resulting in better responsiveness and greater efficiency in weak-signal field situations. We have seen Internet speeds double in rural areas after switching to carrier aggregation.

High-gain grid antenna (17 dBi)

Thanks to its large 17 dBi high-gain antenna, the LHG LTE18 kit can connect to mobile phone towers in extreme rural locations where nothing else is available. The grid design withstands adverse and windy weather conditions, and the large heat sink prevents overheating.

High-speed Internet where mobile phones fail

This is a "last mile" internet solution for situations where even your mobile phone may not have signal. Don't wait for cable or satellite network providers to reach you — choose the LHG LTE18 kit and stay always connected!

Ideal For whom?

Rural Areas and Remote Locations

The definitive solution for those who live or work outside fibre or ADSL coverage areas, but within range of a mobile phone tower. The LHG LTE18 can transform a minimal signal into a high-speed broadband connection.

Enterprise-grade backup (failover)

For businesses where the Internet is critical, the LHG LTE18 offers a cellular backup connection that is fast enough to keep the entire business running without significant performance drops should the primary connection fail.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-routerboard-lhgg-lte7-kit-lhggr:
Rural internet. LTE Cat7 modem. 17 dBi antenna.

The MikroTik LHGG LTE7 kit (LHGGR&R11e-LTE7) was designed to provide reliable Internet access in the most remote locations. It can be mounted outdoors on a pole or mast, and can establish strong connections to mobile network towers, even in areas where regular cell phones fail and have no signal.

Why Choose the LHGG LTE7 kit?

LTE Cat7 speeds: doubled upload

Say goodbye to slow connections. The integrated LTE Category 7 modem allows you to reach download speeds of up to 300 Mbps and an impressive upload of 100 Mbps. This doubled uplink capacity is what makes it the ideal tool for transferring large files while working remotely, managing VPN networks, or streaming video surveillance footage in rural areas.

Robust, wind-resistant grid design

To ensure "it was just the wind" never becomes a problem for your network, this kit uses a 17 dBi high-gain grid-format antenna, which drastically reduces wind load on the structure. Paired with a large heat sink and a durable housing, it operates perfectly in harsh climates from -40°C to +70°C.

Powerful processing and Gigabit port

The LHGG LTE7 is not just an antenna — it is a full router (RouterOS v7) powered by an 800 MHz Dual-Core ARM processor and 256 MB of RAM. Data is sent from the mast to the building through a Gigabit Ethernet port, which also supports power input via PoE-In (802.3af/at), making cabling tremendously easier.
mikrotik-routerboard-netmetal5-802-11a-n:
The 5 GHz AC "Beast". Super high power (1.3 W). Metal enclosure. SFP port.

The NetMetal 5 SHP ac (RB921UAGS-5SHPacD-NM) is the "heavy artillery" of 5GHz radios. It is an outdoor platform designed for maximum power and reliability. It combines a Super High Power (1.3W / 31dBm) Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) radio with a robust aluminum enclosure (IP54) that acts as a heat sink. With 2x RP-SMA connectors, 1x Gigabit port, 1x SFP port and 1x USB, it is the perfect base for sector APs or long-distance PtP links.

Why Choose the NetMetal 5 SHP ac?

Super High Power (1.3W / 31dBm)

Its standout feature. The 31dBm (1.3 Watts) output allows you to push the 5GHz signal farther and stronger than most APs. Ideal for long-distance point-to-point (PtP) links or for sector APs that need maximum penetration and coverage.

Metal enclosure (heat sink)

The robust aluminum enclosure (IP54) is not just for protection. It acts as a giant heat sink, allowing the 1.3 W radio to operate stably even on the hottest days, without overheating.

GbE + SFP connectivity

The NetMetal 5 SHP ac does not limit you. It has a Gigabit Ethernet port (for passive PoE input of 8-30 V) and a dedicated SFP port. This allows you to connect the radio directly to a fiber optic backhaul, eliminating cable bottlenecks and increasing the network connection distance.

RP-SMA connectors (Flexibility)

This version (NM) comes with 2 standard female RP-SMA connectors, giving you complete freedom to choose the antenna (sector, parabolic, omni) that best fits your scenario, optimizing your link.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Long-range WISP sector APs

The number 1 application. Combine the 1.3 W output with a 5 GHz sector antenna (2x2 MIMO) to create a tower AP with unmatched coverage and signal penetration.

High-power point-to-point (PtP) links

Connect this radio to a high-gain parabolic (dish) antenna to create long-distance PtP links, where the 31dBm output is crucial for keeping the link stable.

Fiber backhaul installations

Perfect for tower or remote site installations where the backhaul is done via fiber optic. Connect the fiber directly to the NetMetal SFP port.
mikrotik-routerboard-powerbox-pro-5-port:
The power and connectivity hub for outdoor use.

The MikroTik PowerBox Pro is a five-port Gigabit Ethernet router housed in a weatherproof enclosure, ideal for mounting on towers or other outdoor locations. Its main advantage is the Power over Ethernet (PoE) output capability on four of its ports. Combined with its SFP port for fiber connectivity and a powerful CPU, it is the perfect "all-in-one" solution for your outdoor installations.

Why choose the PowerBox Pro?

Four ports with PoE output (af/at)

Drastically simplify your cabling. Ports 2 through 5 can power other PoE-compatible devices, such as access points, IP cameras, or other radios. It supports passive PoE and 802.3af/at standards (requires a 48-57V power supply), making it extremely versatile.

Fiber connectivity with SFP port

In addition to the five Gigabit Ethernet ports, the PowerBox Pro includes an SFP port for fiber optic connections. Use it to create a long-distance uplink, immune to electrical interference, to your main switch.

Powerful and feature-rich

Despite its size, it comes with a powerful 800MHz CPU, capable of running all the advanced configurations that RouterOS supports. With a Level 4 license, you can configure complex firewalls, QoS, VPNs and much more, giving you full control over your outdoor network.

Ideal For whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

The perfect solution for small tower installations. It can serve as the site's main router and directly power up to four sector or point-to-point radios, with a fiber uplink to the core network.

IP video surveillance installations

For small outdoor CCTV installations, the PowerBox Pro can serve as both router and power source for up to four IP cameras, reducing system cost and complexity.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-routerboard-r52hnd-802-11a-b-g-:
The WISP "Workhorse". Selectable dual-band. 400mW (26dBm).

The R52HnD is the legendary high-performance and reliability miniPCI card from Mikrotik. As an upgrade to the popular R52Hn, this card (Wi-Fi 4, 802.11a/b/g/n) offers unbeatable flexibility: it is selectable dual-band (can operate on 2.4 GHz OR 5 GHz). With high power (400mW / 26dBm), 2 MMCX connectors and robust ESD protection of 15kV, it is the number one choice for building tower APs (e.g., with the RB433) or robust point-to-point (PtP) links.

Why Choose the R52HnD?

Selectable dual-band (2.4 or 5GHz)

Its greatest advantage is flexibility. It is not simultaneous dual-band; it is selectable. This allows you to use the same card for any scenario (2.4 GHz or 5 GHz), simplifying inventory. Simply configure the band you want to use in RouterOS.

High power (400mW / 26dBm)

The "H" (High Power) in the name means this card has a transmit power of 400mW (up to 26dBm). This results in a stronger and more stable signal, essential for long-distance links (PtP) or for Access Points (AP) with better penetration.

Enhanced ESD protection (+/- 15kV)

The "D" in the name (HnD) indicates durable construction. The card was redesigned with electrostatic discharge (ESD) protection of +/- 15kV on the MMCX connectors. This is vital for tower installations, protecting your equipment from damage.

miniPCI form factor (2x MMCX)

The miniPCI form factor (802.11n / 2x2 MIMO) makes it compatible with hundreds of RouterBOARDs, such as the classic RB411, RB433, RB912, etc. The MMCX connectors allow secure connection to pigtails and external antennas.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This radio card is the ideal choice for:

WISP tower APs

Application number 1. Install 3 of these cards in an RB433 to create a 360° sector AP, either on 2.4GHz or 5GHz.

Long-distance point-to-point (PTP) links

Combine high power (26dBm) with a directional antenna (Dish or Grid) to create robust 802.11n backhauls.

Old card upgrade

Replace older cards (R52, R52H) to gain 802.11n (300 Mbps) performance and, most importantly, 15kV ESD protection.
mikrotik-routerboard-rb1100ahx4-dude-edi:
Quad-Core performance, with integrated storage.

The MikroTik RB1100AHx4 Dude Edition is the most powerful version of the 1100 series, designed for the most demanding tasks. In addition to the powerful quad-core Cortex A15 processor, this special edition includes several high-speed storage connectors and a 60GB M.2 SSD drive already installed. It is the perfect solution for running the "The Dude" database, using it as a proxy cache, or for any other application that requires a lot of storage, directly on your router.

Why choose the RB1100AHx4 Dude Edition?

High-speed integrated storage

Its main advantage is storage capacity. It comes equipped with a 60 GB M.2 SSD drive and also offers two SATA 3 ports and a second M.2 slot for future expansion. It is ideal for hosting the database of MikroTik's "The Dude" monitoring software or for setting up a local web cache, improving browsing speed across your network.

High-performance quad-core processor

Its 1.4 GHz four-core Annapurna Labs CPU was designed for maximum performance. With the ability to process up to 7.5 Gigabits of traffic per second, it is the ideal choice for networks with high data volumes and complex routing rules.

Hardware acceleration for IPsec

Security does not have to slow down your network. The RB1100AHx4 Dude Edition supports hardware IPsec encryption acceleration, allowing you to create secure, high-speed VPN tunnels with performance far superior to other RouterBOARDs.

Full redundant power feed

Designed for mission-critical reliability, this router is equipped with two redundant IEC power supplies. Additionally, it also supports power via 802.3at PoE and through a telecom DC connector (-48V), offering multiple layers of redundancy to ensure you never go offline.

Ideal For whom?

Network administrators using "The Dude"

It is the perfect hardware platform for running the "The Dude" network monitoring software, with dedicated high-speed storage for its database, ensuring optimal performance.

Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and enterprise networks

As a core or aggregation router that, in addition to managing traffic, can also function as a local cache server (Web Proxy), speeding up access to content frequently visited by users.

Technical Specifications

mikrotik-routerboard-rb4011igs-rm-level-:
MikroTik RB4011iGS+RM: Quad-Core router with 10xGbE, SFP+ and PoE output.

The MikroTik RB4011iGS+RM is a high-performance router, designed to be the nerve center of demanding networks. It uses the same powerful quad-core Cortex A15 processor from Annapurna Labs (an Amazon company) found in MikroTik's carrier-class models, such as the RB1100AHx4. This CPU supports hardware IPsec acceleration, and with 1GB of RAM, the RB4011iGS+RM easily handles any task configured in RouterOS. It has ten Gigabit Ethernet ports, an SFP+ port for optional 10 Gbps connectivity (SFP+ module not included), passive PoE input on port 1 and passive PoE output on port 10. All of this is integrated into a solid, compact, professional-looking matte black metal enclosure with passive cooling (fanless). It includes standard 1U rack-mount ears, making it a robust and versatile solution for enterprise networks, advanced offices, or home users who demand superior performance.

Why Choose the MikroTik RB4011iGS+RM?

Superior processing performance

Equipped with a 1.4 GHz quad-core Cortex A15 CPU and 1GB of RAM, the RB4011 delivers exceptional performance for routing, firewall, VPNs (with hardware IPsec acceleration) and other intensive tasks that RouterOS can perform.

Gigabit and 10 Gigabit SFP+ connectivity

It has ten Gigabit Ethernet ports to connect multiple wired devices. Additionally, the SFP+ port allows fiber optic connections at 10 Gbps (requires SFP+ module), ideal for high-speed uplinks, connecting to servers, or other switches on the main network.

PoE input and output features

Ethernet port 1 supports passive PoE input (18-57V) to power the router itself, offering installation flexibility. Ethernet port 10 can provide passive PoE output (up to 57 V) to power another compatible device, such as an access point or camera.

RouterOS Level 5 - Professional power and control

With the RouterOS operating system and a Level 5 license, this router unlocks a wide range of professional-grade networking features, including dynamic routing (OSPF, BGP), advanced firewall, VPN tunnel management, sophisticated QoS, hotspot gateway and much more, with no additional subscription costs.

Robust and professional design

The solid matte black metal enclosure not only gives it a professional appearance, but also contributes to the device's durability and passive cooling. It includes ears for secure mounting in a standard 1U rack space.

Ideal For whom?

The MikroTik RB4011iGS+RM is the ideal choice for:

Small and Medium-sized Businesses (SMBs)

Businesses that need a reliable, high-performance central router to manage their network, with capacity for multiple Gigabit connections, fast 10G uplinks and advanced security features.

Advanced Home Offices (SOHO) and enthusiasts

Users with complex home networks, multiple devices, or who need to configure VPNs for secure remote access benefit from the quad-core CPU performance and the flexibility of RouterOS.

Deployments requiring IPsec acceleration

Scenarios where IPsec VPN performance is critical, taking advantage of the CPU's hardware acceleration to increase encrypted throughput.

Networks requiring 10 Gbps uplinks

For connecting to high-speed storage servers (NAS), 10G aggregation switches, or to take advantage of fiber optic Internet plans with speeds above 1 Gbps via the SFP+ port.

MikroTik network professionals and administrators

Experienced RouterOS users looking for powerful and reliable hardware to implement complex, custom network configurations.
mikrotik-routerboard-rb450gx4-level-5-rb:
The legend evolved. Quad-Core CPU (1 GB RAM). The RB450 upgrade.

The RB450Gx4 is the modern successor to the legendary RB450 and RB850 boards. This RouterBOARD (supplied without enclosure) maintains the same "form factor" as its predecessors, but comes equipped with completely new and much more powerful hardware: an ARM Quad-Core CPU, 1 GB of RAM and 512 MB of NAND storage. With 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports, PoE output on port 5, hardware IPsec acceleration and a RouterOS Level 5 license, it is the new definitive platform for high-performance custom routers.

Why Choose the RB450Gx4?

Quad-core ARM performance and 1 GB of RAM

The performance leap is enormous. The ARM Quad-Core CPU (IPQ-4019), 1 GB of RAM and 512 MB of NAND storage (plus microSD) provide the capacity to run RouterOS v7 with complex firewall rules, queues and even Containers. Hardware IPsec acceleration ensures high-speed VPN tunnels without overloading the CPU.

"Drop-in replacement"

The RB450Gx4 uses the same PCB form factor and drilling pattern as the classic RB450 and RB850. This allows a massive hardware upgrade in enclosures already deployed in the field (e.g., CA450), simply by swapping the board.

Triple power input and PoE output (port 5)

Power supply flexibility is total. It can be connected via 2 DC jacks (10-57V) or Port 1 (PoE-IN 802.3af/at). Additionally, Port 5 offers passive PoE output (up to 500mA), perfect for powering an AP, CPE or IP camera directly from the router.

RouterOS Level 5 license

Unlike the Level 4 of its predecessor, the RB450Gx4 comes with a Level 5 license. This allows more VPN tunnels (PPPoE, PPTP, L2TP), more Hotspot users and advanced WISP features, making it ideal as a network hub.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This RouterBOARD is the ideal choice for:

Upgrading old routers (RB450/RB850)

The number one application. Replace your old board to gain ARM Quad-Core performance, 1GB of RAM and Gigabit ports, without changing the enclosure.

Edge router/firewall (SMB/WISP)

The Level 5 license, 1 GB of RAM and IPsec acceleration make it the perfect edge router for small and medium-sized businesses or WISPs that need high-performance routing and VPN.

Products using "Containers" (RouterOS v7)

The ARM hardware and vast storage (NAND + microSD) are perfect for "power users" who want to run services such as Pi-hole or The Dude (Container) directly on the router.
mikrotik-routerboard-rb5009ug-s-in-level:
The ultimate "tough" router for your home lab.

The MikroTik RB5009UG+S+IN was born from community feedback to create the perfect home lab router: compact, powerful, with multiple power options and efficient cooling. With 9 wired ports, including a 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet port and a 10G SFP+ port, and a powerful quad-core CPU, the RB5009 has everything you need and more, offering nearly twice the performance of previous models in CPU-intensive configurations.

Why choose the MikroTik RB5009?

Multi-gigabit connectivity

This board is equipped with 9 wired ports for total flexibility. Seven of the ports are Gigabit Ethernet, one is 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet and the last is a 10G SFP+ port. All ports are connected to a powerful switch chip from the Marvell Amethyst family, with a full-duplex 10 Gbps line to the CPU.

Doubled performance

Thanks to the powerful 1.4 GHz quad-core ARMv8 CPU and 1 GB of DDR4 RAM, this router delivers nearly twice the performance in heavy CPU-load configurations compared to other products of a similar form factor. It is the power you need for your most complex firewall rules, VPNs and traffic queues.

Multiple power options

The RB5009UG+S+IN can be powered in 3 different ways: via PoE input on Ethernet port 1, via DC connector, or through a 2-pin terminal on the side, offering unprecedented redundancy and installation flexibility for a device of this size.

High-density rack mounting

Despite the desktop form factor, the RB5009 was designed with space efficiency in mind. With the optional K-79 mounting kit, you can install FOUR of these routers in a single 1U rack space for maximum productivity and density.

Ideal For whom?

"Home Labs" and advanced users

The best choice for technology enthusiasts who want a home router without compromising on data center-grade performance and the full flexibility of RouterOS v7.

Small and Medium-sized Businesses (SMBs)

As an ultra-powerful main router for an SMB, capable of managing high-speed Internet connections, multiple VLANs, VPNs for remote work and complex firewall policies without any difficulty.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-routerboard-rb5009upr-s-in-rb50:
The definition of flexibility and power redundancy.

The RB5009UPr+S+IN takes the popular RB5009 series to a new level of versatility. Retaining all the performance of the previous model, with its Gigabit, 2.5 Gigabit ports and a 10G SFP+ port, this version adds unprecedented power flexibility: PoE input and output on all eight Ethernet ports. It is the definitive solution for complex, mission-critical network installations.

Why choose the RB5009UPr+S+IN?

Full PoE on all 8 ports

The main feature of this router is the ability to receive and deliver power on all 8 of its Ethernet ports. This offers incredible flexibility to create configurations with minimal cabling, allowing you to power cameras, access points or other devices directly from the router, supporting passive PoE and the 802.3af/at standard.

10-way power and intelligent redundancy

With a total of 10 power options — 8x PoE-in, 1x DC Jack and 1x 2-pin terminal — redundancy is guaranteed. The intelligent failover system ensures maximum uptime: the router always uses the source with the highest voltage, automatically switching to the second highest source if the first fails.

High PoE power budget

Each PoE output port can supply up to 25 W of power. The router has a total power budget of 130 W, sufficient for most installations. The system manages power intelligently and, if the limit is exceeded, disables lower-priority ports to protect the system, allowing you to manually configure the priority of each port.

High-speed connectivity

In addition to its power versatility, the RB5009 maintains its superior performance with a powerful Quad-Core CPU and a powerful port combination: seven 1G ports, one 2.5G port and one 10G SFP+ port for fiber uplinks.

Ideal For whom?

Small and medium-sized Internet Service Providers (ISPs)

This router was designed for ISPs seeking robust, cost-effective solutions. It is the ideal complement for installations with GPEN equipment, allowing you to power customer devices and manage traffic centrally.

Complex and compact network installations

Perfect for any scenario that needs to power multiple PoE devices but has space constraints. The unique ability to mount four of these routers in a single 1U rack space allows you to create extremely dense and powerful network hubs.

Applications requiring maximum uptime

Its extensive power redundancy options make it the right choice for mission-critical applications where any service outage is unacceptable. The router can survive multiple power supply failures, protecting your peace of mind.
mikrotik-routerboard-rb5009upr-s-out-rb5:
The reliability of the RB5009, Now outdoors.

The MikroTik RB5009UPr+S+OUT takes our best-selling rugged router and puts it in a robust, waterproof enclosure (IP66), ready for any challenge. With 9 power input options, including PoE input and PoE output on all eight Ethernet ports, a 2.5G Ethernet port and a 10G SFP+, this is a compact, low-cost solution that will revolutionize your communications tower installations.

Why choose the RB5009UPr+S+OUT?

Extreme feed redundancy

This router was designed to never fail. It offers 9 possible power sources: a 2-pin terminal on the front and PoE input on all eight Ethernet ports. The router will automatically select the source with the highest voltage, ensuring unprecedented redundancy. Even if 8 of your 9 power sources fail, your router will remain online.

PoE input and output on all ports

All eight Ethernet ports can power other devices via PoE (PoE output) and can also be used to supply power to the router itself (PoE input). Each PoE output port can deliver up to 25 W of power, with a combined total limit of 130 W, sufficient for most installations.

Multigigabit connectivity

Just like the indoor version, this model offers a set of high-speed ports: 7 Gigabit Ethernet ports, 1 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet port for a faster uplink connection, and a 10G SFP+ port for fiber optic connectivity. All powered by a powerful quad-core ARM CPU and 1 GB of RAM.

Built for any weather (IP66)

The IP66-rated waterproof enclosure allows you to install this powerful router in the harshest environments. It is the perfect tool to protect your network against storms, floods, heat waves, or power outages.

Ideal For whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

The perfect, compact, and low-cost solution to revolutionize tower installations. With its massive power redundancy and PoE output capability, it can serve as the main tower router and power multiple radios and CPEs.

Industrial and Remote Applications

Where reliability is the number one priority. Its rugged enclosure and multiple power options make it ideal for industrial automation, precision agriculture, or any scenario requiring fail-safe connectivity.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-routerboard-rb800-level-6-power:
Advanced Platform. Massive Expansion. Level 6 performance.

The Mikrotik RB800 is the definition of an advanced, high-performance networking platform. It is not a common router, but rather the hardware foundation for building a sophisticated wireless device. With 4x miniPCI slots, 1x miniPCI-e slot, 3 Gigabit Ethernet ports and daughter-board connectors, it was designed for massive expansion, capable of supporting the most demanding firewall and wireless router configurations.

Why Choose the RB800?

Expansion potential (daughter boards)

Its true power. The daughter board connectors (PCI and PCI-e) allow you to add even more ports. It can be combined with boards such as the RB604 (to add 4 more miniPCI slots) or the RB816 (to add 16 Ethernet ports), creating a truly customized device.

Multiple wireless slots

With 4 miniPCI slots and 1 miniPCI-e slot, this board is ready to become a high-capacity multi-band access point (AP) or a router that aggregates multiple wireless connections, all managed by the 800 MHz CPU.

RouterOS Level 6

Comes with a Level 6 (L6) license, the highest from Mikrotik. This unlocks the full potential of RouterOS, including unlimited users (hotspots, VPNs), unlimited EoIP tunnels, and no software restrictions, making it ideal for WISPs and enterprise firewalls.

Industrial robustness

Tested to operate at ambient temperatures from -40°C to 70°C and with an MTBF of 200,000 hours, the RB800 was built to deliver continuous reliability in mission-critical installations.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This RouterBOARD is the ideal choice for:

WISPs (Wireless Internet Service Providers)

For building custom tower access points, with multiple radios (e.g., 3x 5GHz sector + 1x 60GHz backhaul).

High-performance firewalls

When combined with the RB816 daughter board, it becomes a 19-port firewall (3+16) with the processing power of RouterOS L6.

Network integrators

For creating "tailor-made" network solutions that require a specific combination of Ethernet ports and wireless slots not available in standard products.
mikrotik-routerboard-rb911g-5hpacd-nb-ne:
High power (1.2 W). RP-SMA connectors. Outdoor Wi-Fi 5 (AC).

The NetBox5 (RB911G-5HPacD-NB) is Mikrotik's high-performance "connectorized" CPE/AP. It is the ideal solution for those who need maximum flexibility and power. It combines an extremely high-power Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) radio (31dBm / 1.2W) with two RP-SMA connectors for external antennas. Its Gigabit Ethernet port ensures no bottlenecks, and the rugged IP54 enclosure comes in a complete kit, ready for pole mounting.

Why Choose NetBox5?

Extreme Power (31dBm / 1.2W)

The "HP" (High Power) is its greatest asset. The 1.25W (31dBm) transmit power enables very long-distance Point-to-Point (PtP) connections (when combined with dish antennas) or sector Access Points (APs) with wide coverage.

Flexibility (RP-SMA connectors)

Not locked to an integrated antenna. The NetBox5 lets you choose the perfect external antenna for your scenario: a dish antenna for PtP, a panel/sector for AP, or an omnidirectional.

Wi-Fi 5 (AC) and Gigabit performance

The combination of the 802.11ac radio (up to 867 Mbps) and the 10/100/1000 Ethernet port means you can finally achieve wireless connections exceeding 100 Mbps, taking full advantage of Wi-Fi 5 speed.

Rugged enclosure (IP54) and complete kit

The enclosure is weatherproof (IP54), operates from -40°C to 70°C, and can be opened with one hand. The package includes everything you need: passive PoE injector, power supply, pole mounting clamp, and DIN rail adapter.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Long-distance point-to-point (PTP) links

Combine two NetBox5 units with dish (satellite) antennas to create a high-speed (AC) link over many kilometers.

Sector access point (AP)

Connect to a sector antenna (e.g., mANT 19s) to create a high-power 5 GHz AC WISP AP, covering a wide area.

High-sensitivity CPE (client)

Use it as a client (with a dish or grid antenna) to connect to a distant AP, where devices with integrated antennas would not reach.
mikrotik-routerboard-rb912uag-2hpnd-out-:
The "all-in-one" WISP enclosure 2.4 GHz radio (1 W). Full expansion.

BaseBox2 is Mikrotik's most versatile 2.4 GHz outdoor solution. Take the popular RouterBOARD RB912 (with 1x GbE port, 1x miniPCI-e slot, 1x SIM slot and 1x USB) and put it inside a rugged enclosure (IP54). It already comes with a built-in high-power 2.4 GHz radio (1W/30dBm), 2 SMA connectors for external antennas and 3 extra holes (cutouts) for future expansion (e.g., for a 5 GHz or LTE board).

Why Choose BaseBox2?

High-power 2.4 GHz radio (1W) + Gigabit port

The built-in 2.4 GHz radio (802.11n, 2x2 MIMO) delivers 30dBm (1000mW) of power, ideal for long distances. The Gigabit Ethernet port ensures you can take full advantage of the wireless link speed (up to 300 Mbps) without the bottlenecks of 10/100 ports.

The ultimate expansion platform (miniPCI-e + SIM + USB)

This is its greatest strength. The free miniPCI-e slot, the SIM slot, and the USB port allow you to transform the BaseBox2. Add an R11e-LTE modem for a 4G gateway. Add an R11e-5HacD board for a dual-band AP. The 3 extra holes (cutouts) in the enclosure are already there for the expansion board's pigtails.

Smart outdoor design (IP54)

The rugged enclosure (IP54) can be opened with just one hand. It includes a "cable cover" (cap) to protect the connectors (USB, Ethernet, Ground) from moisture. The kit is complete: includes PoE injector, power supply, pole mounting clamps, and DIN rail bracket.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

2.4 GHz sector access point (AP)

The #1 application. Connect the BaseBox2 (with its 2x SMA) to a 2.4 GHz sector antenna (2x2 MIMO) to create a high-power tower WISP AP.

4G/LTE gateway with 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi

Use the miniPCI-e slot and SIM slot to add a 4G/LTE modem (e.g., R11e-LTE). The built-in 2.4 GHz (HP) radio works as a powerful local Wi-Fi access point. The perfect solution for a mobile hotspot or internet backup.

Custom dual-band AP

Add a 5 GHz board (e.g., R11e-5HacD) in the miniPCI-e slot. Use the 2x SMA for 2.4 GHz and the 3 extra holes for the 5 GHz pigtails. Create a robust dual-band (2.4 + 5 GHz) outdoor access point.
mikrotik-routerboard-rb912uag-2hpnd-dual:
The perfect WISP signal. 2.4 GHz radio (1 W). miniPCI-e + SIM slot.

The RB912UAG-2HPnD is Mikrotik's "all-in-one" RouterBOARD for system builders. It is a compact platform that already comes with a built-in high-power 2.4 GHz radio (1W/30dBm), 1x Gigabit Ethernet port and, most importantly, 1x free miniPCI-e slot. With a SIM slot and a USB port, it is ready for any project: dual-band AP, LTE gateway, or LoRa AP. This is the board used in the popular BaseBox2.

Why Choose the RB912UAG-2HPnD?

2.4 GHz radio (1W) + Gigabit port

The built-in 2.4 GHz radio (2x2 MIMO) delivers 30dBm (1000mW) of power, ideal for long distances. Unlike cheaper boards, this one comes with a Gigabit Ethernet (10/100/1000) port to ensure you can take advantage of the full speed of 802.11n (up to 300 Mbps).

The ultimate expansion board (miniPCI-e + SIM + USB)

This is its greatest strength. The miniPCI-e slot, SIM slot, and USB port allow you to transform the board. Add an R11e-LTE modem and use the SIM slot for a 4G gateway. Add an R11e-5HacD board for a dual-band AP. Add a LoRa concentrator. The versatility is total.

ESD protection (tower-ready)

The RB912UAG-2HPnD was designed for outdoor environments. It features 16kV ESD protection on the Ethernet port and antenna connectors (MMCX), protecting your investment against lightning strikes.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This board is the foundation for countless products and scenarios:

Dual-band access point

Use the built-in 2.4 GHz radio and add a 5 GHz board (such as R11e-5HacD) in the miniPCI-e slot.

4G/LTE gateway with Wi-Fi

Use the 2.4 GHz radio as an access point and add a 4G/LTE modem (such as R11e-LTE) to the slot using the SIM slot.

BaseBox2

This is the exact board used in the Mikrotik BaseBox2 product. Ideal for replacement or customization projects in waterproof enclosures.
mikrotik-routerboard-rb912uag-5hpnd-out-:
The perfect base for your sector antenna.

The MikroTik BaseBox 5 is an outdoor wireless device based on the popular RouterBOARD RB912, housed in a rugged, weatherproof enclosure. Equipped with two RP-SMA connectors for external antennas and a cover to protect cables from moisture, it is the ideal choice to pair with a MikroTik sector antenna to create a high-performance Access Point, or with a dish antenna for a robust point-to-point link.

Why choose the MikroTik BaseBox 5?

High-power 5 GHz radio

The built-in dual-chain 802.11a/n radio is high-power, enabling stable long-distance wireless connections when combined with the appropriate antenna. The 5 GHz band is ideal for achieving higher speeds and avoiding the congestion of the 2.4 GHz spectrum.

Expansion flexibility with miniPCIe

The BaseBox 5 includes a miniPCIe expansion slot, which gives it enormous versatility. You can use it to add a second radio and create a dual-band device, or to install a 3G/4G modem (requires SIM card) and create an access point with a mobile internet backup connection.

Rugged and functional design for outdoor environments

The enclosure can be opened with just one hand and is fully weatherproof. The USB, Ethernet and grounding cable outlets are located at the bottom, protected by a cover. The kit includes mounting clamps for easy installation on poles or towers.

The Power of RouterOS (Level 4)

With the RouterOS Level 4 license, the BaseBox 5 is much more than a simple radio. It can be configured as a high-capacity access point (AP), router, firewall, or bandwidth manager, providing professional-level control over your network.

Ideal For whom?

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

The classic solution for creating sector Access Points. Simply connect the BaseBox 5 to a MikroTik sector antenna to start serving clients over a wide area.

Long-distance point-to-point (PTP) connections

When combined with a dish antenna, its high-power radio makes it perfect for creating robust long-distance wireless network "bridges" between two locations.

Custom outdoor networking projects

For any scenario that requires a customized outdoor networking solution, where flexibility in antenna selection and the possibility of expansion with a 3G/4G modem are crucial advantages.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-routerboard-rb922uags-5hpacd-nm:
Shielded Power. Full expansion. Fiber and Copper.

The NetMetal 5 (RB922UAGS-5HPacD-NM) is the most versatile version of the NetMetal series. It retains the robustness of the aluminum enclosure (IP54) and the high-power 5 GHz AC radio (1.3 W), but adds crucial expansion features: a miniPCI-e slot and a SIM slot. This allows you to transform this rugged AP into a dual-band gateway or 4G/LTE router, while maintaining Gigabit and SFP connectivity.

Why Choose the RB922 NetMetal?

Expandability (miniPCI-e + SIM)

The key difference from the RB921 model. The RB922 model has a free miniPCI-express slot and a SIM slot. This allows you to install a second wireless card (to create a dual-band access point) or a 3G/4G modem (to create a mobile backup), all within the same waterproof enclosure.

Super High Power (1.3W) and Dissipation

The built-in 5 GHz 802.11ac radio (2x2 MIMO) delivers up to 31dBm (1.3 Watts) of power. The solid aluminum enclosure acts as an efficient heat sink, ensuring the radio operates with maximum stability even under heavy load and intense heat.

Full connectivity (GbE + SFP + USB)

Ready for any backhaul. Use the Gigabit Ethernet port for copper connections or the SFP port to connect fiber optic directly to the tower, eliminating distance and electrical interference issues. The USB port allows extra storage or external modems.

Rugged and practical design

Designed for the toughest conditions, it is waterproof (IP54) and can be opened with one hand for quick maintenance, without loose screws.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Custom WISP APs

Create a powerful base station access point by adding a sector antenna to the RP-SMA connectors. Add a second card to offer service on a different frequency.

Outdoor 4G/LTE gateway

Install an LTE modem in the internal slot and transform the NetMetal into a high-power industrial 4G router, with long-range 5 GHz Wi-Fi output.

Critical PtP links

Use the SFP port for data and the Ethernet port for redundancy, creating an extremely reliable and fast point-to-point link.
mikrotik-routerboard-rb951ui-2hnd-level-:
The complete solution for your SOHO network.

The MikroTik RB951Ui-2HnD is a wireless access point (AP) for small offices and homes (SOHO) that combines functionality, power, and an affordable price. With a 600 MHz CPU, 128 MB of RAM, 5 Ethernet ports, and a high-power radio, this compact device is ready to be the hub of your network, offering the flexibility and full control of RouterOS.

Why choose the RB951Ui-2HnD?

PoE output to power other devices

The great advantage of this model is its ability to provide PoE (Power over Ethernet) power through the Ether5 port. This allows you to directly connect and power another compatible passive PoE device, such as an IP surveillance camera or another access point, without the need for an additional injector or transformer.

Extended connectivity with USB port

The inclusion of a full-size USB 2.0 port opens up a range of possibilities. It can be used to connect a 3G/4G modem for a backup Internet connection, or to connect an external hard drive or flash drive, turning your router into a small file server (NAS).

High-power Wi-Fi

The 2.4 GHz 802.11n wireless radio has a transmit power of up to 1000 mW (30 dBm). This, combined with the built-in 2.5 dBi antennas, results in robust, long-range Wi-Fi signal coverage, superior to most conventional home routers.

The power of RouterOS

This device runs the acclaimed RouterOS operating system with a Level 4 license. This gives you unprecedented control over your network, with professional features such as advanced firewall, bandwidth management (QoS), VPN tunnels, hotspot, and much more.

Ideal For whom?

Small offices and home office (SOHO)

The perfect choice for a small business. A single device manages the entire network, functioning as a router, firewall, switch, and Wi-Fi access point, with the added benefit of being able to power a second device via PoE.

Advanced users and networking enthusiasts

For those who want to go beyond the limitations of a standard consumer router. RouterOS offers nearly unlimited configuration possibilities to optimize and control every aspect of your home network.

Small installations with PoE

Ideal for scenarios where a single PoE device needs to be powered, such as an IP camera in a shop or a second AP in a home, but without the cost and complexity of a full PoE switch.
mikrotik-routerboard-rbd25g-5hpacqd2hpnd:
RBD25G-5HPACQD2HPND

Wi-Fi should be fast, reliable, easy to manage, and should reach every room and every corner. That is exactly what Audience devices can deliver in style, even in the largest homes!

The Audience is a tri-band (one 2.4 GHz and two 5 GHz) home access point with mesh technology. If you need Wi-Fi in a huge building with all kinds of obstacles, simply add more Audience devices to your network with the press of a button — they will synchronize seamlessly and create a single Wi-Fi network to cover the entire premises. Initial setup is also very simple: download the MikroTik app for iOS or Android, it will connect to the router and guide you through a quick configuration process.

In some cases, a single Audience unit may be able to replace multiple other routers — in our tests it easily covered 1,858 m². Results depend on the number of obstacles, Wi-Fi clients, and interference, so results may vary.

The dual-chain 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz wireless coverage will solve most interference issues in a crowded environment. For example, you can simultaneously use the 2.4 GHz channel for all your home mobile devices and reserve the 5 GHz channel for your PC or TV.

Order your Audience today and start living in the future. The future of easy, elegant networking.

mikrotik-routerboard-rbd25gr-5hpacqd2hpn:
Triple-band Wi-Fi. Full mesh coverage. Built-in 4G Cat 6.

The Audience LTE6 kit is Mikrotik's "no compromise" solution for home or office Wi-Fi. It is a Tri-Band Access Point (AP) with Mesh technology and an elegant design. Forget "dead spots" (no-signal zones): add more Audience units and, with the press of a button, they create a single, seamless network. Its key advantage is the built-in 4G LTE Cat 6 modem (300 Mbps), which provides a high-speed Internet connection, whether as a backup or as the primary connection.

Why Choose Audience?

The magic of tri-band mesh

The Audience is not a common mesh system. It is Tri-Band. This means you have three radios:

  1. One 2.4 GHz radio (for clients).
  2. One 5 GHz radio (for clients).
  3. A dedicated 5 GHz 4x4 (1733 Mbps) radio for "backhaul" (communication between Audience units).
This is crucial: your client traffic never competes with the mesh network traffic, ensuring maximum speeds throughout the home.

LTE Cat 6 (300 Mbps) for maximum freedom

Cables are no longer a limitation. The built-in 4G LTE Cat 6 modem offers download speeds of up to 300 Mbps with Carrier Aggregation. It is perfect as an automatic backup (failover) for your fiber connection, or as the primary connection in locations without good cable internet.

Extreme coverage and simple setup

A single Audience unit can cover a huge area (up to 1,858 m² in tests). For larger homes, simply add more units. Initial setup is done intuitively through the Mikrotik mobile app (iOS/Android).

Quad-Core CPU and Gigabit connectivity

Equipped with a 716 MHz ARM Quad-Core CPU and 256 MB of RAM, the Audience easily manages traffic from multiple devices and the LTE modem. It has two Gigabit Ethernet ports for connecting wired devices and supports PoE-in power.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Large homes / Multi-story homes

The #1 application. Create a robust Mesh network that covers every corner, with a dedicated 5 GHz backhaul that guarantees maximum speed.

"Always-online" office requirements

Use LTE Cat 6 as an automatic backup for your fiber/cable connection, ensuring your business is never offline.

Premium internet via 4G

For locations where cable Internet is slow but 4G coverage is strong. The Cat 6 modem can offer faster speeds than many ADSL/VDSL connections.

Why Choose the MikroTik ATL 5G R16?

High-performance 5G and LTE Cat 20 connectivity

This ensures a fast Internet experience for all your needs.

High-gain directional antenna (16 dBi) with 4x4 MIMO

Extensive band support, including Band 28 (700 MHz)

The ATL 5G R16 supports a wide range of 5G and LTE frequencies. The highlight is full support for Band 28 (700MHz), for both LTE and 5G, which offers superior signal penetration and greater range — vital features for coverage in rural areas or dense buildings.

SIM flexibility: MikroTik eSIM, own eSIM or Micro SIM

mikrotik-automotive-power-adapter-apa-1-:
Multi-layer DC protection. Surge immune. Reverse polarity.

The APA-1 from Mikrotik is the most advanced DC power protection solution, designed to protect your equipment (up to 100W) against sudden voltage spikes. These spikes can occur anywhere, from starting a car battery to switching large AC units. With a robust multi-layer defence (GDT, TVS, Fuse) and active reverse polarity protection, the APA-1 ensures the reliability of your equipment, even in the most adverse conditions.

Why Choose the APA-1?

Multi-layer surge defence

The APA-1 uses a powerful combination: a gas discharge tube (GDT), which acts as the first line of defence against extreme spikes (such as lightning), and a transient voltage suppressor (TVS), which quickly "clamps" smaller spikes that pass through. It also includes a standard fuse for additional protection.

Active reverse polarity protection

Even if you accidentally connect the power the wrong way around (reversing positive and negative), the active polarity protection ensures your device remains safe. The integrated low-pass filter also blocks unwanted electrical impulses from the DC line.

Industrial and Automotive Grade (E-MARK)

With an extreme temperature range (-40°C to 85°C), the APA-1 is suitable for use in industrial, outdoor (sheltered) or automotive environments. The E-MARK certification makes it approved for use in automotive electrical systems (cars, buses, trucks).

Flexible voltage adjustment

The output voltage can be easily modified (via jumper) or used in "pass-through" mode (the voltage that goes in is the voltage that comes out), allowing the protection to be adapted to various RouterBOARDs (e.g. 12V or 24V) or power systems.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This protector is the ideal choice for:

Vehicles and Logistics

The primary application. Protects routers, modems and switches in buses, trucks or fleets against voltage spikes resulting from battery starts and internal electrical problems.

Solar and unstable DC installations

To protect sensitive equipment against voltage fluctuations common in battery or solar panel powered systems.

Extreme Industrial Environments

Thanks to its wide temperature range (-40°C to 85°C), it is reliable in machine rooms, tower cabinets or factories.

Combines the 5 GHz 802.11ac radio and a 90° sectoral antenna (14dBi) in a single compact and rugged unit. This simplifies installation on towers or walls, reduces cabling and minimizes failure points, making it perfect for covering specific areas.

802.11ac (WiFi 5) Performance

Offers data rates of up to 867 Mbps in the 5 GHz band, using MIMO 2x2 technology. Its high transmission power allows reaching considerable distances and good connection capacity in PtMP and PtP scenarios.

RouterOS Level 4 - Total Flexibility

Equipped with MikroTik's RouterOS operating system and Level 4 license, it offers unparalleled flexibility. It can be configured as an Access Point to serve multiple clients, as a bridge in Point-to-Point connections, or even as a powerful CPE client. It allows advanced control over routing, firewall, QoS, VPNs and much more.

Robust outdoor build (IP54)

Developed to withstand outdoor conditions, it has an IP54 rating (protection against dust and water splashes) and operates in a wide temperature range (-40°C to 70°C). PoE power supply (compatible with 802.3af/at) simplifies installation.

USB port for expansion

The built-in Type A USB port allows connecting additional devices, such as external storage for logs or backups, or potentially a 3G/4G modem for a backup connection (requires compatibility verification and configuration in RouterOS). Includes USB power reset functionality.

Ideal For whom?

The MikroTik SXT SA5 ac is the ideal choice for:

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

It is one of the most popular solutions for WISPs in Portugal and worldwide, used as a Sectoral Access Point on towers to distribute 5GHz AC signal to multiple clients (CPEs) in a 90-degree sector.

Point-to-Multipoint (PtMP) Networks

Companies, municipalities or other organizations that need to interconnect multiple buildings or remote locations to a central point through wireless links in the free 5 GHz band.

Short/medium-distance point-to-point (PtP) connections

Although sectoral, it can be used effectively in pairs to create stable PtP links, especially when perfect alignment is difficult or when some side coverage is acceptable.

Advanced MikroTik RouterOS users

Network professionals and enthusiasts looking for reliable and affordable hardware with an integrated sectoral antenna to implement custom outdoor wireless network solutions, exploring the full potential of RouterOS.
mikrotik-routerboard-wap-outdoor-that-su:
The 4G starting point. Waterproof. Versatile power.

The wAP R (RBwAPR-2nD) is the low-cost MikroTik "chassis" for creating a custom 4G/LTE hotspot. It is a waterproof (IP54) 2.4 GHz access point (AP) that comes equipped with 1x miniPCI-e slot and 1x SIM slot. Its greatest strength is flexibility: it can be mounted outdoors, in a vehicle and powered in 3 different ways (PoE, DC Jack or automotive connector).

Important note: The device does NOT include a 4G/LTE modem. The SIM slot can only be used AFTER installing a compatible miniPCI-e modem (e.g., R11e-LTE), which is sold separately.

Why Choose wAP R?

"Bring your own modem" (BYOM)

wAP R offers freedom of choice. It is not tied to a specific modem. You can select the miniPCI-e modem (3G/4G/LTE) that best suits your frequency or performance needs. The SIM slot will be ready to use once the modem is installed.

Triple power (includes "automotive" connector)

This is its standout feature in terms of mobility. It can be powered in 3 ways (9-30V):

  1. Passive PoE: via network cable (10/100).
  2. DC Jack: Like a standard power supply.
  3. "Automotive" connector: For direct connection to the electrical system of a car, bus, boat or train.

Rugged design (IP54 and E-MARK)

The compact enclosure (IP54) is weatherproof, allowing installation outside a house, on a balcony or in a vehicle. It has E-MARK certification, making it safe and approved for automotive use.

Mounting versatility

Comes ready to be mounted on a pole or wall. However, it also includes a desk stand so you can place it indoors, near a window, for better signal reception.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

4G access point in vehicles

Its number 1 application. Perfect for buses, caravans, boats or vehicle fleets, thanks to the "automotive" power supply and E-MARK certification.

Low-cost outdoor access point

To provide 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi in a garden, balcony or patio, using a 4G modem as an internet source.

Simple IoT solutions

For a sensor or M2M equipment that needs a simple 4G connection (Note: the Ethernet port is 10/100, limiting the maximum speed).

mikrotik-sfp-sfp-sfp28-direct-attach-cab:
The economical and versatile multi-Gigabit Plus connection.

The MikroTik XS+DA0001 is a future-ready multi-rate direct attach cable (DAC). This 1-meter cable supports not only 1G SFP and 10G SFP+, but also the 25G SFP28 standard, offering a low-cost, low-power and low-latency solution for connecting devices within and between adjacent racks.

Why choose the XS+DA0001 DAC cable?

Multi-rate flexibility (1/10/25G)

This cable is exceptionally versatile. It can be used in SFP (1G), SFP+ (10G) and SFP28 (25G) ports, adapting to your current and future needs. This flexibility simplifies your inventory and allows you to make gradual upgrades to your network without needing to replace cables.

Low-cost, high-efficiency solution

It is the most economical way to connect two devices, eliminating the cost of two separate transceivers and a fiber patch cord. Being a passive cable, its power consumption is practically zero and its latency is ultra-low, ideal for 25 Gigabit Ethernet, Fibre Channel and other industry standards.

Ideal for intra-rack connections

Its 1-meter length is perfect for connecting equipment located in the same rack, such as two CCR2004 series switches, enabling an extremely clean and organized installation, without excess cable.

Ideal For whom?

Data centers and server rooms

Perfect for high-speed connections within the same rack, connecting aggregation switches to Top-of-Rack (ToR) switches or directly to servers.

Upgraded enterprise networks

For companies migrating their backbone from 10G to 25G. This cable can be deployed in existing 10G switches and later transferred to new 25G switches, protecting your investment.

Technical Specifications

Q+DA0001

Connect two CRS326-24S+2Q+RM switches effortlessly, this cable has integrated QSFP+ modules, plug it in and enjoy the speed! The cable is 1 meter long and is quite flexible, your devices do not need to be stacked on top of each other.

Product specifications 

  • Product code: Q+DA0001

  • Cable length: 1m

  • Connector: QSFP+ to QSFP+

  • Data rate: 40 Gbps

  • MTBF: approximately 100,000 hours at 25°C

  • Tested ambient temperature: 0°C .. +70°C

The economical and versatile multi-Gigabit Plus connection.

The MikroTik XS+DA0003 is a direct attach cable that supports not only 1G SFP and 10G SFP+, but also the 25G SFP28 standard. With this new cable you get more features for the same price. It is the most economical way to connect two SFP/SFP+/SFP28 devices over very short distances, within racks or between adjacent racks, offering a low-latency and low-power solution.

Why choose the XS+DA0003 DAC cable?

Multi-rate flexibility (1/10/25G)

This cable is exceptionally versatile. It can be used in SFP (1G), SFP+ (10G) and SFP28 (25G) ports, adapting to your current and future needs. This flexibility simplifies your inventory and allows you to make gradual upgrades to your network without needing to replace cables.

Low-cost, high-efficiency solution

It is the most economical way to connect two devices, eliminating the cost of two separate transceivers and a fiber patch cord. Being a passive cable, its power consumption is practically zero and its latency is ultra-low, ideal for 25 Gigabit Ethernet, Fibre Channel and other industry standards.

Ideal for rack connections

Its 3-meter length is perfect for connecting equipment in adjacent racks in a clean and organized manner. It is ideal for connecting two CCR2004 series switches, for example.

Ideal For whom?

Data centers and server rooms

Perfect for high-speed connections between racks, connecting aggregation switches to Top-of-Rack (ToR) switches or directly to servers.

Upgraded enterprise networks

For companies migrating their backbone from 10G to 25G. This cable can be deployed in existing 10G switches and later transferred to new 25G switches, protecting your investment.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-sfp-sfp-sfp28-module-1-10-25g-s:
One module to master three Speeds.

The MikroTik XS+31LC10D is a revolutionary fiber optic module that combines the functionality of 1.25G SFP, 10G SFP+, and 25G SFP28 in a single unit. Designed as a direct upgrade to the popular 10G module, this model adds 25G capability at the same price, offering unprecedented flexibility for your networking needs.

Why choose the XS+31LC10D?

3-in-1 Versatility

The greatest advantage of this module is the ability to operate at three different speeds: 1.25G, 10G, and 25G. This allows you to use the same module across all your devices, regardless of whether you need an SFP, SFP+, or SFP28 connection, simplifying inventory management and expanding your network.

Smart and cost-effective upgrade

This module represents a direct upgrade from the previous 10G SFP+ model for 10 km. MikroTik added 25G SFP28 functionality while maintaining the same price, thus offering maximum efficiency at lower cost.

Extended compatibility

The XS+31LC10D is the perfect choice for equipment with multiple fiber ports, such as the CCR2004-1G-12S+2XS connectivity router. Furthermore, it was designed to be compatible not only with MikroTik equipment, but also with SFP devices from other brands.

Ideal For whom?

Network administrators and ISPs

Professionals who manage complex networks and value efficiency. The ability to use a single module for multiple applications reduces complexity and operational costs.

Companies with Mixed Infrastructures

Perfect for networks that are in transition or that have a mix of 1G, 10G, and 25G equipment. This module ensures interconnectivity between them in a simple and effective way.

Multi-port router users

Indispensable for those using equipment such as the CCR2004 series. It lets you fill SFP/SFP+/SFP28 ports economically without sacrificing performance or flexibility.
mikrotik-sfp28-module-10-25g-multi-mode-:
One connection, all speeds.

The MikroTik XS+85LC01D is an exceptionally versatile and cost-effective multi-rate SFP28 module, designed to adapt to your networking needs. This single transceiver is capable of operating at speeds of 1.25G (SFP), 10G (SFP+), and 25G (SFP28), offering a flexible and future-proof solution for short-distance fiber optic connections (up to 100 meters) on multimode fiber.

Why choose the XS+85LC01D module?

Multi-rate versatility (1/10/25G)

This is its main advantage. A single module can be used in SFP, SFP+, or SFP28 ports, automatically negotiating the highest possible speed. This simplifies your materials inventory management and allows you to make gradual upgrades to your network without needing to replace transceivers.

Affordable short-distance connectivity

Ideal for high-speed connections of up to 100 meters on multimode fiber (MM), this module is the perfect, low-cost solution for interconnecting switches and servers within a data center, between adjacent racks, or in the same room.

Advanced Digital Monitoring (DDMI)

The module includes digital diagnostic functions (DDMI/DOM) that allow network administrators to monitor crucial parameters such as optical power, temperature, and transceiver voltage in real time. This helps you predict failures, plan maintenance, and make informed decisions about the health of your network.

Broad compatibility with MikroTik equipment

It has been tested to ensure perfect compatibility with the most popular MikroTik equipment, including high-performance routers such as the CCR2216 and RB5009, and a wide range of switches from the CRS and CSS series.

Ideal For whom?

Mixed network environments

Perfect for networks that have a mix of equipment with SFP (1G), SFP+ (10G), and SFP28 (25G) ports, enabling standardization on a single module model for multiple applications.

Data centers and server rooms

For high-speed, short-distance connections between racks, connecting aggregation switches to Top-of-Rack (ToR) switches or directly to servers with 10G or 25G network cards.

Professionals seeking "future-proofing"

For those building a 10G network today but wanting the assurance that their modules will be ready for a future upgrade to 25G, without the need for new investment in transceivers.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-sfp28-sm-pair-modules-xs-27lc15:
More speed, greater distance, the same fiber.

The XS+2733LC15D kit represents the evolution of MikroTik SFP modules, offering more features, greater reach, and more speed at the same price. This kit contains two bidirectional (BiDi) SFP28 modules that can be used as a pair to achieve a data rate of up to 25 Gbps over distances of up to 15 km using a single fiber optic cable. It is the perfect solution for maximizing your existing fiber infrastructure with the latest technology.

Why choose the XS+2733LC15D kit?

Multi-rate speed (1G/10G/25G)

These modules offer unmatched flexibility, being capable of operating at 1G, 10G, and up to 25G. This allows you to use them in devices with SFP, SFP+, or SFP28 ports, ensuring a future-proof solution for your network.

Bidirectional WDM technology

Use a single fiber strand for a full-duplex connection. WDM (BiDi) technology uses different wavelengths (1270nm and 1330nm) to transmit and receive data, doubling the capacity of your fiber optic cable and reducing deployment costs.

Extended reach up to 15 km

With superior reach, this kit is ideal for long-distance Single-Mode fiber connections, perfect for linking buildings on a campus, different points of presence of an ISP, or for any scenario requiring a high-speed connection over a considerable distance.

Ideal For whom?

Internet Service Providers (ISPs)

To optimize your fiber network, offering 25G services to your clients or creating high-capacity backhauls on a single fiber strand, maximizing your investment.

Data centers and enterprise networks

To create high-speed, long-distance connections between racks or buildings, with the flexibility to operate at different speeds (1/10/25G) depending on the need.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-smart-fiber-to-copper-converter:
More than a converter, a smart mini-switch.

The MikroTik FTC11XG is a weatherproof (IP55) fiber-to-copper media converter designed to transform your 10 Gigabit SFP+ fiber connections into 10 Gigabit RJ45 Ethernet. But unlike a common media converter, the FTC11XG runs a full version of SwOS Lite and has its own switch chip, offering a range of advanced features that go far beyond simple conversion.

Why choose the MikroTik FTC11XG?

High-speed 10G conversion

Easily convert your fiber signal to copper without losing speed. The FTC11XG features a 10G SFP+ port, a 10G RJ45 Ethernet port, and a 1G Ethernet port, offering multiple connectivity options for your high-speed networks.

Switch features with SwOS Lite

This is not a passive converter. With SwOS Lite, you can access a management interface to perform tasks you would never expect from a media converter, including:

  • Interface management and monitoring
  • VLAN support
  • SNMP reporting
  • Basic traffic limiting (traffic shaping)
  • Advanced packet filtering with access control lists (ACL)

Robust and weatherproof design (IP55)

Its robust housing with IP55 protection rating makes it ideal for installation in outdoor environments or more demanding locations, such as attics or basements, protected against dust and water splashes.

Flexible Power Supply

The FTC11XG offers two power supply methods for greater flexibility: through a standard DC connector or via Power over Ethernet (802.3af/at/bt), allowing you to choose the most convenient option for your installation. The kit includes a PoE injector and a power supply.

Ideal For whom?

Companies needing to extend their fiber network

The perfect solution for bringing a 10G fiber connection to a location that only has equipment with copper RJ45 ports, such as an access switch or a high-performance workstation.

Advanced network installers

Those who need a media converter with management features, such as VLAN support or the ability to filter packets with ACLs, for greater control and security at the network edge.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-smasma-sma-male-to-sma-male-cab:
The low-loss connection to your antenna.

The MikroTik SMASMA is a high-quality coaxial cable, 1 meter in length, terminated with male SMA connectors at both ends. It was designed specifically for radio frequency (RF) applications that require maximum signal integrity. Its primary function is to interconnect radio cards, such as LTE modems, to external antennas, ensuring minimal signal loss and optimized communication performance.

Why choose the SMASMA cable?

Low signal loss (attenuation)

With a maximum attenuation of only 0.9dB across its entire frequency range, this cable ensures that the signal power generated by your radio reaches the antenna with minimal loss. This translates directly into a stronger signal, greater range, and faster connection speeds.

Ideal for the MikroTik wAP R kit

This cable was designed as the perfect complement for the wAP R kit. It allows you to connect an LTE card (via an ACSMAUFL pigtail) to an external antenna, routing the cable through the specially designed openings in the wAP R enclosure, resulting in a clean, professional, and weathertight installation.

Robust and versatile construction

Designed to operate across a wide temperature range (-40 to +85°C), this cable is extremely rugged and suitable for use inside outdoor enclosures or in industrial environments. Its 50 Ohm impedance is the standard for most RF applications, ensuring compatibility.

Ideal For whom?

MikroTik wAP R users

The primary audience. It is the recommended cable for those who want to drastically improve the signal reception of their wAP R by adding one or two external LTE antennas.

IoT and 4G/LTE projects

Anyone building a custom solution involving a 4G/LTE modem or card who needs a reliable connection to an external antenna.

Radio Frequency (RF) Technicians

Professionals who need a 1-meter, low-loss, high-quality connection cable for equipment testing, prototyping, or permanent installations.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-solidmount-precision-alignment-:
The best mount. For the LHG XL. 100% metallic.

solidMOUNT is MikroTik's high-resistance metal mount, designed for absolute stability. It is the definitive solution for mounting any device in the LHG series, being the only robust mount officially recommended for the larger model, the LHG XL. Made entirely of metal, it allows fine adjustment (vertical and horizontal) for perfect alignment of your link, even in strong wind conditions.

Why Choose solidMOUNT?

Full compatibility (including LHG XL)

This is its main advantage. Unlike other mounts (such as the QMP-LHG), solidMOUNT was designed specifically to support the larger size and higher wind load of the LHG XL. If you have an LHG XL, this is the mount you need to ensure your link does not go out of alignment in the wind.

Robust Construction (100% Metal)

The name says it all. It is a "solid" mount made entirely of metal. Essential for installations on towers, masts, or in locations with a lot of wind, where alignment stability is crucial for link performance.

Fine adjustment (vertical and horizontal)

solidMOUNT allows precise adjustment on both axes (vertical and horizontal). This is fundamental for aligning long-distance point-to-point (PtP) links, where every degree counts to achieve maximum signal.

Complete Kit

The package already includes the U-bolt (mast clamp) and the mounting kit necessary for installation.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This mount is the ideal choice for:

LHG XL installations

Application number 1. Any LHG XL installation, whether PtP or CPE, benefits from the stability of this mount.

PtP links in high-wind zones

For any point-to-point link (even with smaller LHGs) where wind is a problem. solidMOUNT ensures the antenna remains correctly aimed, preventing signal drops.
mikrotik-ssd-1tb-u-2-nvme-7mm-pcie-gen4-:
Guaranteed compatibility. U.2 7mm format. PCIe Gen4 interface.

Finding the right U.2 drive with the correct thickness can be a challenge. The MikroTik SSD-U2-7-1TB is the official and certified solution for expanding the storage of your ROSE Data Server (RDS2216). This 1 TB SSD in the 7mm 2.5" U.2 format has been rigorously tested by MikroTik to ensure perfect integration, maximum stability, and high-speed performance via the NVMe PCIe Gen4x4 interface.

Why Choose this MikroTik SSD?

The right thickness (7mm)

Many enterprise U.2 drives are 15mm thick, making them physically incompatible with certain compact server trays. This model was specifically designed with a slim 7mm profile, fitting perfectly into the RDS2216 slots without obstruction.

Certified for ROSE Data Server

MikroTik has removed the uncertainty from the equation. By purchasing this drive, you have the guarantee that the firmware and hardware are 100% compatible with your MikroTik system, avoiding recognition issues, driver problems, or data instability.

PCIe Gen4 NVMe Speed

Take advantage of superior bandwidth. Featuring a PCIe Gen4x4 NVMe interface, this drive delivers fast read and write speeds, ideal for caching, intensive log storage, or containers running on RouterOS.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This component is the ideal choice for:

MikroTik ROSE Data Server

To fill the RDS2216 storage slots with reliable drives.

High-density storage

For those who need fast NVMe storage in a compact U.2 physical format.
mikrotik-swivel-antenna-mmcx-for-indoor-:
Dual band. MMCX connector. For internal boards.

The MikroTik ACSWIM is the ideal omnidirectional antenna for adding Wi-Fi connectivity to RouterBOARDs and miniPCIe cards. This dual-band (2.4-5.8GHz) antenna has a cable with an MMCX connector, designed specifically to connect directly to internal wireless cards. Its "swivel" design and the included mounting clip make installation inside indoor enclosures (such as the CA411) simple and clean.

Why Choose ACSWIM?

Specific MMCX connector

This antenna was made to connect miniPCIe cards or RouterBOARDs that use the MMCX connector (such as the R11e or R52n series), making it the perfect upgrade or replacement.

Dual-band flexibility (4dBi)

Covering the 2.4 GHz and 5.8 GHz bands with 4dBi gain, this antenna offers solid performance for Wi-Fi 802.11ac/n/b/g networks, all in a single antenna.

Swivel (articulated) design

The articulated design allows you to position the antenna at the ideal angle for the best signal reception inside the enclosure, and the mounting clip holds it securely in the correct position.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This antenna is the ideal choice for:

Custom AP assembly

For those assembling a RouterBOARD (such as an RB912) inside an indoor enclosure and needing internal antennas for the miniPCIe card.

Antenna Replacement

To replace damaged antennas on MikroTik equipment (such as older ceiling APs) that use the MMCX connector.
mikrotik-sxt-lte7-kit-with-routeros-l3-s:
