LTE Category 7. Robust connectivity. Remote installation.

The SXT LTE7 kit (SXTR and R11e-LTE7) is the high-performance upgrade for mobile connectivity in remote locations. This outdoor CPE integrates the new R11e-LTE7 modem, offering download speeds of up to 300 Mbps and upload speeds of up to 100 Mbps thanks to Carrier Aggregation technology. Designed to withstand harsh conditions, it is the ideal solution for ensuring fast internet at country houses, farms, or off-grid installations where mobile phones fail.

Why Choose SXT LTE7?

Speed and Efficiency (Cat7)

The advantage of Category 7 lies in the ability to use multiple LTE bands simultaneously. This not only doubles the upload speed compared to previous models, but also improves responsiveness in congested environments and increases efficiency in weaker field signal situations.

Flexible power and PoE output

The SXT LTE7 is extremely versatile in its power supply, accepting input voltage of 12-57V via PoE or DC connector. Furthermore, the Ether2 port has PoE output (passive), allowing you to power another device, such as a Wi-Fi access point or a camera, directly from the antenna, without extra power cables.

Proven SXT design

Housed in the classic SXT chassis, this device is discreet and durable. It includes all the necessary mounting accessories (metal clamp, PoE injector, power supply) and is ready to operate at extreme temperatures from -40°C to +60°C.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This equipment is the ideal choice for:

Rural and Remote Areas

To capture LTE signal over long distances where smartphones or indoor routers cannot establish a stable connection.

Network redundancy

As a backup link for businesses that cannot afford to lose connectivity, using the high-performance 4G network.
mikrotik-sxtsq-5-ax-sxtsq-5axd:
MikroTik SXTsq 5 ax: Outdoor Wi-Fi 6 CPE/AP (5GHz, 16dBi) Compact.

The MikroTik SXTsq 5 ax (product code SXTsq-5axD) is your favorite outdoor CPE, now upgraded with the latest Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) technology and the versatility to also function as an Access Point. This compact and rugged device maintains the tried-and-tested SXTsq design, but has been modernized with a dual-core ARM CPU and all the benefits of Wi-Fi 6 to deliver better throughput, lower latency, and greater efficiency on 5 GHz wireless connections. With a built-in 16 dBi antenna, the SXTsq 5 ax is ideal for creating reliable Point-to-Point (PtP) links that can reach over 10 km in line-of-sight conditions, or for functioning as a robust client (CPE) in Point-to-MultiPoint (PtMP) networks. Thanks to its RouterOS Level 4 license, it can also be easily configured as a powerful access point, offering even more flexibility. Powered via passive PoE (12-28V) and with the included Gigabit PoE injector and transformer, the SXTsq 5 ax is an exceptional value solution for WISPs and for those seeking modern and efficient wireless bridges.

Why Choose the MikroTik SXTsq 5 ax?

Outdoor Wi-Fi 6 efficiency

The 802.11ax (Wi-Fi 6) standard introduces significant improvements for long-distance wireless connections, such as greater spectral efficiency, higher modulation rates (1024-QAM), and reduced latency. This results in superior performance even in noisy environments, and in faster, more stable connections at greater distances.

Dual Function: CPE or Access Point (RouterOS L4)

The RouterOS Level 4 license gives the SXTsq 5 ax remarkable flexibility. It can operate efficiently as a client (CPE) in a PtMP network or be configured as a powerful access point to serve multiple clients, adapting to the needs of your wireless infrastructure.

Integrated 16 dBi antenna and compact design

The 16 dBi antenna is integrated in the popular and compact SXTsq format. This design is not only aesthetically discreet, but also weatherproof and easy to mount on poles or horizontal masts thanks to the zip-tie slots in three different positions.

Ideal for long-distance and high-interference links

Maintaining the long-range architecture of previous SXT models, the SXTsq 5 ax is capable of establishing point-to-point connections exceeding 10 km in line-of-sight conditions. It has also been field-tested, demonstrating capability for links of up to 3 km in urban scenarios with high interference.

Complete Kit and Competitive Price

The SXTsq 5 ax comes with the essential accessories for its installation and operation, including the 24V 0.38A power adapter, a Gigabit PoE injector, and a metal mast mounting clamp. All this while maintaining a competitive price, similar to the previous Wi-Fi 5 model.

Ideal For whom?

The MikroTik SXTsq 5 ax is the ideal choice for:

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

As a great-value Wi-Fi 6 CPE for connecting clients to their PtMP networks or as a compact and efficient sectoral AP for small deployments, for example, to provide Internet to a village.

Reliable point-to-point (PTP) connections

Creating stable, high-performing wireless bridges between buildings, university campuses, or other remote locations, covering considerable distances.

Clients (CPE) in Wi-Fi 6 Point-to-MultiPoint (PtMP) networks

The ideal client device for connecting to a Wi-Fi 6 base station (access point), such as the MikroTik MANTBox ax 15s, ensuring a robust and fast connection.

Users upgrading from Wi-Fi 5 to Wi-Fi 6

A direct and cost-effective upgrade path for those already using Wi-Fi 5-based SXT models who want to take advantage of Wi-Fi 6 technology and WPA3 security.

MikroTik enthusiasts and outdoor networking

For users familiar with the flexibility of RouterOS v7 who are looking for a compact, powerful, and affordable Wi-Fi 6 device for their outdoor wireless networking projects.
mikrotik-sxtsq-mount-sxtsq-mount:
The perfect alignment for your SXTsq connection.

The SXTsq mount is a simple and durable alignment bracket designed specifically for MikroTik's SXTsq series products. This robust accessory allows fine adjustments, essential for optimizing the performance of a Point-to-Point wireless connection, ensuring the best signal and maximum stability.

Why choose the SXTsq-mount?

Fine alignment for maximum performance

Get the best possible signal from your point-to-point connection. This bracket allows fine adjustments of up to 45 degrees in both directions. This ensures you can align your SXTsq antenna with maximum precision, resulting in higher throughput and greater connection stability.

Simple and quick installation

Installation is a straightforward process. Simply attach the bracket to the back of your SXTsq device, mount the assembly on the pole with the included U-bolt, and finally use one of three adjustment positions for final alignment. It's fast and effective.

Durable Construction

This accessory was designed to be robust, ensuring your SXTsq stays firmly in place and the alignment remains stable, even in outdoor conditions.

Ideal For whom?

Any SXTsq series user

The primary audience. It is a recommended upgrade for anyone using an SXTsq series device for point-to-point connection who wants to ensure the best possible performance.

Point-to-Point (PtP) link installers

For professionals who need to ensure the best signal quality and connection stability for their clients. A small investment in the right bracket can make a big difference in final performance.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-tg-bt5-in-tg-bt5-in:
Smart location for your assets.

The TG-BT5-IN is a slim and elegant Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) location tag from MikroTik, designed to track assets in indoor environments. Perfect for warehouse logistics or equipment location on construction sites, this small tag transmits its location to Bluetooth gateways (such as the MikroTik KNOT), enabling you to create an affordable and flexible location and telemetry system.

Why choose the TG-BT5-IN tag?

Simple and effective proximity tracking

Monitor your valuable objects in a simple way. Just attach the tag to the item you want to locate — whether tools, pallets or electrical equipment — and the nearest BLE gateway will detect its presence, sending the information to your server. Get notified when your cargo arrives at the warehouse!

Long-lasting battery

The tags consume so little power that their built-in 220 mAh battery can last for years. The transmission interval is configurable; for example, with a 1-second interval, the battery typically lasts up to two years, and with longer intervals it can last much longer.

Integrated Accelerometer

In addition to location, the tag includes an accelerometer that can detect movement, tilt, or even log whether the object has fallen (free-fall detection), providing valuable telemetry data about the status of your assets.

Compatibility with multiple formats

By default, the tag broadcasts packets in MikroTik's telemetry format, but it is also fully compatible with the iBeacon and Eddystone standards, ensuring integration with a wide range of third-party applications and location systems.

Ideal For whom?

Warehouse Logistics

For tracking inventory, pallets or equipment inside a warehouse. Always know where your assets are and receive automatic notifications when they are moved.

Asset management on construction sites

Attach tags to valuable tools and equipment to easily locate them on a large construction site using KNOT gateways distributed throughout the area.

IoT (Internet of Things) Applications

For any IoT project requiring proximity, movement or tilt detection, using a low-power device with a long-lasting battery.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-tg-bt5-out-tg-bt5-out:
Industrial Robustness. IP69k Protection. Smart Tracking.

The TG-BT5-OUT is Mikrotik's most rugged Bluetooth (BLE) tag, designed to withstand the most extreme industrial challenges. Fully sealed in industrial-grade molds, this device has an IP69k rating (dustproof and high-pressure washdown resistant). Equipped with Bluetooth 5.2, a precise temperature sensor, and support for iBeacon and Eddystone, it is the ultimate tool for telemetry and asset tracking in harsh environments.

Why Choose the TG-BT5-OUT?

Extreme IP69k Protection

This tag is "dustproof" and protected against high-pressure, high-temperature water jets at close range. This means it can be installed on heavy machinery, construction equipment, or areas that undergo frequent industrial washdowns without sustaining damage.

Temperature sensor and telemetry

Unlike the indoor version, this model includes a built-in temperature sensor with an accuracy of ±0.5°C. It supports iBeacon, Eddystone, and Mikrotik telemetry formats, allowing you to monitor environmental conditions in real time.

Long-lasting battery (5 years)

Equipped with an enhanced 550 mAh battery, the TG-BT5-OUT can operate for approximately 5 years (with a 1s sending interval), ensuring virtually no maintenance over the product's lifetime.

Easy configuration (NFC)

Includes an NFC-encoded MAC address and optional encryption, making it easy to configure and quickly pair with gateways (such as KNOT routers or Mikrotik devices with Bluetooth).

Ideal For which scenarios?

This tag is the ideal choice for:

Cold Chain Logistics

Monitor the temperature of containers, refrigerated trucks, or food warehouses (-20°C to 85°C) to ensure product quality.

Industry and Construction

Track heavy equipment, tools, and materials on construction sites or factories where dust, mud, and water are constant.

Smart Agriculture

Attach it to tractors, agricultural implements, or field infrastructure to monitor assets and ambient temperature.
mikrotik-tg-lr82:
Smart Long-Range Tracking with LoRaWAN.

The MikroTik TG-LR82 is a configurable LoRaWAN sensor that combines multiple sensors, smart event rules, and flexible reporting profiles in a compact device. Designed to monitor environments, equipment, and logistics over long distances, it natively integrates with MikroTik LR8 gateways and modern monitoring platforms. With an IP67 rating and a battery with an expected lifespan of 5 years, it is the ideal solution for demanding IoT deployments.

Why choose the TG-LR82?

Multiple sensors in a single device

The TG-LR82 integrates a high-precision temperature sensor (NIST-traceable, ±0.2°C), humidity, an accelerometer to detect movement, impact and tilt, and a reed switch to detect the opening of doors, lids, and cabinets. A complete solution for the most demanding monitoring scenarios.

Local data processing

The device processes data locally before transmitting it, generating temperature and humidity averages or histograms, reducing network traffic and preserving valuable information about environmental conditions. Ideal for monitoring temperature-sensitive goods in cold chains and warehouses.

Configurable profiles and event rules

Supports multiple configuration profiles and event-based rules, allowing the device to automatically adapt to changing conditions. For example: under normal operation it sends telemetry every 6 hours; upon detecting a door opening, it switches profile and starts sending updates every 5 minutes, without complex back-end logic.

2.4 GHz LoRa support for global deployments

In addition to the 868 MHz band, the TG-LR82 supports LoRa at 2.4 GHz, eliminating regional frequency restrictions. It can be used globally without configuration changes, with a typical range of around 1.5 km. A practical option for moving assets such as container ships or international logistics systems.

Native Integration with MikroTik Ecosystem

Natively integrates with MikroTik LR8 LoRaWAN gateways (KNOT LR8G, wAP LR8G, wAP LR2), providing long-range connectivity for deployments in buildings, industrial facilities, or outdoor environments. Data can be visualized in real time through Grafana dashboards, with support for RouterOS containers.

Ideal For whom?

Logistics and Cold Chains

For temperature and humidity monitoring in warehouses, cold rooms, containers, and transportation of sensitive goods, with automatic alerts when thresholds are exceeded.

Industrial facilities and buildings

Equipment monitoring, motion detection, and access control in industrial facilities, offices, schools, or any environment where remote supervision is critical.

IoT integrators and professionals

Those looking for a versatile, durable sensor that is easy to integrate with platforms such as The Things Network (TTN) or Grafana, to deliver complete monitoring solutions to their clients.
mikrotik-wall-gigabit-poe-injector-gpen1:
The network "socket". For the GPEN system. Powers the Uplink.

GPEN11 is the client unit (power injection) of Mikrotik's GPEN (Gigabit Passive Ethernet Network) concept. Designed to replace expensive GPON installations, this device is a wall-mount PoE injector. Its function is simple: it receives power from a DC source (12-57V) and injects it (via Passive PoE-Out) into the network cable (Ether2) to power the "uplink" device (such as a GPER or netPower) located outside or in the attic.

Why Choose GPEN11?

The Foundation of the GPEN Concept

GPEN is the low-cost Ethernet alternative to GPON. The GPEN11 is the piece that goes inside the customer's home. It mounts cleanly on the wall, eliminating power "bricks" (ONTs) and messy cables, providing a professional finish.

Powerful passive PoE output (2A)

With an output capacity of up to 2 Amps, the GPEN11 has enough power to feed its uplink (such as a GPER) and potentially other devices connected in series to that GPER, all through a single network cable.

Gigabit ports and flexible power input

It features 2 10/100/1000 Ethernet ports (1x LAN for the client, 1x PoE-Out for the uplink), ensuring Gigabit speed is maintained. It can be powered by any DC source from 12V to 57V.

Designed for ISPs (Space for stickers)

With mass deployment in mind, the GPEN11 has a designated space on the front (6.6 x 2.54 cm) for placing a sticker with the Internet Service Provider's (ISP) branding.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Providers (ISPs) using GPEN

Application number 1. It is the customer terminal unit for any GPEN network installation, providing power to the rest of the passive infrastructure.

Wall PoE injector (general use)

It can also be used as a high-power (2A) wall-mount PoE injector to power any AP, CPE, or camera (passive PoE) where a clean finish is desired.
mikrotik-wall-gigabit-poe-injector-gpen2:
MikroTik GPEN21: Smart PoE injector and repeater with SwOS management.

The MikroTik GPEN21 is a smart power injector that goes beyond a simple power supply, functioning as an advanced software-controlled repeater. This versatile device can not only power your uplink devices via PoE, but also offers a useful set of software features through SwOS. The GPEN21 features two Gigabit Ethernet ports and one SFP port for fiber connectivity, enabling simultaneous external connections (though not for cross-communication between those specific ports). One of its main applications is providing PoE power (passive, up to 57V) for customer or provider equipment, such as MikroTik GPeR and/or netPower devices. With a design that allows secure mounting on a wall or communications cabinet, and a designated space for an ISP identification label, the GPEN21 is a practical and manageable solution for optimizing and monitoring network terminal points or small repeater setups.

Why Choose MikroTik GPEN21?

Smart PoE Injector with SwOS Features

More than a simple injector, the GPEN21 runs SwOS, MikroTik's operating system for switches. This allows interface management and monitoring, GPEN link failure detection, VLAN support, SNMP reporting, and basic traffic shaping, all configurable through a web browser.

Passive PoE power output

The Ether2 port can provide passive PoE output (communication voltage up to 57V, depending on input) to power compatible devices such as CPEs, IP cameras, or other equipment from MikroTik's GPEN line (GPeR, netPower).

Flexible connectivity (2x GbE + 1x SFP)

It features two Gigabit Ethernet ports and one SFP port for fiber optics. These ports can be used for external connections, such as one Ethernet port for the client and the SFP port for the fiber uplink (note: the device does not switch between the input Ethernet port and the SFP port for the client; they are for separate uplink/downlink connections or management).

Multiple input feed options

The GPEN21 can be powered via a DC connector (12-57V) or via PoE input on its Ether1 port (with support for 802.3af/at or passive PoE from 12-57V), offering flexibility in installation.

Practical design for installation

It can be securely mounted on a wall or inside a communications cabinet. The enclosure design allows the Ethernet cable to be routed directly through the bottom opening or through the wall. It also includes a space for an ISP identification label.

Ideal For whom?

The MikroTik GPEN21 is ideal for:

Internet Service Providers (ISPs)

As a smart network terminal point at the customer's installation, enabling the customer's CPE (e.g., GPeR) to be powered while offering monitoring and remote management functionalities through SwOS.

Fiber-to-the-Home/Building (FTTH/FTTB) deployments

For managing services and power delivery in fiber installations, especially when using other components from MikroTik's GPEN family.

Small repeater or network extension points

In scenarios where a signal needs to be repeated and a PoE device powered at the repeater point, with the added advantage of interface and VLAN management.

Network administrators who need precise control

For those looking for more than a simple PoE injector, requiring features such as link monitoring, VLAN support, and basic traffic shaping at the power delivery point.
mikrotik-wap-60g-a-rbwapg-60ad-a-60ghz-l:
The 60 GHz "Swiss army knife" AP, CPE and PtP. In a single device.

The wAP 60G AP (RBwAPG-60ad-A) is MikroTik's most versatile weatherproof (IP55) integrated 60GHz unit. It is the "all-in-one" solution for the 60 GHz spectrum: it can be used as an Access Point (AP/Base Station) for up to 8 clients, as a CPE (client), or in a Point-to-Point (PtP) link. The box includes a complete kit: wall bracket, pole clamps, PoE injector (802.3af/at), and even a desk stand for indoor use.

Why Choose wAP 60G AP?

3-in-1 Versatility (AP/CPE/PtP)

Its greatest asset. With the Level 4 license, you can use it as an Access Point (Base Station) to connect up to 8 clients (CPEs) at over 200m distance. You can use it as a CPE (to connect to a 60 GHz AP, such as the wAP 60Gx3 AP). Or you can use two wAP 60G units for a dedicated point-to-point (PtP) link. It is the only 60 GHz device you need in your inventory.

Powerful quad-core CPU

60 GHz requires processing power. The wAP 60G AP is equipped with a powerful ARM Quad-Core CPU (IPQ-4019) and 256MB of RAM, ensuring stable performance whether you are managing 8 clients or delivering Gigabit traffic on a PtP link.

Complete kit (indoor/outdoor)

The box includes everything. You can mount it on a pole (clamps), on a wall (mounting kit), or, thanks to the desk stand, use it in indoor environments. It is perfect for passing through windows (it penetrates some types of glass) without needing to drill through walls.

Clean spectrum (60GHz)

Forget interference from 2.4/5 GHz networks. The 60 GHz spectrum offers fiber-like speed and stability, without the congestion of traditional bands.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

WISP "Last Mile" (AP or CPE)

Application number 1. Use it as a 60 GHz client CPE (connected to a sector AP) or as a micro-AP for a small group of clients (up to 8).

Short-distance PtP links (200m+)

Interconnect two buildings (campuses, offices) at Gigabit speed, quickly and cost-effectively.

Indoor/temporary connectivity

Thanks to the desk stand, it is perfect for connecting offices through windows (it penetrates some types of glass) or for temporary events.
mikrotik-wap-60g-rbwapg-60ad-60ghz-l3-rb:
Your Gigabit connection, free from interference.

The MikroTik wAP 60G is an integrated, weatherproof 60 GHz wireless unit that can be used indoors or outdoors for various scenarios, such as a point-to-point (PtP) connection or as a CPE. By operating at 60 GHz frequency, it offers a high-speed connection similar to fiber optics, completely immune to the congested spectrum of traditional Wi-Fi networks.

Why choose wAP 60G?

Interference-free 60 GHz connectivity

The 60 GHz band is the ideal solution for urban environments with multiple Wi-Fi networks. Being a much less used and highly directional frequency, your connection will not suffer the interference that affects 2.4 and 5 GHz networks, resulting in an ultra-stable, low-latency connection.

"Wire-Speed" Gigabit Performance

Equipped with a powerful quad-core CPU, the wAP 60G is capable of achieving near 1 Gbps wire speed. This means you can enjoy true Gigabit performance on your wireless connection, ideal for transferring large files or streaming high-quality video.

Complete kit and versatile mounting

The box includes everything you need for installation: wall mounting kit, pole mounting clamps, power supply, Gigabit PoE injector, and even a desk stand for indoor use. Its design allows for discreet mounting anywhere.

Ideal For whom?

Point-to-point (PtP) links

The primary application. Use two wAP 60G units to create a high-speed wireless network "bridge" between two buildings, replacing a fiber optic cable much more quickly and cost-effectively.

As a CPE in a point-to-multipoint network

The wAP 60G (with RouterOS Level 3 license) works as an excellent client device (CPE) to connect to a 60 GHz Access Point, such as the wAP 60G AP, at distances of up to 200 meters or more.

Dense urban environments

Perfect for creating wireless connections in cities or other areas where the 2.4 and 5 GHz spectrum is completely saturated, ensuring a clean, interference-free connection.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-wap-60gx3-ap-rbwapg-60ad-sa-60g:
60 GHz point to multipoint. 180° sector. Up to 8 clients.

The wAP 60Gx3 AP (RBwAPG-60ad-SA) is the access point (AP) that revolutionizes the 60GHz market. Unlike standard point-to-point (PtP) models, this is a sector unit (SA) designed specifically for point-to-multipoint (PtMP). Its array of 96 antennas uses beamforming to cover a 180-degree sector, enabling simultaneous connection of up to 8 60 GHz clients (e.g., wAP 60G or Cube 60G). It is the low-cost WISP solution for "last mile" in the clean 60 GHz spectrum.

Why Choose wAP 60Gx3 AP?

60 GHz Point-to-Multipoint (PtMP)

Its primary function. Instead of needing multiple expensive PtP radios on your tower, a single wAP 60Gx3 AP covers a 180° sector and serves up to 8 clients. It is the most cost-effective way to build a "last mile" Gigabit network.

Phased Array Antenna (180° beamforming)

The device features 96 antenna elements using advanced beamforming technology. This allows you to focus the signal on each of the 8 clients within its wide 180° field of view, ensuring the best possible connection performance.

Powerful quad-core CPU

To manage 8 clients simultaneously with beamforming and Gigabit traffic, the wAP 60Gx3 AP comes equipped with a powerful ARM Quad-Core CPU (IPQ-4019) and 256MB of RAM, ensuring the hardware is up to the task.

Ready for outdoor environments (IP54)

With a robust enclosure (IP54), tested from -40°C to 70°C, and flexible power supply via DC Jack (12-57V) or PoE-in (802.3af/at), it is ready to be installed on any tower or mast.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

WISP ("Last Mile" Sector AP)

Application number 1. Mount on a tower to provide Gigabit Internet to clients (within a 180° radius) equipped with 60 GHz CPEs (such as the wAP 60G or Cube 60G).

Events / Campus / Hotspots

Offer high-speed connectivity in open areas (e.g., squares, trade fairs, concerts) where the 5 GHz spectrum is saturated.

Point-to-point (PtP) links

Although optimized for PtMP, the device can also be used in point-to-point mode, just like the standard wAP 60G.
mikrotik-wap-ac-lte-kit-2024-wapgr-5hacd:
Wi-Fi AC. 4G LTE (Band 28). Discreet design.

The wAP ac LTE kit is Mikrotik's "all-in-one" solution for outdoor connectivity. It combines a dual-band Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) access point and a 4G LTE Cat 4 modem in a compact, rugged (IP54), and cost-effective form factor. This new revision (EC200A-EU) comes with 2x Gigabit Ethernet ports and an upgraded 4G modem that includes support for the crucial Band 28 (700MHz), making it the perfect choice for Internet backup (failover).

Why Choose wAP ac LTE?

The perfect backup solution (2x GbE)

With two Gigabit Ethernet ports, the wAP ac LTE is the ideal failover router. Use port 1 (PoE input) for your primary fiber/cable connection and let the LTE Cat 4 (150 Mbps) modem automatically take over if the primary connection fails. The Quad-Core (ARM) CPU and RouterOS v7 manage everything transparently.

Upgraded modem (with Band 28)

This version (EC200A-EU) includes a modern 4G modem that supports Band 28 (700MHz). This low-frequency band is essential in rural or hard-to-cover areas, as it offers better signal penetration and greater range than traditional 4G bands.

Discreet and secure outdoor design

The wAP (Wall AP) was designed to blend into the environment (IP54). The mounting is done inside the enclosure and an anti-vandalism screw protects the device. The Ethernet cable can pass directly through the back and through the wall, resulting in a 100% clean installation with no visible cables.

Simultaneous dual-band Wi-Fi

Provides 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi (for compatibility) and 5 GHz Wi-Fi (for high-speed AC) at the same time. Use it to provide Wi-Fi to your garden, patio, or garage, powered by 4G or your main network.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Internet Backup (failover)

Application number 1. For homes or small offices that cannot afford to go offline. The wAP takes over the 4G connection if the fiber/cable fails.

Primary 4G Internet

For remote locations or vacation homes (especially with B28 coverage) that need an "all-in-one" 4G + Wi-Fi AC internet solution.

Outdoor Wi-Fi (gardens, patios)

Use it as a simple outdoor AP (connected to your main network) to extend your Wi-Fi coverage in outdoor environments, with the added advantage of having an extra 4G modem.
mikrotik-wap-ax-lte7-kit-wapgr-5haxd2hax:
Dual-band Wi-Fi 6. LTE Cat7 Modem. IP66 Protection.

The MikroTik wAP ax LTE7 kit (WAPGR-5HaxD2HaxD&R11e-LTE7) brings ultrafast and reliable connectivity to challenging environments. With its classic and proven form factor, this Access Point combines powerful Wi-Fi 6 coverage with an integrated LTE Category 7 modem, ideal for rural areas, bus stops, or properties with fixed network failures.

Why Choose the wAP ax LTE7 kit?

Doubled speeds with LTE Cat7

In this new generation, the device has been upgraded with an LTE Cat7 modem, which allows download speeds of up to 300 Mbps and upload speeds of 100 Mbps (double that of the previous generation). It supports carrier aggregation (2x CA) and includes new bands (B28 at 700 MHz and B32 at 1500 MHz), ensuring greater responsiveness even on congested networks.

Wi-Fi 6 and two Gigabit ports

The local network is not far behind. Equipped with a powerful dual-band Wi-Fi 6 radio (802.11ax) and enhanced 6 dBi (2.4 GHz) and 7 dBi (5 GHz) antennas, it offers exceptional wireless coverage throughout your yard or commercial space. For flexible wired connections, it features two Gigabit Ethernet ports, supporting PoE-In on one of them.

Stealthy and weatherproof design (IP66)

Built to last, it features a weatherproof IP66 structure, with an anti-vandalism system that hides the opening screw behind the MikroTik logo. Its discreet and "stealthy" design does not attract unwanted attention and includes a rear opening that allows cables to be passed directly through the wall safely and invisibly.
mikrotik-wap-lte-kit-2024-wapr-2nd-ec200:
4G and Wi-Fi connectivity, anywhere.

The MikroTik wAP LTE kit is a compact and weatherproof wireless access point with an integrated 4G/LTE modem. It is the perfect solution for providing Internet access in outdoor locations such as gardens, terraces, or any other challenging environment, through a mobile network connection. This new revision includes an improved LTE modem, with support for the popular band 28, and at a more affordable price than ever.

Why choose the wAP LTE kit?

Internet access via 4G/LTE

The integrated Category 4 LTE modem allows you to get an Internet connection with downlink speeds of up to 150 Mbps and uplink of 50 Mbps. With broad band support, including band 28 (700 MHz) for better coverage in rural areas, you can have a reliable connection where others fail.

Integrated Wi-Fi access point

In addition to receiving the 4G signal, the wAP LTE kit works as a 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi access point. Share your mobile internet connection with your devices, such as smartphones, laptops and tablets, creating your own wireless network wherever you are.

Discreet and weatherproof design

The legendary wAP form factor was designed to be durable and discreet. It can be securely mounted on an exterior wall from inside the enclosure, hiding the screws. The bottom can be additionally secured with an anti-vandalism screw, ensuring a secure installation.

Flexible triple power supply

The wAP LTE kit offers unmatched power flexibility. It can be powered through its Ethernet port with passive PoE, the traditional DC connector, or through the car power plug, making it perfect for use in vehicles.

Ideal For whom?

Internet in rural or vacation areas

The ideal solution for accessing the Internet in a vacation home, a rural area, or anywhere without a fixed broadband connection. All you need is a SIM card to get online.

Vehicle connectivity

Thanks to its car power option, it is perfect for installation in motorhomes, boats, or service vehicles, providing a stable Internet connection on the move or when parked.

Internet backup (failover)

It can be used as an economical backup solution for your main Internet connection. If your fixed connection fails, the wAP LTE kit takes over, keeping you always online.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-wapg-5haxd2haxd-wap-ax-l4-wapg-:
Wi-Fi 6 performance more robust than ever.

The MikroTik wAP ax raises the bar for weatherproof access points, bringing the speed and efficiency of Wi-Fi 6 to the iconic and durable wAP form factor. Equipped with a dual-band radio, a modern ARM CPU, and two Gigabit Ethernet ports, it is the perfect upgrade for any existing wAP ac installation and the ideal choice for providing fast and reliable wireless connectivity in any environment, indoor or outdoor.

Why choose the wAP ax?

The power of Wi-Fi 6

wAP ax is significantly faster than its previous version, with a speed increase of up to 90% on the 2.4 GHz band and up to 40% on the 5 GHz band. Wi-Fi 6 also offers greater efficiency and stability in environments with multiple devices, as well as enhanced security with WPA3 encryption.

Improved hardware for better performance

This new version includes a modern dual-core ARM CPU and 256 MB of RAM, ensuring a stable connection and excellent VPN performance. Dual Gigabit Ethernet ports offer flexibility to connect a second device, while RouterOS v7 unlocks the latest software features.

Discreet and weatherproof design

The legendary wAP form factor was designed to blend into any environment and withstand weather conditions. It can be securely mounted on a wall or ceiling from inside the enclosure and features a rear opening to pass the Ethernet cable directly through the wall, resulting in an extra discreet and secure installation.

Centralized Management with CAPsMAN

wAP ax fully supports MikroTik's new CAPsMAN, enabling fast and simple centralized management of multiple access points with just a few clicks, ideal for larger networks.

Ideal For whom?

Wi-Fi coverage in Gardens and Terraces

The perfect solution for extending your home Wi-Fi 6 network to outdoor spaces, allowing you to enjoy a fast and stable connection in your garden, patio, or terrace.

Café and restaurant terraces

To provide customers with state-of-the-art Wi-Fi access in the outdoor areas of your establishment, with robust, discreet equipment and hotspot features.

Upgrade existing installations

It is a "drop-in" upgrade for installations already using wAP ac, offering a significant performance boost with the same form factor and mounting type.

Technical Specifications
mikrotik-wireless-wire-pair-preconfigure:
Fiber speed, without cables.

Officelan is proud to present the MikroTik Wireless Wire (RBwAPG-60adkit), a revolutionary solution that delivers the speed and quality of fiber optics at a fraction of the price. This incredible kit replaces your Gigabit Ethernet cable with two small devices that connect via a 60 GHz wireless link, creating a 1 Gbit/s full-duplex bridge instantly and securely.

Why choose wireless wire?

True Plug-and-Play

Forget complex configurations. The two wAP60G units that make up the kit come pre-configured from the factory to find each other. Simply point the devices at each other, plug them in, and you will have a 1 Gbit/s link installed and running in minutes. It is the true definition of "cable replacement".

Immune to interference

Wireless Wire operates in the 60 GHz band, which is free from the congested Wi-Fi spectrum. This, combined with AES encryption, ensures an extremely stable, secure, and fast connection over distances of 200 meters or more, without suffering interference from neighboring networks.

Versatile installation

The box includes everything you need to get started. In addition to the two Wireless Wire units, the kit comes with wall mounting kits, pole mounting brackets, and a pair of desktop stands for indoor use, offering maximum installation flexibility.

Ideal For whom?

Businesses and Offices

Perfect for connecting campus buildings, connecting a warehouse to the main office, or for any scenario where installing a fiber cable is expensive, time-consuming, or simply impossible.

Temporary events and rapid deployments

For events, trade shows, or construction sites that need high-speed temporary connectivity, Wireless Wire is the fastest solution to deploy. Officelan recommends this kit for any product that requires agility.

Backbone for surveillance networks

An excellent option for creating a high-capacity connection to an IP surveillance camera system, ensuring that video is transmitted to the recorder without network bottlenecks.
mikrotik-xq-85mp01d-mm-100m-100g-xq-85mp:
Reaching 100 Gbps on multimode fiber.

The XQ+85MP01D is a high-performance optical transceiver module from MikroTik, designed to create 100 Gbps connections in data centers and enterprise networks. This module uses an MPO connector and multimode fiber to offer an economical and reliable solution for high-speed connections over distances of up to 100 meters, making it ideal for interconnecting your next-generation switches and routers, such as the CCR2216 and the CRS504.

Why choose the XQ+85MP01D module?

100 Gigabit performance

Unlock the true potential of your network. This module offers four independent full-duplex channels with bandwidth of up to 25 Gbps per channel, resulting in an aggregate bandwidth of 100 Gbps. It is essential for switch backbones, server interconnects, and high-speed storage environments.

High-density MPO connector

This module uses a high-density MTP/MPO connector, which combines multiple fibers into a single connection point. This technology is fundamental for 100G networks over multimode fiber and allows greater port density in your equipment.

Integrated Digital Monitoring

The module includes integrated digital diagnostic functions (DDM/DOM), such as optical power monitoring. This allows network administrators to monitor the health and performance of the link in real time, facilitating proactive maintenance and troubleshooting.

Ideal For whom?

Data centers and enterprise networks

The primary application. Perfect for high-speed connections between core, aggregation, and Top-of-Rack switches, where bandwidth and low latency are essential.

Users of MikroTik 100G equipment

The ideal complement to MikroTik 100 Gigabit equipment, such as CCR2216 routers and CRS504 or CRS518 switches, to ensure a connection with maximum performance and reliability.

High-performance computing (HPC) environments

Where the massive bandwidth and low latency of 100 Gbps links are crucial for the performance of computing clusters and high-speed storage systems.

Technical Specifications
modulo-poe-48-to-24v-poe-converter-gigab:
Powering 24V RBs. Switches With 48V (PoE+). The high-power converter.

RBGPOE-CON-HP is an industrial-grade "lifesaver" for network installations. This robust Gigabit converter solves the most common MikroTik problem: how to power a 24V (passive PoE) device from a standard 48V (802.3af/at) PoE switch. Simply connect the 48V switch cable to one port and connect the 24V RouterBOARD to the other. This "High Power" (HP) model delivers up to 24W (24V 1A), sufficient for the most demanding equipment.

Important note: To obtain 24W output, the power source (switch or injector) must be 802.3at (PoE+) or 48V Passive PoE. If the source is 802.3af (standard PoE), the converter output will be limited to 12.95W.

Why Choose RBGPOE-CON-HP?

Universal compatibility (48V input)

Works with virtually any 42-57V PoE source. You can connect it to Cisco, Ubiquiti, HP, or any other 802.3af/at switch, as well as 48V passive PoE sources or telecom PoE.

High power (24W)

The 24V 1A (24W) output is sufficient to power not just a hEX, but also more powerful RouterBOARDs, such as a BaseBox, NetMetal, or any AP with powerful radios.

Robust metal enclosure (industrial grade)

This is not a plastic adapter. The case is fully metal, robust, acts as a heat sink, and can be wall-mounted. It operates from -35°C to +70°C and supports shielded cables for grounding, making it ideal for tower installations.

Gigabit speed

Ensures that your 10/100/1000 Mbps connection suffers no bottlenecks, maintaining the full performance of your network.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This converter is the ideal choice for:

Integrating MikroTik 24V into 48V Networks

The primary application. For companies that have 802.3at switching infrastructure and need to install MikroTik 24V APs, CPEs, or routers.

WISP installations (Towers)

The metal enclosure and grounding capability make it perfect for installation in outdoor weatherproof boxes, near antennas, to convert the PoE going up the tower.
modulo-poe-gigabit-passivo-low-cost-rb-g:
MikroTik RBGPOE: Passive Gigabit PoE Injector for RouterBOARD equipment.

The MikroTik RBGPOE is a passive Power over Ethernet (PoE) injector designed to power RouterBOARD devices and other compatible equipment via Ethernet network cable. This Gigabit injector is a simple and economical solution for powering your MikroTik devices that support passive PoE, using an external power supply (not included in the RBGPOE itself, typically provided with the RouterBOARD device being powered). It supports a wide input voltage range (18-57V) and delivers the same voltage to the PoE output, with a maximum current of 2A. With a compact, robust design and wide operating temperature range, the RBGPOE is ideal for reliable installations where passive PoE needs to be provided to network equipment.

Why Choose MikroTik RBGPOE?

Reliable passive PoE power

Provides stable passive PoE power to MikroTik RouterBOARD devices and other equipment that supports this power method. The output voltage equals the input voltage, supporting from 18V to 57V.

Gigabit Ethernet support

Ensures that your data connection is not a bottleneck, allowing traffic to pass at Gigabit speeds (10/100/1000 Mbps) between your switch/router and the powered device.

Wide voltage compatibility

With an input voltage range of 18V to 57V DC, it can be used with a variety of power supplies, including those typically provided with RouterBOARD equipment.

Compact and robust design

Its small form factor allows for easy and discreet installation. It was built to be durable, operating over a wide temperature range (-40°C to 70°C).

Economical solution

Represents an affordable way to power compatible passive PoE devices, especially when the main network switch does not offer this functionality or adequate voltage.

Ideal For whom?

The MikroTik RBGPOE is ideal for:

MikroTik RouterBOARD equipment users

The primary choice for powering MikroTik routers, switches, access points, or CPEs that specify passive PoE power in the 18 to 57V range.

WISP installations (Wireless Internet Service Provider)

For powering outdoor radios and other equipment at customer premises or repeater towers, where passive PoE is frequently used.

Networks with non-PoE switches

When it is necessary to power a passive PoE compatible device and the existing network switch does not have the capability to provide power.

Budget-constrained network products

An economical way to provide power to devices, avoiding the cost of more expensive PoE switches, especially for a small number of devices.
modulo-poe-passivo-low-cost-rb-poe-rbpoe:
MikroTik RBPOE: Compact Passive PoE Injector for RouterBOARD Equipment.

The MikroTik RBPOE is a simple and effective passive Power over Ethernet (PoE) injector designed to power RouterBOARD devices and other compatible equipment through an Ethernet network cable. This compact unit is an economical solution for powering your MikroTik devices that support passive PoE at a lower voltage range (10-28V), using an external power supply (typically provided with the RouterBOARD device being powered or purchased separately). The RBPOE delivers to the PoE output the same voltage it receives at the input. It is important to note that this injector was designed for Fast Ethernet networks (10/100 Mbps). RBPOE is a reliable and affordable choice for powering MikroTik equipment that does not require Gigabit speeds and operates with low-voltage passive PoE.

Why Choose MikroTik RBPOE?

Dedicated passive PoE power

Provides direct and stable passive PoE power, specifically in the input voltage range of 10V to 28V. The output voltage equals the input voltage, suitable for many RouterBOARD devices.

Fast Ethernet connectivity

This injector supports data speeds of 10/100 Mbps, making it suitable for devices and applications where Gigabit connectivity is not an essential requirement.

Simple and compact design

Its small and lightweight form factor allows for easy and discreet installation anywhere, ideal for deployments where space is limited.

Economical and practical solution

Represents one of the most affordable ways to power MikroTik passive PoE compatible devices, especially when using a network switch that does not offer PoE capability or the correct voltage.

Ideal For whom?

The MikroTik RBPOE is ideal for:

Low-voltage MikroTik RouterBOARD equipment users

Especially for powering older or more basic MikroTik devices that specifically require passive PoE in the 10 to 28V range and operate on 10/100 Mbps networks.

WISP installations (Wireless Internet Service Provider)

For powering CPEs or small outdoor radios at customer installations where Fast Ethernet connection is sufficient and low-voltage passive PoE is standard.

Economical network products

A very economical PoE power solution for compatible devices, allowing cost reduction in deployments where the advanced features of Gigabit or higher-power injectors are not needed.

Simple access point or CPE applications

For powering access points or customer equipment in more basic scenarios, where the simplicity and low cost of the injector are advantageous.
qrt-5-outdoor-flat-panel-antenna-24dbi-q:
Extreme gain (24dBi). High power (30dBm). The classic 5 GHz PtP link.

The QRT 5 (RB911G-5HPnD-QRT) is MikroTik's "workhorse" for long-distance 5 GHz links (802.11n). It is an all-in-one outdoor unit (IP54) that combines a high-power radio (30dBm / 1W) with a massive-gain (24dBi) flat panel antenna. Crucially, it features a Gigabit Ethernet port to ensure the wireless link (up to 300 Mbps) is not bottlenecked. It is the ideal and quick-to-deploy solution for robust point-to-point (PtP) links.

Why Choose QRT 5?

The perfect pair: 24dBi gain + 30dBm power

This is the ideal combination for long distances. The 24dBi antenna is highly directional, concentrating all the energy into a narrow beam. The 1W (30dBm) radio provides the power needed to "push" that signal, enabling stable point-to-point (PtP) links over many kilometers.

Gigabit port (no bottlenecks)

Wi-Fi 4 (802.11n) speeds can reach 300 Mbps. A 10/100 (Fast Ethernet) port would limit your link to 100 Mbps. The QRT 5 includes a Gigabit Ethernet port (10/100/1000), ensuring you can enjoy the full speed your wireless link delivers.

All-in-one design (fast deployment)

The RouterBOARD (RB911) is already integrated into the antenna housing. There is no need for pigtails (which cause signal loss) or separate weatherproof enclosures. Installation is fast: mount, point, and connect the PoE cable (Passive PoE 8-28V).

RouterOS Level 4

Equipped with a Level 4 license, the QRT 5 is incredibly versatile. It can be used as a CPE (client), in a Point-to-Point link (bridge or router mode), or even as a sectoral Access Point (AP) with a very narrow beam.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Long-distance point-to-point (PTP) links

Its #1 application. Perfect for WISPs (backhauls) or for connecting two buildings (campuses, offices) separated by kilometers.

Extreme-range CPE (client)

For WISP clients who are very far from the 5 GHz transmission tower. The 24dBi gain allows capturing weak signals that other antennas cannot.
rackmount-ears-for-rb4011-series-k-65:
From desktop to rack. The official kit. For the RB4011 series.

The K-65 is the official MikroTik rack mounting kit, designed specifically for the powerful RB4011 series. This simple and robust kit allows you to take your RB4011 router (desktop version) and install it securely and professionally in a standard 19" rack, occupying 1U of height.

Why Choose K-65?

Perfect fit (official design)

Being the official MikroTik accessory, these "ears" have the exact drilling and perfect finish to align with the RB4011 chassis, ensuring a secure and gap-free installation.

Professional rack installation

Take the router off the shelf and put it in the rack. This improves organization, (passive) cooling, and gives your network installation a clean and professional finish.

Robust construction

Made of metal, this kit was designed to safely support the weight of the router, ensuring your equipment remains secure in the rack.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This kit is essential for:

Businesses (SMEs) and WISPs

Any professional installation (office, small datacenter, WISP rack) that uses an RB4011 as the main edge router and wants to mount it in a 19" rack.

Advanced home users (Homelab)

For homelab enthusiasts who have a rack at home and want to organize their RB4011 alongside their switches and servers.
rb5009-rackmount-kit-k-79-k-79:
Maximize your space, Organize your network.

The MikroTik K-79 rack mount kit is the ultimate accessory for your RB5009 and L009 series routers. This clever kit lets you install up to four of these powerful desktop routers in a single 1U height slot in a standard 19-inch rack. Say goodbye to "Tetris" in your server room and embrace a solution of pure productivity and organization.

Why choose the K-79 kit?

Maximum density and space efficiency

Its main advantage is space optimization. Instead of occupying 4U of shelf space, the K-79 kit consolidates four routers into just 1U. This frees up valuable space in your rack for other essential equipment, making your infrastructure much more compact and efficient.

Professional and organized installation

Elevate your installation to a professional level. This kit provides a clean and secure finish, eliminating the clutter of having multiple routers on a shelf. It allows for much more organized cable management and facilitates access to each device.

Perfect Compatibility

Designed specifically by MikroTik, this accessory ensures a perfect and secure fit for RB5009 and L009 series routers. Assembly is simple and the final result is a cohesive and robust unit.

Ideal For whom?

RB5009 and L009 Router Users

The essential accessory for those who own one or more of these routers and want to integrate them professionally and efficiently into a 19-inch rack.

Internet Service Providers (ISPs) and data centers

Who deploy dozens or hundreds of these routers and need to house them as compactly and organized as possible, maximizing the available space in their racks.

IT Professionals and "Home Labs"

For those looking for the cleanest, most professional, and most space-efficient solution to mount their MikroTik routers and achieve a top-level finish in their server room or home rack.

Technical Specifications
rj45-sfp-10-100-1000m-copper-module-s-rj:
Add a copper port to your fiber network.

The MikroTik S-RJ01 is an RJ45 SFP copper module designed to convert a Gigabit SFP port into a 10/100/1000M RJ45 Ethernet port. This small and versatile "problem solver" is compatible with most Gigabit SFP ports available on a wide variety of network equipment, allowing you to add an extra copper port or connect devices that do not have a fiber interface.

Why choose the S-RJ01 module?

Convert fiber to copper instantly

The main advantage of this module is the ability to transform an SFP port, normally used for fiber optics, into a standard RJ45 port. This lets you connect any copper network cable to a switch or router that only has free SFP ports.

Add an extra port to your switch

Do not waste your SFP ports. If you need an extra Gigabit Ethernet port on your switch and have an unused SFP port, this module is the most cost-effective and efficient way to take advantage of it, effectively adding a copper port to your network.

Universal compatibility

The S-RJ01 was designed to be compatible with the vast majority of network equipment with SFP ports, not limited to MikroTik products only. It is a universal tool for any network administrator.

Ideal For whom?

Switch users with SFP ports

The primary audience. For those who have a switch with SFP ports (such as MikroTik's CRS series) and need an additional RJ45 port to connect a computer, router, or other device.

Network Technicians and Installers

An essential and low-cost tool to keep in your toolkit. It allows you to resolve unexpected connectivity issues in the field when you need to connect a copper device to a fiber port.

Technical Specifications
rj45-sfp-10mb-100mb-1gb-2-5gb-5gb-10gb-c:
This unique module opens up a whole world of high-speed connectivity possibilities, offering speeds of up to 10 Gbps on common twisted-pair cables in your existing products that have SFP+ ports. Any MikroTik device with active cooling that has SFP+ ports can now be used without installing any fiber optics — simply plug in the S+RJ10 and your network can be upgraded to 10 Gbps, ready for the next generation of RJ45 hardware. 10218 bytes are now supported;

- Link speed reporting is fixed — the actual link speed in the interface menu is listed. Previously, link speeds of 100M/1G/2.5G/5G were not reported correctly;

- DDM monitoring (supply voltage, module temperature) is now supported.

Storage size 256 KB
Storage type FLASH
Tested ambient temperature -20°C to 60°C
routerboard-2-4ghz-dual-chain-ac-ceiling:
Discreet and centralized Wi-Fi for your space.

The MikroTik cAP-2nD RouterBOARD is a 2.4 GHz ceiling access point with a discreet design that blends perfectly into any environment. It is the ideal solution for hospitality businesses such as hotels, airports, and shopping centers, or for any location where aesthetics and centralized Wi-Fi network management are a priority.

Why choose the MikroTik cAP?

Discreet and elegant design

With a design reminiscent of a smoke detector, the cAP was designed for discreet installation on the ceiling or wall. Its minimalist appearance allows you to provide Wi-Fi coverage without compromising the aesthetics of your space.

Centralized Management with CAPsMAN

It is the perfect companion for MikroTik's CAPsMAN (Controlled AP System Manager). This powerful feature, which works on any MikroTik router in your network, allows you to control and configure all your cAP access points from a central location, without the need for a dedicated PC or controller software.

PoE Powered

The cAP supports the 802.3af/at Power over Ethernet standard, which simplifies installation by allowing data and power to be transmitted over a single network cable, eliminating the need for a nearby electrical outlet at the mounting location.

Complete "all-in-one" solution

The box includes everything you need to get started: access point, wall/ceiling mounting bracket, PoE injector and power supply, screws and wall anchors. It is a complete, ready-to-install solution.

Ideal For whom?

Hospitality, Airports and Shopping Centers

The primary target audience, where a discreet design, reliable 2.4 GHz coverage, and centralized management of dozens or hundreds of APs are fundamental requirements.

Offices, Schools and Clinics

To provide reliable Wi-Fi coverage for basic applications (email, web browsing) in a professional environment, with simplified network management.

Technical Specifications
routerboard-911-lite5-ac-level-3-rb911-5:
The low-cost CPE board. Now with Wi-Fi 5 (AC). High power.

The RB911-5HacD is MikroTik's low-cost RouterBOARD for building 5GHz CPEs (customer premise equipment). As an evolution of the popular 911 Lite5, this board adds Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) performance and high power (29dBm) to a compact and economical form factor. It is the ideal platform for creating custom 5 GHz CPE units or simple backhauls.

Why Choose the RB911-5HacD?

Upgrade to 802.11ac with high power

The board integrates a Dual Chain Wi-Fi 5 (AC) 5 GHz radio capable of reaching speeds of up to 867 Mbit/s. More importantly, it features a transmit power of 29dBm, enabling more stable connections at greater distances, even being a "Lite" device.

Optimized for CPE (L3 License and 10/100)

This board was designed to be a CPE (client). The 10/100 Ethernet port is a deliberate choice to keep costs low, making it more than sufficient for most customers' Internet plans. The RouterOS Level 3 (L3) license is perfectly aligned with this function, allowing the board to operate as a CPE or in a Point-to-Point (PtP) link.

Efficient and robust hardware

With a 650MHz QCA9531 CPU and 64MB of RAM, this board has the processing power needed to manage AC connections with stability. It has been tested to operate in extreme conditions (-40°C to 70°C), ensuring MikroTik's industrial reliability.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This RouterBOARD is the ideal choice for:

Building CPEs (WISP Client)

Its #1 application. Combine this board with a parabolic or panel antenna (e.g., for SXT or QRT enclosures) to create a low-cost 802.11ac customer equipment (CPE).

Simple point-to-point (PtP) links

The L3 license allows the creation of Point-to-Point links. It is a cost-effective solution for connecting two locations at AC speeds (limited by the 10/100 port).
routerboard-922uags-5hpacd-with-802-11ac:
The ideal platform for your custom wireless solution.

The MikroTik RouterBOARD RB922UAGS-5HPacD is an extremely versatile wireless router board designed to be the heart of your own network solution. Perfect for integrators and professionals, this board combines a high-power 802.11ac radio with a wide range of ports and expansion slots, including an SFP port, a miniPCIe slot, and a SIM card slot, all managed by the powerful RouterOS operating system.

Why choose the RB922UAGS-5HPacD?

Maximum connection versatility

This RouterBOARD is equipped for any scenario. It offers a Gigabit Ethernet port for your main connection, an SFP port for high-speed fiber optic connectivity, and a USB port for additional functionality, providing multiple options for building your device.

Expansion with miniPCIe and SIM card

Its most powerful feature is expandability. The miniPCIe slot, combined with the SIM card slot, allows you to easily add a 3G/4G/LTE modem. This makes it possible to create a router with a primary Internet connection and a cellular backup connection (failover) or a device for in-vehicle connectivity.

High-power integrated 802.11ac radio

The board comes with a powerful high-power Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) 2x2 MIMO radio capable of reaching speeds of up to 867 Mbit/s. The two MMCX connectors allow you to connect the external antenna of your choice, whether a sectoral antenna to create an access point or a parabolic antenna for a long-distance point-to-point link.

The Power of RouterOS (Level 4)

With the RouterOS Level 4 license, the configuration possibilities are immense. You can configure it as an access point (AP), edge router, firewall, bandwidth manager (QoS), VPN server, and much more, providing professional-level control over your solution.

Ideal For whom?

System Integrators

Those who want to build their own custom CPEs, Access Points, or specialized routers for their clients, using a reliable, powerful platform with a wide range of features.

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

To create custom customer equipment (CPEs) with high-gain antennas or to set up access points with advanced features such as failover to a 4G/LTE backup link.

Advanced IoT and M2M projects

Perfect for creating gateways that require multiple forms of connectivity (Ethernet, Fiber, Cellular) for data collection and transmission in remote locations or mobile applications.

Technical Specifications
routerboard-ac-dual-band-wall-ceiling-ap:
Ceiling design. PoE passthrough. Dual-band Wi-Fi 5 (AC).

The cAP ac (RBcAPGi-5acD2nD) is MikroTik's most versatile ceiling-mounted access point (AP). It combines an elegant design (with two enclosures, round and square) with robust performance (Wi-Fi 5 AC1200, Quad-Core CPU). Its "killer" feature is the two Gigabit ports: port 1 accepts standard PoE power (802.3af/at) and port 2 provides passive PoE output to power a second device over the same cable.

Why Choose the cAP ac?

The magic of PoE passthrough (port 2)

This is its greatest advantage. You can power the cAP ac with a standard PoE switch (802.3af/at) on port 1. You can then use port 2 to power *another* device (such as a second cAP, a cAP lite, or an IP camera) using passive PoE (up to 57V, 500mA). This drastically simplifies installations, allowing you to connect and power two devices with a single network cable.

AC1200 performance and Quad-Core CPU

Equipped with an ARM Quad-Core (IPQ-4018) CPU and 128MB of RAM, this AP easily manages dozens of clients. Dual-band Wi-Fi (AC1200) and Gigabit ports ensure there are no bottlenecks. It also supports hardware IPsec acceleration for secure VPNs.

Discreet design (2 enclosures included)

The cAP ac was made to "disappear" into the ceiling or wall. The package includes two interchangeable enclosures (a round ⌀136mm and a square 145mm) so you can choose the one that best suits your aesthetic.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Hotels, offices and corridors

Perfect for high-density installations (hotels, schools, offices) where you may want to install two APs in a corridor powered by a single cable, or where the AP needs to be discreet.

AP + Surveillance Camera

The perfect application. You can install the cAP ac on the ceiling to provide Wi-Fi in a room and use the PoE-Out port to power a PoE IP camera installed in the same location, saving on cable usage.
routerboard-cap-ax-with-routeros-l4-capg:
The next generation of wireless excellence for your business.

MikroTik's best-selling ceiling access point is back, stronger than ever. The MikroTik cAP ax was designed to deliver a new generation of wireless connectivity for offices, hotels, shopping centers, or any high-density user environment. Combining the latest Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) technology, a modern processor, and the versatility of RouterOS v7, the cAP ax is the definitive solution for a fast, stable, and scalable network.

Why choose the cAP ax?

Superior performance with Wi-Fi 6

With the 6th generation 802.11ax wireless standard, the cAP ax delivers speeds up to 90% faster in the 2.4 GHz band and 40% faster in the 5 GHz band compared to previous generations. More important than speed, stability is the main focus: this AP was built to navigate the most complex interference scenarios, ensuring the most stable and uninterrupted signal to date.

Robust Processing and RouterOS v7

Equipped with a modern 1.8 GHz quad-core CPU and 1 GB of RAM, the cAP ax has the processing power needed to extract the full potential of RouterOS v7. Run complex firewall rules, hardware IPsec encryption, WireGuard, BGP, or multiple VPN tunnels without compromising network performance.

Discreet and Functional Design

The ceiling-mount format is the most effective way to avoid signal loss in large areas with many obstacles such as walls, glass, or metal furniture. The cAP ax was designed to blend into the environment, attracting less attention than a smoke detector, while providing an ultra-fast connection that everyone will notice.

Simplified installation with PoE output

The cAP ax drastically simplifies the installation and maintenance of your network. It has a PoE input port for power and a PoE output port to power other devices. You can directly connect and power a switch, a CCTV camera, or even another cAP ax access point, reducing cabling complexity.

Ideal For whom?

Offices and Corporate Spaces

The perfect choice for any office layout, from open spaces to cubicles. It ensures excellent coverage and the ability to handle a large number of clients simultaneously, avoiding common problems of signal reflection and absorption.

Hotels, shopping centers and public venues

Designed for high-traffic and large-scale areas. Its ability to overcome obstacles and centralized management via CAPsMAN make it ideal for providing reliable Wi-Fi to customers, guests, and staff without complications.

Installers and network managers

The PoE-out functionality is an immense asset, enabling cleaner and more efficient installations. Managing hundreds of devices is simplified through CAPsMAN, which can run on any MikroTik device, such as your main gateway.
routerboard-cap-lte12-ax-with-routeros-l:
With a powerful 1.8 GHz ARM quad-core CPU, one gigabyte of RAM, and the extremely flexible RouterOS v7 at its core, the cAP LTE12 ax is much more than a simple access point. It offers a range of advanced features, including complex firewall rules, hardware IPsec encryption, WireGuard support, advanced routing, multiple VPN tunnels for remote work or file sharing, and even some lightweight BGP action!

This makes it an ideal solution for businesses requiring secure, high-performance mobile connectivity in challenging environments.

With Wi-Fi 6, it can leverage the full potential of the fast 600 Mbps LTE CAT12 modem. We are talking about up to 40% more speed in the 5 GHz spectrum and up to 90% more speed in the 2.4 GHz spectrum, compared to previous generations. In addition, Wi-Fi 6 offers significantly improved energy efficiency and security. OWE/WPA3-PSK/WPA3-EAP encryption and management frame protection help prevent all types of attacks, such as brute force and deauthentication attacks.

If you have multiple access points in a larger area, you will benefit from improved fast and seamless transition roaming — devices will switch to the stronger signal... seamlessly!

The cAP ax is also a great way to make the installation and maintenance of your office network much easier, as it has PoE-in and PoE-out. That's right — you can use the cAP ax to power other devices, such as network switches, CCTV cameras, or even another cAP ax!

routerboard-cap-xl-ac-routeros-l4-rbcapg:
The ceiling access point, Now on steroids.

MikroTik's cAP XL ac is the evolution of the popular cAP ceiling access point, now stronger than ever. Its main innovation is a new high-gain antenna that increases the coverage area by up to 100% compared to previous models. With a compact and discreet design, dual-band Wi-Fi, two Gigabit ports, and PoE output, it is the perfect solution for providing fast, long-range wireless connectivity in any indoor space.

Why choose the cAP XL ac?

Coverage increased by 100%

The "XL" in the name refers to its new larger high-gain antenna, which has greater sensitivity and an integrated reflector. These improvements double the coverage area compared to previous cAP models, ensuring a strong and stable signal in every corner of your space.

Competitive dual-band Wi-Fi

The dual-band, dual-chain wireless radio operates on 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz simultaneously, providing robust 360-degree coverage. Ceiling mounting eliminates many signal absorption problems caused by obstacles such as walls or furniture, ensuring the best possible performance.

Dual Gigabit ports with PoE output

Its second Ethernet port offers enormous flexibility. It supports passive PoE output (up to 57 V), allowing you to connect and power a second network device, such as another cAP XL ac or a switch, directly from your unit, simplifying cabling in larger installations.

Discreet and elegant design

Despite its powerful antenna, the cAP XL ac maintains a compact and discreet design that attracts less attention than a smoke detector. Your customers, guests, or colleagues will not even notice its presence, but they will certainly notice the ultra-fast Wi-Fi connection throughout the space.

Ideal For whom?

Offices, hotels and public spaces

Perfect for busy locations such as offices, restaurants, hotels, or airports. The ceiling mounting and wide coverage make it ideal for providing Wi-Fi to a large number of users over a wide area.

Large Residences

For those looking for full Wi-Fi coverage in a large or multi-story home, eliminating signal "dead zones" with a single powerful, centrally installed device.

Technical Specifications
routerboard-groove-a-52hpn-level-4-rbgro:
The complete solution for outdoor environments and versatile.

The MikroTik GrooveA 52HPn is the smallest and most flexible model in the MikroTik outdoor series. Weatherproof and ready to use, it is the perfect device to use as an Access Point, CPE or to create a point-to-point connection.

Why choose the GrooveA 52HPn?

Complete kit, ready to use

Simplify your installation as much as possible. The box contains everything you need to get your network up and running: the Groove unit, an omnidirectional antenna, pole mounting brackets, a PoE injector and its power supply.

Selectable dual band (2.4 or 5 GHz)

The GrooveA 52HPn offers complete flexibility, operating on the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands. Through a simple software configuration, you can choose the 2.4 GHz band for greater compatibility and range, or the 5 GHz band for higher speeds and less interference.

The Power of RouterOS (Level 4)

It is not just an access point. With a RouterOS Level 4 license, the Groove has full routing functionality. You can configure it as a firewall, a bandwidth manager (QoS), a VPN server or create an advanced Hotspot with a captive portal for your clients.

Robust design with N-male connector

Its housing is fully weatherproof, ideal for any outdoor installation. The standard N-male connector allows you to connect directly to the included omni antenna or to any other antenna with an N-female connector to create custom solutions, such as long-distance links.

Ideal For whom?

Wi-Fi coverage in outdoor areas

The perfect solution to provide 360° Internet access in gardens, courtyards, terraces, campsites or marinas, where wide coverage from a central point is desired.

As a CPE for WISP clients

A reliable, low-cost, high-power client device (CPE) to connect to a wireless Internet provider's base station, ensuring a stable connection.

Simple point-to-point links

When used in pairs (with directional or included omni antennas for short distances), it allows you to create a wireless network "bridge" to interconnect two locations simply and cost-effectively.

With an ultra-high-power radio, Gigabit connectivity and the flexibility to operate at 2.4 or 5 GHz, it is the ultimate "all-in-one" solution for your outdoor network needs.

Industrial Metal Construction

Its fully sealed metal enclosure gives it unmatched robustness. It was designed to withstand extreme conditions, making it the perfect choice for industrial, maritime or any location where normal plastic equipment would not survive.

Super High Power Radio (SHP)

Selectable dual band (2.4 or 5 GHz)

Through a simple software configuration, you can choose which band the radio will operate on. Use the 5 GHz band with the 802.11ac standard for maximum speed or switch to the 2.4 GHz band for greater compatibility with older devices and better signal penetration.

This is not a simple access point. With a RouterOS Level 4 license, the Metal 52 ac is a full router. You can configure it as a firewall, bandwidth manager (QoS), VPN server or create an advanced Hotspot with a captive portal, offering unmatched versatility.

Industrial and maritime applications

The perfect choice for factories, ports, boats and any environment where resistance to corrosion, vibrations and other adverse conditions is a fundamental requirement.

Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

Long-distance connections

routerboard-groove-52hpn-level-3-rbgroov:
One radio. Two bands. Direct N-male connector. The Universal CPE.

The RBGroove52HPn is the smallest and most versatile "all-in-one" outdoor device from Mikrotik. It is a rugged CPE (weatherproof), designed to be connected directly to an antenna. Its greatest strength is flexibility: the high-power radio (500mW / 27dBm) (Single Chain) can be configured via software to operate at 2.4GHz OR 5GHz. With a Level 3 (L3) license and an integrated N-Male connector, it is the perfect "radio-in-a-stick" solution for any Point-to-Point (PtP) or Client (CPE) link.

Why Choose the Groove 52HPn?

Selectable radio (2.4 or 5GHz)

Its greatest advantage. You do not need to keep two different CPEs in stock. The Groove 52HPn can be configured for 2.4 GHz (802.11b/g/n) or 5 GHz (802.11a/n) via software, adapting to any WISP scenario.

N-male connector (no cable loss)

The "Groove" design eliminates the need for pigtails. The device is screwed directly onto the N-Female connector of your antenna (dish, sectoral or omni), ensuring minimal signal loss and a clean installation.

High power LEDs (500mW) and alignment

The power of 27dBm (500mW) on both bands ensures a robust connection, ideal for CPE in areas with weaker signal. The side signal LEDs make antenna alignment easier without needing to access the interface.

Complete and rugged kit (RouterOS L3)

The case is fully weatherproof and the package includes everything you need: power supply, passive PoE injector (9-30V) and mounting brackets. The L3 license allows you to use it as a CPE or in a point-to-point link.

Universal WISP CPE (Client)

Its #1 application. The perfect CPE for any wireless internet provider. Works whether your tower transmits at 2.4 GHz or 5 GHz. Simply connect it to a Dish or Grid antenna.

Low-cost point-to-point (PtP) links

Combine two Groove parabolic antennas (Dish) to create a robust and reliable PtP link. (Note: maximum speed is limited by the 10/100 Ethernet port).

Multifunctional solution for outdoor environments

Flexible dual-band connectivity

Do not be deceived by its size. Equipped with a RouterOS Level 4 license, the GrooveA 52 ac is much more than a simple access point. It can be configured as a router, firewall, bandwidth manager, VPN server and much more, offering unmatched versatility for custom network solutions.

Robust and discreet design

Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

IoT and M2M networks

routerboard-l11ug-5haxd-routeros-l4-l11u:
Build your own Wi-Fi 6 CPE.

The MikroTik RouterBOARD L11UG-5HaxD is the ideal platform for your DIY projects, bringing the power of Wi-Fi 6 to the iconic RouterBOARD product line. Just like its predecessor the RB911, this small board was designed to be your best ally in building low-cost CPEs for indoor or outdoor use. Equipped with a modern ARM CPU, 256 MB of RAM and a powerful 5 GHz Wi-Fi 6 radio with MMCX connectors, the customisation possibilities are immense.

Why choose the L11UG-5HaxD?

The power of Wi-Fi 6

This board brings all the advantages of the Wi-Fi 6 standard (802.11ax) to your custom projects. Enjoy faster speeds, greater efficiency and far superior performance in environments with multiple devices compared to older Wi-Fi technologies.

Maximum customisation with MMCX connectors

The 5 GHz Wi-Fi 6 radio is equipped with MMCX connectors, which allows total freedom in antenna selection. Add an omnidirectional antenna to create an excellent access point or combine it with a high-gain dish antenna, such as the mANT30, to create a powerful long-distance point-to-point link.

Modern and efficient hardware

System integrators and DIY enthusiasts

The primary audience. Perfect for those who enjoy creating their own custom network solutions, whether a CPE, Access Point or other wireless device, with the latest Wi-Fi 6 technology.

Wireless Internet Providers (WISPs)

For the creation of low-cost, customised Wi-Fi 6 client equipment (CPEs), using the antenna that best suits each installation scenario, to offer clients a higher-speed service.

IoT and M2M projects

As the heart of a gateway or data collection point that requires a high-performance Wi-Fi 6 connection to transmit information.
