routerboard-m11g-routeros-l4-rbm11g:
Dual-core power. 256 MB of RAM. The perfect upgrade.

The RBM11G is the next-generation RouterBOARD platform for custom solutions. It is the secret weapon for modernising old installations, equipped with a powerful MediaTek Dual-Core (4-thread) 880MHz CPU, generous 256MB of RAM and hardware IPsec acceleration. Its Gigabit Ethernet port, miniPCI-e slot and SIM slot make it the perfect base for building high-performance LTE gateways or Wi-Fi AC APs.

Why Choose the RBM11G?

"Drop-in replacement" (easy upgrade)

The RBM11G uses the same square PCB and hole pattern as its predecessors (such as the RB411 or RB911). This allows you to perform a massive hardware upgrade (CPU and RAM) in already-installed field-mounted enclosures, simply by swapping the board. It is the fastest and most cost-effective upgrade for your WISP network.

880 MHz dual-core CPU and 256 MB of RAM

This is a giant performance leap. The MT7621A CPU (Dual-Core, 4-Threads) and 256 MB of RAM offer the processing power needed to manage complex firewall rules, queues, multiple VPN tunnels and a large number of clients, without "bottlenecks".

Connectivity gateway (miniPCI-e + SIM)

The combination of 1 Gigabit port, 1 miniPCI-e slot and 1 SIM slot makes it the perfect base. Add an R11e-LTE modem for a robust 4G/LTE gateway or add a Wi-Fi AC card (such as the R11e-5HacD) for a high-speed access point.

Hardware IPsec acceleration

The new CPU supports hardware IPsec acceleration, making the RBM11G an excellent choice for a low-cost, high-performance site-to-site gateway (VPN).

Ideal For which scenarios?

This RouterBOARD is the ideal choice for:

Upgrading old WISP CPEs/APs

The number 1 application. Replace your old RB411, RB711 or RB911 without changing the enclosure, gaining an 880MHz CPU and 256MB of RAM.

Custom 4G/LTE gateway

Combine the RBM11G with an LTE modem (e.g., R11e-LTE) and a weatherproof enclosure to create a robust 4G gateway for rural areas.

Wi-Fi AC Access Point (AP)

Add a 5 GHz miniPCI-e AC card (such as the R11e-5HacD) to create a high-performance access point where the powerful CPU can handle many clients.
routerboard-m33g-routeros-l4-rbm33g:
The Dual-LTE platform. Dual-core CPU. 3 Gigabit ports.

The RBM33G is the modern successor to the legendary RB433/RB953 boards, designed to build high-performance custom gateways and APs. Its power lies in the combination of a Dual-Core (4 thread) 880MHz CPU with 256MB of RAM and unprecedented connectivity: 3x Gigabit Ethernet ports, 2x miniPCI-e slots, 2x SIM slots, 1x M.2 slot and 1x USB3.0 port. It is the ultimate platform for creating multi-WAN routers with Dual-LTE redundancy.

Why Choose the RBM33G?

Designed for redundancy (dual LTE)

This is its primary function. With 2 miniPCI-e slots and 2 SIM slots, you can install two 4G/LTE modems from different carriers for automatic failover or link aggregation (load balancing). Combine this with the USB 3.0 port (for a third modem) and the 3 GbE ports (for fixed WANs), and you will have an unbeatable link aggregation router.

880 MHz dual-core CPU and 256 MB of RAM

The MT7621A CPU (Dual-Core, 4-Threads) and 256 MB of RAM offer the processing power to manage multiple modems, Wi-Fi (if added), firewall rules and VPN tunnels (with hardware IPsec acceleration).

Modern connectivity (GbE, M.2, USB 3.0)

Forget 10/100 ports. The RBM33G comes with 3x Gigabit Ethernet ports. Additionally, it features an M.2 (PCIe) slot for NVMe SSDs and a USB 3.0 port, enabling high-speed storage for logs, The Dude or caching.

Direct upgrade (RB433 form factor)

The RBM33G uses the same PCB form factor and hole pattern as the classic RB433 and RB953. You can modernise your enclosures (such as the CA433U) with this board, gaining a Dual-Core CPU and Gigabit ports.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This RouterBOARD is the ideal choice for:

Aggregation/failover gateways

The #1 application. Build a router that combines 2 4G modems + 1 Gigabit WAN to ensure your business or remote location never goes offline.

Custom triple-band APs

Use one miniPCIe slot for an LTE modem, the second for a 5 GHz Wi-Fi (AC) card and the USB port for a second LTE modem or Wi-Fi radio. The best mobile gateway platform.
routerboard-mantbox-2-12dbi-120-rb911g-2:
Your base station ready for installation.

The MikroTik mANTBox 12s (RB911G-2HPnD-12S) is a robust and high-performance "all-in-one" outdoor wireless solution. This equipment integrates a powerful RouterBOARD, a high-power radio (2.4 GHz) and a 12 dBi sectoral antenna into a single, mount-ready unit. Designed to be a base station (Access Point), it is the ideal choice for creating Point-to-Multipoint (PtMP) networks quickly, cost-effectively and reliably.

Why choose the mANTBox 12s?

Integrated "all-in-one" solution

Simplify your installation. The mANTBox 12s comes ready to use, with the antenna, radio and board already integrated and mounted in a weatherproof enclosure. This eliminates the need to purchase and assemble separate components, reducing installation time and complexity in the field.

High performance and long range

The combination of a high transmission power radio (up to 30 dBm / 1000 mW) with a high-gain sectoral antenna (12 dBi) allows you to create stable, long-distance connections. It is the perfect solution to serve as a central access point, covering a vast sector with a strong and reliable signal.

RouterOS power and flexibility

Equipped with the RouterOS operating system and a Level 4 license, this device can be configured as an advanced Access Point. Benefit from professional features such as firewall, QoS, dynamic routing, VPN and much more, enabling complete and detailed network management.

Robust outdoor construction

With an IP54 protection rating and an operating temperature range of -40°C to +70°C, the mANTBox 12s is prepared to face the most adverse weather conditions, ensuring continuous and reliable operation throughout the year.

Ideal For whom?

Wireless Internet Providers (WISPs)

The primary market for this product. It is the perfect base station for distributing Internet signal to multiple clients (CPEs) in a given geographical area.

Point-to-multipoint (PtMP) networks

Excellent for connecting multiple buildings on a farm, a university campus or for connecting multiple remote surveillance cameras to a monitoring centre.

Point-to-point (PtP) links

Can be used in pairs to create a stable medium/long-distance directional link between two fixed points where cable routing is not viable.

Technical Specifications
routerboard-map2n-with-power-supply-and-:
The pocket router. Triple power input. With PoE output.

mAP (micro Access Point) is the most portable and versatile network tool from Mikrotik. It is a 2.4 GHz (dual-chain) access point in a tiny size (68x68x19mm) running the full RouterOS (Level 4). Its magic lies in its flexibility: it can be powered by microUSB, DC Jack (8-57V) or standard PoE (802.3af/at). As if that were not enough, its second Ethernet port works as a PoE injector (PoE-Out), capable of powering another device (such as an SXT CPE) directly.

Why Choose mAP?

Unmatched power versatility

mAP is the "Swiss army knife" of power. You can power it:

  • From a power bank or laptop via microUSB (5V).
  • From a standard power supply via DC Jack (8-57V).
  • From a standard 802.3af/at PoE switch (12-57V).

Full RouterOS in micro form factor

Do not be deceived by its size. This device runs full RouterOS Level 4. It can be an AP, a router, a firewall, a WISP client or anything else RouterOS allows, all in a device that fits in the palm of your hand.

The travel PoE "injector" (PoE output)

Its standout feature: the Ether2 port offers passive PoE output (up to 500mA). This is perfect for field technicians: you can power the mAP with a power bank (via USB) and use the mAP to power and configure a CPE (such as an SXT or LHG) on the rooftop, without needing power supplies or long cables.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

The IT technician's toolkit

The #1 tool for any network technician or WISP. Simplifies on-site CPE configuration.

Travel router

Use it in a hotel room (connected to a power bank or phone charger) to create your own private and secure 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi network.

Simple network extender

Use the mAP to connect and power a PoE IP camera where you only have a single network point or to extend the network to an SXT CPE.
routerboard-map2nd-with-power-supply-and:
MikroTik mAP 2nD (RBMAP2ND): Ultraportable 2.4 GHz wireless N AP with PoE output.

The MikroTik mAP 2nD (product code RouterBOARD mAP2nD or RBMAP2ND) is an extraordinarily small yet feature-packed 2.4 GHz (802.11b/g/n) wireless access point powered by the Level 4 licensed RouterOS operating system. A discreet solution for small areas. It stands out for its multiple power options: it can be powered via PoE-in (passive 10-57V or 802.3af/at standard), through the traditional DC connector (24V 0.8A transformer included in the package), or conveniently through its microUSB port. A unique feature is its ability to also function as a PoE injector, providing passive PoE power (up to 500mA, with the same input voltage) on its second Ethernet port to power another device, such as a MikroTik SXT CPE. Additionally, the microUSB port can be used to connect a 3G/4G modem, turning the mAP 2nD into a mobile internet gateway. It is a truly ultracompact and multifunctional networking tool.

Why Choose the MikroTik mAP 2nD?

Ultracompact and Portable

With dimensions of just 68x68x19mm, the mAP 2nD is one of the smallest access points on the market to offer all RouterOS functionality. It is incredibly easy to carry and install anywhere, even in very limited spaces.

Incredibly Versatile Power Options

This device offers remarkable power flexibility. It can be powered through Ethernet port 1 (passive PoE-in 10-57V or 802.3af/at standard), via the DC connector (24V 0.8A transformer included), or through the microUSB port, for example from a power bank.

PoE Passthrough Functionality on the Second Port

Ethernet port 2 (Ether2) has the unique ability to provide passive PoE output, with the same voltage powering the mAP 2nD, up to a maximum of 500mA. This is ideal for directly powering another passive PoE device, such as a CPE, IP camera or another AP, simplifying cabling.

RouterOS Level 4 – Full Power in Miniature

Despite its size, it comes equipped with MikroTik RouterOS and Level 4 license, allowing it to function as a full access point, router, wireless client, bridge or any combination. It offers advanced firewall, QoS, VPNs (PPTP, L2TP, OpenVPN, etc.), hotspot and all the other powerful features RouterOS is known for.

MicroUSB Port for 3G/4G Expansion or Power

The microUSB port not only serves as an alternative power option, but can also be used to connect a 3G/4G USB modem (dongle), allowing the mAP 2nD to act as a failover router for mobile internet or as a mobile access point.

Ideal For Whom?

The MikroTik mAP 2nD (RBMAP2ND) is the ideal choice for:

Travelers and Field Technicians

A perfect travel companion for instantly creating a secure Wi-Fi network and sharing an internet connection (e.g., hotel or via 3G/4G modem). It is also a valuable diagnostic and configuration tool for network technicians in the field.

Small Home or Office Networks

To provide 2.4 GHz (802.11b/g/n) Wi-Fi coverage in small areas or to implement specific routing functionality where physical space is an important constraint.

Specific Installations with PoE Passthrough

Ideal for scenarios where it is necessary to power a second passive PoE device directly from the access point, such as an airMAX CPE when installing a WISP client, thereby minimizing the number of cables and power supplies.

IoT Products or 3G/4G Connectivity

It can function as a compact, low-power gateway for IoT devices, using a 3G/4G USB modem for internet connectivity in remote locations or as a backup.

MikroTik Enthusiasts Seeking Maximum Portability

For those who already know and appreciate the power of RouterOS and need an ultraportable and flexible solution for the most diverse networking applications.

routerboard-sxt-2-4ghz-dual-chain-cpe-16:
The compact and lightweight CPE for your wireless connections.

Ultra-thin and discreet design

Point-to-Point (PtP) Links

Video Surveillance Networks

routerboard-sxt-5ghz-dual-chain-ac-cpe-1:
MikroTik SXTsq 5 ac (RBSXTsqG-5acD): Compact 5GHz 802.11ac Outdoor CPE.

The MikroTik SXTsq 5 ac (product code RBSXTsqG-5acD) is a compact and lightweight outdoor wireless device with an integrated 16 dBi antenna, ideal for point-to-point (PtP) connections of up to 12 kilometers or for use as a CPE (Customer Premises Equipment) unit in point-to-multipoint (PtMP) networks. Operating in the 5 GHz band and using the 802.11ac (Wi-Fi 5) protocol, this equipment includes a Gigabit Ethernet port to fully leverage the speeds that the AC protocol offers. Maintaining the same 16 dBi antenna gain as the previous SXT 5 ac model, the SXTsq 5 ac features an improved antenna design and a drastically reduced physical size, making it twice as thin. Its enclosure is weather-resistant (IP54) and easy to mount on poles or horizontal rods. Powered via passive PoE and running the RouterOS operating system with Level 3 license, the SXTsq 5 ac stands out for its excellent cost-to-performance ratio and reliability in outdoor wireless connections.

Why Choose the MikroTik SXTsq 5 ac?

Compact and lightweight design with integrated 16 dBi antenna

The SXTsq 5 ac is notably thinner and lighter than previous SXT models, while maintaining a powerful integrated 16 dBi antenna. This compact design facilitates installation and minimizes visual impact without compromising signal performance.

Ideal for point-to-point links and as CPE

It is a perfect solution for creating stable PtP wireless bridges between two locations, reaching up to 12 kilometers under ideal conditions. It works equally well as a robust and reliable client device (CPE) in PtMP networks, connecting to a base station (access point) at 5 GHz frequency.

802.11ac (Wi-Fi 5) technology for good performance

Using the 802.11ac standard and 2x2 MIMO technology, the SXTsq 5 ac offers data rates of up to 867 Mbit/s, providing fast and efficient connectivity for most applications requiring outdoor wireless links.

Robust outdoor construction (IP54) and versatile mounting

Its enclosure is weather-resistant (IP54 rating), protecting against dust and water splashes. It includes slots for directly attaching a metal clamp (included) in three different mounting positions, allowing installation on poles or horizontal rods. It also features an easily accessible grounding connection.

RouterOS Level 3 and passive PoE power

It comes with MikroTik's RouterOS operating system and a Level 3 license, which allows it to operate as a CPE or in point-to-point connections, offering routing, firewall and more features. It is powered via passive PoE (10-28V), and the PoE adapter and injector are normally included with MikroTik CPEs (check the specific package contents).

Ideal For Whom?

The MikroTik SXTsq 5 ac is the ideal choice for:

Wireless Internet Service Providers (WISPs)

As an economical, reliable and high-performance CPE for connecting residential or small business customers to their Point-to-MultiPoint networks in the 5 GHz band.

Short to medium distance point-to-point (PtP) connections

For creating wireless bridges between buildings, connecting remote video surveillance systems or extending local networks to nearby facilities (up to 12 km with line of sight and ideal conditions).

Clients in 5GHz point-to-multipoint (PtMP) networks

Works effectively as a client (Station) to connect to a compatible Base Station (Access Point) with 802.11ac at 5GHz frequency.

Users looking for affordable and reliable outdoor wireless links

Anyone or small business needing a stable outdoor wireless connection in the 5GHz band with adequate performance for most applications and an excellent cost-to-performance ratio.

routerboard-sxt-r-without-lte-card-with-:
Bring your modem. 10.5dBi antenna. PoE output.

The SXT R (RBSXTR) is the Mikrotik low-cost LTE chassis. It is not a complete product: it is a high-gain LTE antenna (10.5dBi) integrated into an SXT enclosure containing a RouterBOARD with a free miniPCI-e slot. It was designed for those who want the freedom to install their own 4G/LTE modem (BYOM - "Bring Your Own Modem"), 2 SIM slots and the fantastic PoE-Out functionality.

Important note: The device does NOT include a 4G/LTE modem. The miniPCI-e slot is empty. The 2 SIM slots can only be used AFTER installing a compatible miniPCI-e modem.

Why Choose SXT R?

"Bring Your Own Modem" (BYOM)

Its greatest advantage is freedom. It is not tied to a specific modem. You can choose the miniPCI-e modem (Cat 4, Cat 6 or higher) that best suits your frequency or performance needs.

High-gain antenna (10.5dBi)

The integrated 10.5dBi antenna was professionally designed for the LTE spectrum. It can capture signal in remote locations where mobile phones or indoor 4G routers no longer have network coverage, ensuring a stable connection.

PoE Output (passthrough)

The SXT R has 2 Ethernet ports. Port 1 accepts standard PoE (802.3af/at) power. Port 2 offers passive PoE output (up to 600mA). This is perfect for powering a second device (such as an IP camera or AP) using a single network cable.

Redundancy (Dual SIM)

The board has two Micro SIM slots. When used with a compatible modem, you can configure RouterOS (L3 License) to perform automatic failover between two carriers, ensuring maximum uptime.

Ideal For Which Scenarios?

This device is the ideal choice for:

Rural/Low Coverage Areas

The ultimate "low-cost" solution for bringing internet to remote locations, where only a high-gain antenna can establish a connection.

4G CPE + Surveillance Camera

The perfect scenario. Install the SXT R outdoors to capture a 4G signal and use the PoE-Out port to power a PoE IP camera, all with a single cable.

Internet Failover (Backup)

Use the 2 SIM redundancy to create an ultra-reliable backup link for a home or small office (Note: speed is limited by the 10/100 ports).
sfp-mm-module-1-25g-550m-850nm-s-85dlc05:
Reliable fiber connectivity for your network.

The S-85DLC05D is a MikroTik 1.25G SFP transceiver, designed to add multimode fiber optic connectivity to any equipment with an SFP port. Tested and fully compatible with MikroTik products, this module is the ideal solution for creating high-speed network connections over short distances, reliably and economically.

Why choose the S-85DLC05D SFP module?

Short Distance Gigabit Connection

This module allows creating 1.25 Gbps fiber optic links for distances of up to 550 meters, making it perfect for interconnecting switches within a building, between floors or in short-distance campus environments.

Multimode (MM) Fiber Optic

It uses standard 850 nm multimode fiber, which represents the most economical and widely used solution for high-speed connections over shorter distances and is a popular choice for local network backbones.

Digital Diagnostics (DDMI)

Support for DDMI (Digital Diagnostics Monitoring Interface) is a professional feature that allows network administrators to monitor module parameters in real time, such as optical power transmission and reception, temperature and voltage, facilitating problem detection and resolution.

Guaranteed compatibility

Like all MikroTik optical modules, the S-85DLC05D has been extensively tested and is fully compatible with the wide range of MikroTik routers and switches that have SFP ports, ensuring a simple and immediate user experience.

Ideal For Whom?

Network backbones in buildings

The perfect solution for connecting floor distributors or network cabinets within the same building, where copper cabling may be insufficient or susceptible to electromagnetic interference.

Short-distance campus connections

For connecting nearby buildings in a campus, business park or university environment, provided the distance does not exceed 550 meters.

MikroTik Network Administrators

For any user of MikroTik equipment (such as CRS, CCR series or others) who needs to add a reliable and low-cost multimode fiber connection to their network infrastructure.
sfp-sm-pair-modules-s-35lc20d-s-53lc20d-:
Double your fiber capacity. One fiber, two directions.

The MikroTik S-35/53LC20D is a pair of SFP transceivers that uses WDM (Wavelength Division Multiplexing) technology to create a 1.25G connection over a single fiber optic strand. This kit is the perfect solution for doubling the capacity of your existing fiber infrastructure or for establishing long-distance links (up to 20 km) where only a single fiber strand is available, reducing costs and complexity.

Why choose the S-35/53LC20D Kit?

Bidirectional WDM technology

The magic of WDM technology lies in using different wavelengths (colors of light) to send and receive data. The S-35LC20D module transmits at 1310nm and receives at 1550nm, while its counterpart, the S-53LC20D, does the opposite. This enables Full-Duplex communication (simultaneous sending and receiving) over a single fiber strand, something that traditionally would require two.

Paired kit for simplicity

This product is sold as a kit with both modules (S-35LC20D and S-53LC20D), ensuring perfect pairing and straightforward installation. Simply install one module at each end of your fiber connection and it will work immediately.

20 km reach on single-mode fiber

Designed to operate on single-mode fiber optic, these modules are capable of establishing a stable, high-speed connection over distances of up to 20 kilometers, ideal for interconnecting buildings, campuses or different points of presence (PoPs) on a network.

Wide compatibility

The units are tested and compatible with a wide range of MikroTik equipment with SFP ports, such as the RB260GS, the entire RB2011 series and CCR routers. They are also compatible with SFP equipment from other brands that follow industry standards.

Ideal For Whom?

Optimize existing fiber infrastructure

Perfect for network operators who already have single-strand fiber cables running and need to increase network capacity without the enormous cost of installing a second fiber strand.

Internet Service Providers (ISPs)

For providing symmetrical internet services to business customers or for creating efficient backhaul links, making the most of every strand in their fiber network.

Campus networks and inter-building connections

The ideal solution for interconnecting different buildings of a company, university or industrial park, especially when the available fiber infrastructure is limited to a single strand.

Technical Specifications
sfp-sm-pair-modules-s-45lc80d-s-54lc80d-:
NOTE: This product is sold as a pair (includes one T1490nm/R1550nm module and one T1550nm/R1490nm module).

80 km reach. Industrial Temperature. Complete BiDi kit.

The Mikrotik S-4554LC80D is the ultimate solution for long-distance fiber connections in harsh environments. This kit includes two WDM (BiDi) SFP modules that operate on a single single-mode fiber strand of up to 80km. Rated as "Industrial Grade", they support extreme temperatures of -40°C to +85°C, ensuring link stability even in outdoor enclosures without air conditioning.

Why Choose the S-4554LC80D?

Long Distance (80km) with DDM

Designed for extensive backhauls. These 1.25G modules allow connecting cities or towers at distances of up to 80 km. They include DDM (Digital Diagnostic Monitoring), allowing you to check the link's temperature, voltage and optical power levels in real time.

BiDi (WDM) Technology - Fiber Savings

Unlike traditional duplex modules that use two fibers, these modules use WDM technology to transmit and receive data over a single fiber (LC Simplex connector). Module A transmits at 1490 nm and receives at 1550 nm, while module B does the opposite. This doubles the capacity of your existing fiber infrastructure.

Industrial Robustness (-40°C to +85°C)

Most SFPs fail under extreme heat or cold conditions. These modules have been tested and certified to operate over an industrial temperature range, making them ideal for installation in street cabinets, telecommunications towers or factory environments.

Ideal For Which Scenarios?

This kit is the ideal choice for:

ISPs and WISP Backbones

For connecting distant POPs (points of presence) using leased or owned fiber, maximizing the use of available fiber strands.

Outdoor Installations (NetPower / NetMetal)

Perfect for use with Mikrotik outdoor switches (such as the netPower 16P) that are exposed to extreme temperature variations.

Remote Monitoring and CCTV

For connecting cameras or sensors in very remote locations where fiber is the only option for stable connectivity.

sfp-active-optics-direct-attach-cable-5m:
10 Gigabit SFP+. Active connection. Universal compatibility.

The Active DAC Cable (Active Optics) S+AO0005 from MikroTik is the most reliable and cost-effective solution for 10Gbps connections in racks. This 5-meter cable integrates SFP+ modules and uses active optics to regenerate the signal. Its main advantage is guaranteed universal compatibility, making it the ideal DAC cable for routers in the **RB4011** series (which do not support passive S+DA000x cables).

Why Choose S+AO0005?

Maximum Compatibility (Active Technology)

Unlike passive DAC cables (which rely on signal regeneration from the switch), the S+AO0005 is active. This means it amplifies the signal itself, ensuring a robust 1G or 10G connection with all MikroTik SFP+ devices, eliminating chipset and incompatibility issues.

Cost-effective and Plug & Play

The cost of this integrated DAC cable is significantly lower than buying separate fiber SFP+ modules and optical cables. It is a direct connection solution ("direct attach cable") and plug-and-play that simplifies installation and saves money on the optical budget.

Ideal length for adjacent racks (5m)

At 5 meters in length, this cable is perfect for connecting switches or routers located in the same rack or across adjacent racks (Rack-to-Rack), providing the high-speed connectivity needed for aggregation links.

Ideal For which scenarios?

This cable is the ideal choice for:

Connecting RB4011 Routers to CRS Switches

The primary application. The S+AO0005 is the guaranteed way to connect your main router (RB4011) to a switch (e.g., CRS326) reliably at 10G.

Rack-to-rack connections (5 meters)

For interconnecting Top-of-Rack (ToR) switches or distribution switches between adjacent racks in data centers or server rooms.

When passive cables fail

Used on any SFP+ port where passive DAC cables (S+DA000x) show link errors or fail to regenerate the signal.

transformador-24v-2-5a-power-plug:
Unstoppable power. High wattage. 24V 2.5A power supply.

The MikroTik 24HPOW is a high-capacity power supply designed to support the most demanding network infrastructures. With an impressive output of 24V at 2.5A, it was specifically designed to compensate for voltage drops in demanding deployments. It is the key component for ensuring the stable and uninterrupted operation of routers, switches, or antennas that support multiple high-power wireless cards, even when installed at long distances from the power outlet.

Why Choose the MikroTik 24HPOW power supply?

The solution for long cables

When using PoE (Power over Ethernet) over long distances, cable resistance causes inevitable voltage drops, which can restart your equipment. The generous amperage (2.5 A) and wattage of this power supply fully compensate for these losses, ensuring that your external or ceiling-mounted hardware receives enough clean power, regardless of cable length.

Ideal for high-consumption wireless networks

Not all power supplies are equal. Modern telecommunications equipment, especially those operating in high-density scenarios with multiple high-power wireless cards simultaneously (such as heavy backhauls or base stations), requires power spikes that conventional power supplies cannot handle. 24HPOW is the official MikroTik recommendation for these critical situations.

Extreme Reliability (MTBF of 100,000 hours)

Your network never takes a day off, and your power supply should not fail either. Built with premium industrial components, the 24HPOW has an impressive Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF) of approximately 100,000 hours at 25°C, which translates to over a decade of durability and peace of mind for system administrators.

Ready to use (IEC cable included)

Practical at installation time. The power supply is auto-voltage (supports input voltages from 100 to 240V at 1.6A), adapting to any electrical panel or UPS. The package includes the standard IEC power cable, saving time and trips to the warehouse looking for compatible cables during deployment.

wireless-wire-dish-60ghz-l3-complete-lin:
Fiber speed, without wires.

The MikroTik Wireless Wire Dish is a revolutionary solution that offers the speed and stability of a fiber optic connection, but with the convenience of wireless technology.This product is a complete kit that includes two LHGG60ad devices, pre-configured from the factory, to create an encrypted and secure point-to-point (PtP) connection in the 60 GHz band.It is the simplest and fastest way to establish a bridge network with Gigabit Full-Duplex speed.

Why choose a wireless wire dish?

Pre-configured kit for immediate installation

The biggest advantage of this kit is its simplicity.The two units come paired from the factory, with a secure AES encrypted connection already established.Installation simply involves mounting the equipment, pointing them at each other, and connecting them.No software configuration is required, saving time and eliminating complexity.

Gigabit Full Duplex speed

Enjoy impressive network performance.The point-to-point connection reaches speeds of 1 Gbps in Full-Duplex, meaning 1 Gbps download and 1 Gbps upload simultaneously.This massive throughput is ideal for heavy file transfers, backups, 4K video streaming, and other intensive applications.

Secure and interference-free connection

By operating in the 60 GHz band, your connection does not suffer from the congestion and noise of traditional 2.4 and 5 GHz Wi-Fi networks.The signal is extremely focused and the AES encrypted connection makes it very secure and practically impossible to intercept.

Robust design and powerful processing

The grid antenna (LHG) design offers excellent performance and wind resistance.Inside, a powerful quad-core ARM processor ensures the device can handle high-speed traffic without any difficulty, providing a stable, low-latency connection.

Ideal For whom?

Interconnecting buildings on a campus or company

The fastest and most economical way to create a 1 Gbps backbone between two buildings, avoiding the costs, construction, and bureaucracy associated with using a fiber optic cable.

Temporary events and construction sites

Perfect for quickly establishing a high-speed network connection between two points in a temporary installation, such as a festival, fair, or construction site.

Anyone who needs a "virtual fiber"

The ideal solution for connecting a main house to a guest house, a garden office, or a remote workshop on the same property, ensuring maximum network performance without running cables.
